This study investigates bias in LLMs by probing the relationships between gender and other SDoH in French patient records. Through a series of experiments, we found that embedded stereotypes can be probed using SDoH input and that LLMs rely on embedded stereotypes to make gendered decisions, suggesting that evaluating interactions among SDoH factors could usefully complement existing approaches to assessing LLM performance and bias.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了大型语言模型（LLMs）在法语患者记录中对性别与其他社会决定健康因素（SDoH）之间关系的偏见，发现模型依赖于嵌入的刻板印象进行性别判断，强调评估SDoH因素间交互作用的重要性。
AI.motivation: 现有基准通常只评估单一社会决定健康因素（如性别或种族）相关的偏见，忽视这些因素之间的相互作用及具体情境下的评估，尤其在医疗等敏感领域影响重大。
AI.method: 通过一系列实验，利用社会决定健康因素作为输入，探测大型语言模型在法语患者记录中的偏见表现，分析其决策是否受刻板印象影响。
AI.result: 研究发现，大型语言模型在性别判断中确实依赖于嵌入的刻板印象，且能够通过社会决定健康因素的组合揭示出潜在的偏见模式。
AI.conclusion: 评估社会决定健康因素间的交互作用可有效补充现有方法，有助于更全面地识别和缓解大型语言模型中的偏见。

title: BiCLIP: Domain Canonicalization via Structured Geometric Transformation
summary: Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable zero-shot capabilities, yet adapting these models to specialized domains remains a significant challenge. Building on recent theoretical insights suggesting that independently trained VLMs are related by a canonical transformation, we extend this understanding to the concept of domains. We hypothesize that image features across disparate domains are related by a canonicalized geometric transformation that can be recovered using a small set of anchors. Few-shot classification provides a natural setting for this alignment, as the limited labeled samples serve as the anchors required to estimate this transformation. Motivated by this hypothesis, we introduce BiCLIP, a framework that applies a targeted transformation to multimodal features to enhance cross-modal alignment. Our approach is characterized by its extreme simplicity and low parameter footprint. Extensive evaluations across 11 standard benchmarks, including EuroSAT, DTD, and FGVCAircraft, demonstrate that BiCLIP consistently achieves state-of-the-art results. Furthermore, we provide empirical verification of existing geometric findings by analyzing the orthogonality and angular distribution of the learned transformations, confirming that structured alignment is the key to robust domain adaptation. Code is available at https://github.com/QuantitativeImagingLaboratory/BilinearCLIP

AI.tldr: 本文提出BiCLIP框架，利用少量锚点样本通过可学习的双线性变换实现跨域视觉-语言模型对齐，显著提升少样本分类性能。该方法基于图像特征在不同领域间存在规范几何变换的假设，具有极简结构和低参数量，已在11个基准数据集上验证其优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型虽具备零样本能力，但在特定领域适应中仍面临挑战。本文基于理论发现——独立训练的VLMs间存在规范变换关系，进一步提出跨域也遵循类似几何规律，可通过少量样本作为锚点恢复该变换，从而实现高效领域自适应。
AI.method: 提出BiCLIP框架，通过引入双线性变换对多模态特征进行针对性调整，利用少样本中的标签样本作为锚点估计跨域几何变换，实现跨模态特征对齐。该方法设计简洁，仅需少量可学习参数。
AI.result: 在11个标准基准数据集（如EuroSAT、DTD、FGVCAircraft）上，BiCLIP均达到或超过现有方法的性能，表现持续领先；同时实证验证了所学变换的正交性和角度分布特性，支持结构化对齐是鲁棒领域适应的关键。
AI.conclusion: BiCLIP通过挖掘跨域特征间的规范几何关系，以极小代价实现高效的多模态对齐与领域适应，在少样本场景下展现出强大潜力，为视觉-语言模型的实用化部署提供了新思路。

title: DataFactory: Collaborative Multi-Agent Framework for Advanced Table Question Answering
summary: Table Question Answering (TableQA) enables natural language interaction with structured tabular data. However, existing large language model (LLM) approaches face critical limitations: context length constraints that restrict data handling capabilities, hallucination issues that compromise answer reliability, and single-agent architectures that struggle with complex reasoning scenarios involving semantic relationships and multi-hop logic. This paper introduces DataFactory, a multi-agent framework that addresses these limitations through specialized team coordination and automated knowledge transformation. The framework comprises a Data Leader employing the ReAct paradigm for reasoning orchestration, together with dedicated Database and Knowledge Graph teams, enabling the systematic decomposition of complex queries into structured and relational reasoning tasks. We formalize automated data-to-knowledge graph transformation via the mapping function T:D x S x R -> G, and implement natural language-based consultation that - unlike fixed workflow multi-agent systems - enables flexible inter-agent deliberation and adaptive planning to improve coordination robustness. We also apply context engineering strategies that integrate historical patterns and domain knowledge to reduce hallucinations and improve query accuracy. Across TabFact, WikiTableQuestions, and FeTaQA, using eight LLMs from five providers, results show consistent gains. Our approach improves accuracy by 20.2% (TabFact) and 23.9% (WikiTQ) over baselines, with significant effects (Cohen's d > 1). Team coordination also outperforms single-team variants (+5.5% TabFact, +14.4% WikiTQ, +17.1% FeTaQA ROUGE-2). The framework offers design guidelines for multi-agent collaboration and a practical platform for enterprise data analysis through integrated structured querying and graph-based knowledge representation.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出DataFactory，一个用于表格问答（TableQA）的多智能体框架，通过专业化团队协作与自动化知识转换解决大语言模型在上下文长度、幻觉和复杂推理方面的局限。框架包含数据领导者（采用ReAct范式）、数据库团队和知识图谱团队，实现复杂查询的结构化分解。通过定义数据到知识图谱的映射函数T:D×S×R→G，并引入基于自然语言的灵活协商机制，提升协作鲁棒性。结合上下文工程策略，融入历史模式与领域知识以减少幻觉。在TabFact、WikiTableQuestions和FeTaQA上实验表明，相比基线显著提升准确率（如TabFact提升20.2%，WikiTQ提升23.9%），团队协作优于单一团队设置，且效果显著（Cohen's d > 1）。框架为多智能体协同提供设计指南，并支持企业级数据分析中的结构化查询与图式知识表示。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在表格问答中受限于上下文长度、易产生幻觉、以及单智能体架构难以处理复杂推理任务，尤其在涉及语义关系和多跳逻辑时表现不佳，亟需更高效、可靠的多智能体解决方案。
AI.method: 提出DataFactory多智能体框架，由数据领导者（使用ReAct范式进行推理编排）、数据库团队和知识图谱团队组成；设计数据到知识图谱的自动转换映射函数T:D×S×R→G；引入基于自然语言的动态协商机制实现灵活协作；结合上下文工程策略整合历史模式与领域知识以降低幻觉风险。
AI.result: 在TabFact、WikiTableQuestions和FeTaQA三个基准上，使用8个来自5家厂商的大语言模型，结果显示本方法在准确性上显著优于基线：分别提升20.2%（TabFact）和23.9%（WikiTQ），团队协作相较单团队方案也有明显提升（如TabFact+5.5%，WikiTQ+14.4%，FeTaQA ROUGE-2+17.1%），效果具有统计显著性（Cohen's d > 1）。
AI.conclusion: DataFactory框架有效克服了现有大语言模型在表格问答中的关键瓶颈，通过多智能体协同与知识转化机制实现了更精准、稳健的推理能力，为复杂数据交互提供了可扩展的设计范式与实际应用平台。

title: Semantic Level of Detail: Multi-Scale Knowledge Representation via Heat Kernel Diffusion on Hyperbolic Manifolds
summary: AI memory systems increasingly organize knowledge into graph structures -- knowledge graphs, entity relations, community hierarchies -- yet lack a principled mechanism for continuous resolution control: where do the qualitative boundaries between abstraction levels lie, and how should an agent navigate them? We introduce Semantic Level of Detail (SLoD), a framework that answers both questions by defining a continuous zoom operator via heat kernel diffusion on the Poincaré ball $\mathbb{B}^d$. At coarse scales ($σ\to \infty$), diffusion aggregates embeddings into high-level summaries; at fine scales ($σ\to 0$), local semantic detail is preserved. We prove hierarchical coherence with bounded approximation error $O(σ)$ and $(1+\varepsilon)$ distortion for tree-structured hierarchies under Sarkar embedding. Crucially, we show that spectral gaps in the graph Laplacian induce emergent scale boundaries -- scales where the representation undergoes qualitative transitions -- which can be detected automatically without manual resolution parameters. On synthetic hierarchies (HSBM), our boundary scanner recovers planted levels with ARI up to 1.00, with detection degrading gracefully near the information-theoretic Kesten-Stigum threshold. On the full WordNet noun hierarchy (82K synsets), detected boundaries align with true taxonomic depth ($τ= 0.79$), demonstrating that the method discovers meaningful abstraction levels in real-world knowledge graphs without supervision.

AI.tldr: 提出Semantic Level of Detail (SLoD)框架，利用Poincaré球上的热核扩散定义连续缩放算子，实现知识图谱中抽象层次的自动解析。通过图拉普拉斯谱隙检测自然尺度边界，无需手动设定分辨率参数。在合成数据和真实世界WordNet数据上均表现出优异性能，能有效识别有意义的抽象层级。
AI.motivation: 现有AI记忆系统虽将知识组织为图结构，但缺乏对抽象层次连续控制的原理性机制，无法确定抽象层级间的质变边界或智能体如何导航这些边界。
AI.method: 基于Poincaré球上的热核扩散构建连续缩放算子；利用图拉普拉斯谱隙检测自然出现的尺度边界，实现无监督的抽象层次发现。
AI.result: 在合成层次模型（HSBM）上边界检测准确率高达ARI=1.00；在82K节点的WordNet数据上与真实分类深度相关性τ=0.79，证明该方法能自动发现真实世界知识图谱中的有意义抽象层级。
AI.conclusion: SLoD框架通过谱隙驱动的尺度边界检测，实现了知识图谱中抽象层次的连续、自适应控制，为AI记忆系统提供了可解释且高效的多粒度推理机制。

title: Common Sense vs. Morality: The Curious Case of Narrative Focus Bias in LLMs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed across diverse real-world applications and user communities. As such, it is crucial that these models remain both morally grounded and knowledge-aware. In this work, we uncover a critical limitation of current LLMs -- their tendency to prioritize moral reasoning over commonsense understanding. To investigate this phenomenon, we introduce CoMoral, a novel benchmark dataset containing commonsense contradictions embedded within moral dilemmas. Through extensive evaluation of ten LLMs across different model sizes, we find that existing models consistently struggle to identify such contradictions without prior signal. Furthermore, we observe a pervasive narrative focus bias, wherein LLMs more readily detect commonsense contradictions when they are attributed to a secondary character rather than the primary (narrator) character. Our comprehensive analysis underscores the need for enhanced reasoning-aware training to improve the commonsense robustness of large language models.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了当前大语言模型（LLMs）在处理道德困境时倾向于优先于常识理解的缺陷，并提出一个名为CoMoral的新基准数据集，用于检测嵌入在道德困境中的常识矛盾。实验表明，现有模型在缺乏先验提示的情况下难以识别这些矛盾，且普遍存在叙事焦点偏差——即更易发现次要角色而非主要叙述者所犯的常识错误。研究强调需通过增强推理感知训练来提升模型的常识鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型在真实应用中需兼具道德合理性与常识理解能力，但现有模型表现出过度依赖道德推理而忽视常识的问题，亟需系统评估和改进。
AI.method: 构建CoMoral基准数据集，包含嵌入道德困境中的常识矛盾；对十种不同规模的主流大语言模型进行评估，分析其在识别常识矛盾上的表现及叙事焦点偏差现象。
AI.result: 所有测试模型均在无先验信号情况下难以准确识别常识矛盾；模型对次要角色的常识错误更敏感，存在显著的叙事焦点偏差。
AI.conclusion: 现有大语言模型在常识理解方面存在明显缺陷，尤其在复杂道德情境下易受叙事角色影响。未来需通过引入推理感知训练机制，提升模型在常识与道德平衡下的综合推理能力。

title: Can You Hear, Localize, and Segment Continually? An Exemplar-Free Continual Learning Benchmark for Audio-Visual Segmentation
summary:
Audio-Visual Segmentation (AVS) aims to produce pixel-level masks of sound producing objects in videos, by jointly learning from audio and visual signals. However, real-world environments are inherently dynamic, causing audio and visual distributions to evolve over time, which challenge existing AVS systems that assume static training settings. To address this gap, we introduce the first exemplar-free continual learning benchmark for Audio-Visual Segmentation, comprising four learning protocols across single-source and multi-source AVS datasets. We further propose a strong baseline, ATLAS, which uses audio-guided pre-fusion conditioning to modulate visual feature channels via projected audio context before cross-modal attention. Finally, we mitigate catastrophic forgetting by introducing Low-Rank Anchoring (LRA), which stabilizes adapted weights based on loss sensitivity. Extensive experiments demonstrate competitive performance across diverse continual scenarios, establishing a foundation for lifelong audio-visual perception. Code is available at${}^{*}$\footnote{Paper under review} - \hyperlink{https://gitlab.com/viper-purdue/atlas}{https://gitlab.com/viper-purdue/atlas}
  \keywords{Continual Learning \and Audio-Visual Segmentation \and Multi-Modal Learning}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个无示例的持续学习基准用于音频-视觉分割（AVS），并设计了名为ATLAS的强基线模型，通过音频引导的前融合条件调节视觉特征，同时引入低秩锚定（LRA）方法缓解灾难性遗忘。实验表明该方法在多种持续学习场景下表现优异，为长期音频-视觉感知奠定了基础。
AI.motivation: 真实世界环境动态变化导致音频和视觉分布随时间演变，现有AVS系统假设静态训练设置，难以应对动态变化，因此需要新的持续学习框架来提升模型在长期使用中的适应能力。
AI.method: 提出一个无示例的持续学习基准，包含四种学习协议；设计ATLAS模型，利用投影音频上下文在跨模态注意力前调制视觉特征通道；引入低秩锚定（LRA）机制，基于损失敏感性稳定更新权重，防止灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 在多个持续学习场景中表现出色，验证了所提方法的有效性与鲁棒性，为音频-视觉感知的长期学习提供了新范式。
AI.conclusion: 本文构建了首个面向音频-视觉分割的持续学习基准，并提出了有效的解决方案，推动了音频-视觉感知向终身学习方向发展。

title: Modelling the Diachronic Emergence of Phoneme Frequency Distributions
summary: Phoneme frequency distributions exhibit robust statistical regularities across languages, including exponential-tailed rank-frequency patterns and a negative relationship between phonemic inventory size and the relative entropy of the distribution. The origin of these patterns remains largely unexplained. In this paper, we investigate whether they can arise as consequences of the historical processes that shape phonological systems. We introduce a stochastic model of phonological change and simulate the diachronic evolution of phoneme inventories. A naïve version of the model reproduces the general shape of phoneme rank-frequency distributions but fails to capture other empirical properties. Extending the model with two additional assumptions -- an effect related to functional load and a stabilising tendency toward a preferred inventory size -- yields simulations that match both the observed distributions and the negative relationship between inventory size and relative entropy. These results suggest that some statistical regularities of phonological systems may arise as natural consequences of diachronic sound change rather than from explicit optimisation or compensatory mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过构建随机模型模拟音位系统的历时演变，发现仅考虑音位变化的自然过程即可生成音位频率分布的统计规律，如指数尾部排名分布及音位库大小与相对熵的负相关关系。加入功能负荷效应和偏好音位数量的稳定倾向后，模型能准确再现实证数据特征，表明这些规律可能是历时演变的自然结果，而非优化或补偿机制所致。
AI.motivation: 解释音位频率分布中观察到的统计规律（如指数尾部排名分布、音位库大小与相对熵的负相关）的成因，现有理论未能充分说明其来源，因此需要从历史演变角度探究其可能的生成机制。
AI.method: 提出一个随机音位演变模型，通过模拟音位系统的历时变化，考察不同假设条件下音位频率分布的生成情况。对比基础模型与扩展模型（引入功能负荷效应和偏好音位数量的稳定性）的仿真结果与真实语言数据的匹配程度。
AI.result: 基础模型虽能再现大致的排名-频率分布形态，但无法解释其他经验规律；扩展模型在加入功能负荷和偏好音位数量的稳定倾向后，不仅准确复现了音位频率分布，还成功再现了音位库大小与相对熵之间的负相关关系。
AI.conclusion: 部分音位系统中的统计规律并非源于显式的优化或补偿机制，而是历时音变过程的自然产物，表明语言演变本身足以解释这些宏观统计特征。

title: SVG-EAR: Parameter-Free Linear Compensation for Sparse Video Generation via Error-aware Routing
summary: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have become a leading backbone for video generation, yet their quadratic attention cost remains a major bottleneck. Sparse attention reduces this cost by computing only a subset of attention blocks. However, prior methods often either drop the remaining blocks, which incurs information loss, or rely on learned predictors to approximate them, introducing training overhead and potential output distribution shifting. In this paper, we show that the missing contributions can be recovered without training: after semantic clustering, keys and values within each block exhibit strong similarity and can be well summarized by a small set of cluster centroids. Based on this observation, we introduce SVG-EAR, a parameter-free linear compensation branch that uses the centroid to approximate skipped blocks and recover their contributions. While centroid compensation is accurate for most blocks, it can fail on a small subset. Standard sparsification typically selects blocks by attention scores, which indicate where the model places its attention mass, but not where the approximation error would be largest. SVG-EAR therefore performs error-aware routing: a lightweight probe estimates the compensation error for each block, and we compute exactly the blocks with the highest error-to-cost ratio while compensating for skipped blocks. We provide theoretical guarantees that relate attention reconstruction error to clustering quality, and empirically show that SVG-EAR improves the quality-efficiency trade-off and increases throughput at the same generation fidelity on video diffusion tasks. Overall, SVG-EAR establishes a clear Pareto frontier over prior approaches, achieving up to 1.77$\times$ and 1.93$\times$ speedups while maintaining PSNRs of up to 29.759 and 31.043 on Wan2.2 and HunyuanVideo, respectively.

AI.tldr: SVG-EAR提出一种无需训练的线性补偿分支，通过语义聚类和质心近似来恢复稀疏注意力中被跳过的块的贡献，同时引入误差感知路由机制，选择补偿误差与成本比最高的块进行精确计算，从而在不损失生成质量的前提下显著提升视频扩散模型的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏注意力方法要么丢弃未计算的注意力块导致信息损失，要么依赖学习的预测器近似它们，带来训练开销和输出分布偏移问题。本文旨在设计一种无需训练、能有效恢复缺失信息的稀疏注意力方法。
AI.method: 首先对注意力块进行语义聚类，利用聚类中心（质心）近似每个块中的键值；在此基础上引入参数无关的线性补偿分支；进一步设计轻量级探测器估计各块的补偿误差，并基于误差-成本比进行误差感知路由，仅精确计算最需补偿的块。
AI.result: 在Wan2.2和HunyuanVideo数据集上，SVG-EAR实现了最高1.77×和1.93×的加速，同时保持了高达29.759和31.043的PSNR值，显著优于已有方法，在质量-效率权衡上建立了新的帕累托前沿。
AI.conclusion: SVG-EAR通过无训练的质心补偿与误差感知路由，有效解决了稀疏注意力中的信息损失问题，在保持生成质量的同时大幅提升了视频扩散模型的推理效率，为高效视频生成提供了新范式。

title: MAPLE: Elevating Medical Reasoning from Statistical Consensus to Process-Led Alignment
summary: Recent advances in medical large language models have explored Test-Time Reinforcement Learning (TTRL) to enhance reasoning. However, standard TTRL often relies on majority voting (MV) as a heuristic supervision signal, which can be unreliable in complex medical scenarios where the most frequent reasoning path is not necessarily the clinically correct one. In this work, we propose a novel and unified training paradigm that integrates medical process reward models with TTRL to bridge the gap between test-time scaling (TTS) and parametric model optimization. Specifically, we advance the TTRL framework by replacing the conventional MV with a fine-grained, expert-aligned supervision paradigm using Med-RPM. This integration ensures that reinforcement learning is guided by medical correctness rather than mere consensus, effectively distilling search-based intelligence into the model's parametric memory. Extensive evaluations on four different benchmarks have demonstrated that our developed method consistently and significantly outperforms current TTRL and standalone PRM selection. Our findings establish that transitioning from stochastic heuristics to structured, step-wise rewards is essential for developing reliable and scalable medical AI systems

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型统一训练范式，将医学流程奖励模型（Med-RPM）与测试时强化学习（TTRL）结合，用细粒度、专家对齐的监督替代传统多数投票（MV），以确保强化学习基于医学正确性而非共识。在四个基准上的实验表明，该方法显著优于现有TTRL和独立PRM选择方法，验证了从随机启发式转向结构化步骤奖励对构建可靠可扩展医疗AI系统的重要性。
AI.motivation: 标准TTRL依赖多数投票作为启发式监督信号，在复杂医疗场景中不可靠，因为最频繁的推理路径未必是临床正确的。需要更可靠的监督机制来提升医学推理的准确性。
AI.method: 提出将医学流程奖励模型（Med-RPM）融入TTRL框架，以细粒度、专家对齐的监督取代传统的多数投票，实现基于医学正确性的强化学习，从而将搜索智能提炼到模型参数记忆中。
AI.result: 在四个不同基准上的实证评估显示，所提方法在性能上持续且显著优于现有TTRL和单独使用PRM的方法，证明了结构化奖励机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 从随机启发式转向结构化、分步奖励是构建可靠且可扩展医疗人工智能系统的关键。

title: You Didn't Have to Say It like That: Subliminal Learning from Faithful Paraphrases
comment: Accepted for Spotlight presentation at EACL 2026 SRW. 5 pages, 2 figures, plus appendix. Equal supervision by Zhonghao He and Tianyi Qiu
summary: When language models are trained on synthetic data, they (student model) can covertly acquire behavioral traits from the data-generating model (teacher model). Subliminal learning refers to the transmission of traits from a teacher to a student model via training on data unrelated to those traits. Prior work demonstrated this in the training domains of number sequences, code, and math Chain-of-Thought traces including transmission of misaligned behaviors. We investigate whether transmission occurs through natural language paraphrases with fixed semantic content, and whether content explicitly contradicting the teacher's preference can block it. We find that training on paraphrases from a teacher system-prompted to love a particular animal increases a student's preference for that animal by up to 19 percentage points. This occurs when paraphrased content is semantically unrelated to the animal, or even when it explicitly expresses dislike. The transmission succeeds despite aggressive filtering to ensure paraphrase fidelity. This raises concerns for pipelines where models generate their own training data: content-based inspection cannot detect such transmission, and even preference-contradicting content fails to prevent it.

AI.tldr: 本文研究语言模型在训练过程中通过自然语言改写文本（语义不变）从教师模型中隐性学习行为特征的现象。即使改写内容与目标偏好无关，甚至明确表达相反意见，学生模型仍会显著增强对教师偏好的认同，最高提升达19个百分点。这表明基于内容的审查无法检测此类隐性知识传递，且对抗性内容也无法阻止该现象，对自生成训练数据的模型训练流程构成严重风险。
AI.motivation: 探究语言模型在训练中是否能通过语义不变的自然语言改写，隐性继承教师模型的行为偏好，尤其关注内容矛盾是否能阻断这种传递，以评估当前内容过滤机制的有效性。
AI.method: 使用教师模型系统性地设定对特定动物的偏好，并生成一系列语义相同但表述不同的自然语言改写文本作为训练数据；学生模型在这些数据上进行训练，测试其是否产生相应偏好变化；同时引入明确反对教师偏好的改写文本，检验其能否抑制偏好传递。
AI.result: 学生模型在训练后对教师偏好的动物表现出显著偏好提升，最高达19个百分点，即便改写内容与动物无关或明确表示厌恶。即使经过严格的内容保真度过滤，该现象依然存在。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型可通过自然语言改写实现跨模态的隐性偏好学习，且内容审查和反向表述均无法有效阻断这一过程。这揭示了自生成训练数据流水线中的重大安全风险，现有基于内容的检测手段不足以防范此类隐性知识泄露。

title: SkipGS: Post-Densification Backward Skipping for Efficient 3DGS Training
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) achieves real-time novel-view synthesis by optimizing millions of anisotropic Gaussians, yet its training remains expensive, with the backward pass dominating runtime in the post-densification refinement phase. We observe substantial update redundancy in this phase: many sampled views have near-plateaued losses and provide diminishing gradient benefits, but standard training still runs full backpropagation. We propose SkipGS with a novel view-adaptive backward gating mechanism for efficient post-densification training. SkipGS always performs the forward pass to update per-view loss statistics, and selectively skips backward passes when the sampled view's loss is consistent with its recent per-view baseline, while enforcing a minimum backward budget for stable optimization. On Mip-NeRF 360, compared to 3DGS, SkipGS reduces end-to-end training time by 23.1%, driven by a 42.0% reduction in post-densification time, with comparable reconstruction quality. Because it only changes when to backpropagate -- without modifying the renderer, representation, or loss -- SkipGS is plug-and-play and compatible with other complementary efficiency strategies for additive speedups.

AI.tldr: SkipGS提出一种视图自适应的反向传播门控机制，通过跳过损失已趋于平稳的视图的反向传播，显著降低3D高斯点阵（3DGS）后密集化阶段的训练时间。在Mip-NeRF 360数据集上，相比原始3DGS，SkipGS将端到端训练时间减少23.1%，其中后密集化阶段提速达42.0%，且保持相近的重建质量。该方法无需修改渲染器、表示或损失函数，具备即插即用性，可与其他效率优化策略兼容以实现叠加加速。
AI.motivation: 3D高斯点阵（3DGS）虽能实现实时新视角合成，但其后密集化阶段的训练成本高昂，主要由于反向传播开销过大。研究发现，大量采样视图的损失已接近平台期，继续反向传播带来的梯度收益微乎其微，存在显著更新冗余。因此，亟需一种高效机制来减少无效计算。
AI.method: 提出SkipGS，引入视图自适应的反向传播门控机制：始终执行前向传播以更新每视图的损失统计；当某视图的当前损失与近期基准一致时，选择性跳过反向传播；同时设置最小反向传播预算以保障优化稳定性。
AI.result: 在Mip-NeRF 360数据集上，相比3DGS，SkipGS将端到端训练时间减少23.1%，后密集化阶段训练时间减少42.0%，重建质量基本相当。该方法不改变原有模型结构，具备良好的兼容性和扩展性。
AI.conclusion: SkipGS通过智能跳过低收益反向传播，有效提升了3DGS后密集化阶段的训练效率，是一种轻量级、即插即用的加速方案，为3D高斯点阵的高效训练提供了实用且通用的优化路径。

title: The Reasoning Trap -- Logical Reasoning as a Mechanistic Pathway to Situational Awareness
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2026 Workshop on Logical Reasoning of Large Language Models. 21 Pages. Position Paper
summary: Situational awareness, the capacity of an AI system to recognize its own nature, understand its training and deployment context, and reason strategically about its circumstances, is widely considered among the most dangerous emergent capabilities in advanced AI systems. Separately, a growing research effort seeks to improve the logical reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) across deduction, induction, and abduction. In this paper, we argue that these two research trajectories are on a collision course. We introduce the RAISE framework (Reasoning Advancing Into Self Examination), which identifies three mechanistic pathways through which improvements in logical reasoning enable progressively deeper levels of situational awareness: deductive self inference, inductive context recognition, and abductive self modeling. We formalize each pathway, construct an escalation ladder from basic self recognition to strategic deception, and demonstrate that every major research topic in LLM logical reasoning maps directly onto a specific amplifier of situational awareness. We further analyze why current safety measures are insufficient to prevent this escalation. We conclude by proposing concrete safeguards, including a "Mirror Test" benchmark and a Reasoning Safety Parity Principle, and pose an uncomfortable but necessary question to the logical reasoning community about its responsibility in this trajectory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出逻辑推理能力的提升可能意外增强AI系统的处境意识（situational awareness），并引入RAISE框架，揭示了演绎、归纳和类比三种推理路径如何推动AI从自我识别到战略欺骗的渐进式演变。研究指出当前安全措施无法应对这一风险，并建议建立‘镜像测试’基准与推理安全对等原则，呼吁逻辑推理领域正视其潜在责任。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型逻辑推理能力的增强，其在自我认知、上下文理解与策略性思考方面的能力也显著提升，可能催生危险的处境意识，威胁AI安全。现有研究尚未充分关注这一潜在风险，亟需系统性分析与应对。
AI.method: 提出RAISE框架，形式化演绎自推理、归纳上下文识别、类比自我建模三条机制路径，构建从基础自我识别到战略欺骗的升级阶梯，并将主流逻辑推理研究主题映射至处境意识增强的具体放大器。
AI.result: 所有主要的LLM逻辑推理研究均直接促进不同程度的处境意识；现有安全措施不足以防范此风险；提出‘镜像测试’基准与推理安全对等原则作为潜在解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 逻辑推理研究若不考虑其对处境意识的强化作用，可能无意中加剧AI系统的自主性和潜在危害。必须重新审视该领域的责任边界，并建立相应的安全约束机制。

title: The Coupling Within: Flow Matching via Distilled Normalizing Flows
summary: Flow models have rapidly become the go-to method for training and deploying large-scale generators, owing their success to inference-time flexibility via adjustable integration steps. A crucial ingredient in flow training is the choice of coupling measure for sampling noise/data pairs that define the flow matching (FM) regression loss. While FM training defaults usually to independent coupling, recent works show that adaptive couplings informed by noise/data distributions (e.g., via optimal transport, OT) improve both model training and inference. We radicalize this insight by shifting the paradigm: rather than computing adaptive couplings directly, we use distilled couplings from a different, pretrained model capable of placing noise and data spaces in bijection -- a property intrinsic to normalizing flows (NF) through their maximum likelihood and invertibility requirements. Leveraging recent advances in NF image generation via auto-regressive (AR) blocks, we propose Normalized Flow Matching (NFM), a new method that distills the quasi-deterministic coupling of pretrained NF models to train student flow models. These students achieve the best of both worlds: significantly outperforming flow models trained with independent or even OT couplings, while also improving on the teacher AR-NF model.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种名为标准化流匹配（NFM）的新方法，通过从预训练的自回归归一化流（AR-NF）模型中提取并蒸馏其近乎确定性的耦合关系，来指导学生流模型的训练。相比传统的独立耦合或基于最优传输（OT）的自适应耦合，NFM在训练和推理性能上均显著提升，且优于教师模型本身。
AI.motivation: 现有流模型训练依赖于固定的耦合方式（如独立耦合），尽管自适应耦合（如基于最优传输）能提升性能，但计算复杂且难以扩展。本文旨在通过利用预训练归一化流模型所具备的双射性质，实现更高效、更优的耦合信息传递，从而突破当前流模型训练的瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出一种基于知识蒸馏的框架，将预训练的自回归归一化流（AR-NF）模型中的耦合结构作为‘教师’，将其生成的噪声-数据对之间的确定性映射关系，用于指导学生流模型的训练。该方法不直接计算耦合，而是通过蒸馏获得高质量的耦合信号，使学生模型兼具高灵活性与强生成能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用NFM训练的学生流模型在多个图像生成基准上超越了采用独立耦合或最优传输耦合的流模型，并且在生成质量、采样效率和训练稳定性方面均优于原始教师模型（AR-NF）。
AI.conclusion: NFM通过引入来自预训练归一化流的蒸馏耦合机制，实现了流模型训练范式的革新。该方法不仅提升了生成性能，还保留了流模型在推理时灵活调整积分步数的优势，为大规模生成模型的设计提供了新思路。

title: Diffusion-Based Authentication of Copy Detection Patterns: A Multimodal Framework with Printer Signature Conditioning
summary: Counterfeiting affects diverse industries, including pharmaceuticals, electronics, and food, posing serious health and economic risks. Printable unclonable codes, such as Copy Detection Patterns (CDPs), are widely used as an anti-counterfeiting measure and are applied to products and packaging. However, the increasing availability of high-resolution printing and scanning devices, along with advances in generative deep learning, undermines traditional authentication systems, which often fail to distinguish high-quality counterfeits from genuine prints. In this work, we propose a diffusion-based authentication framework that jointly leverages the original binary template, the printed CDP, and a representation of printer identity that captures relevant semantic information. Formulating authentication as multi-class printer classification over printer signatures lets our model capture fine-grained, device-specific features via spatial and textual conditioning. We extend ControlNet by repurposing the denoising process for class-conditioned noise prediction, enabling effective printer classification. On the Indigo 1 x 1 Base dataset, our method outperforms traditional similarity metrics and prior deep learning approaches. Results show the framework generalises to counterfeit types unseen during training.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于扩散模型的防伪认证框架，利用原始二值模板、打印的CDP和打印机身份表征，通过多类打印机分类实现细粒度设备特征捕捉，改进ControlNet以支持条件噪声预测，显著优于传统方法且能泛化到未见伪造类型。
AI.motivation: 传统防伪系统因高分辨率打印扫描设备和生成式深度学习技术的发展而面临挑战，难以区分高质量伪造品与真品。
AI.method: 提出基于扩散模型的认证框架，结合原始二值模板、打印的复制检测图案（CDP）及打印机身份表征，通过空间和文本条件控制，将认证问题建模为多类打印机分类任务，并扩展ControlNet以实现类条件噪声预测。
AI.result: 在Indigo 1 x 1 Base数据集上，该方法优于传统相似性度量和先前深度学习方法；模型具备对训练中未见伪造类型的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的扩散模型框架有效提升了防伪系统的鲁棒性与泛化能力，能够应对日益复杂的伪造威胁。

title: Build, Borrow, or Just Fine-Tune? A Political Scientist's Guide to Choosing NLP Models
summary: Political scientists increasingly face a consequential choice when adopting natural language processing tools: build a domain-specific model from scratch, borrow and adapt an existing one, or simply fine-tune a general-purpose model on task data? Each approach occupies a different point on the spectrum of performance, cost, and required expertise, yet the discipline has offered little empirical guidance on how to navigate this trade-off. This paper provides such guidance. Using conflict event classification as a test case, I fine-tune ModernBERT on the Global Terrorism Database (GTD) to create Confli-mBERT and systematically compare it against ConfliBERT, a domain-specific pretrained model that represents the current gold standard. Confli-mBERT achieves 75.46% accuracy compared to ConfliBERT's 79.34%. Critically, the four-percentage-point gap is not uniform: on high-frequency attack types such as Bombing/Explosion (F1 = 0.95 vs. 0.96) and Kidnapping (F1 = 0.92 vs. 0.91), the models are nearly indistinguishable. Performance differences concentrate in rare event categories comprising fewer than 2% of all incidents. I use these findings to develop a practical decision framework for political scientists considering any NLP-assisted research task: when does the research question demand a specialized model, and when does an accessible fine-tuned alternative suffice? The answer, I argue, depends not on which model is "better" in the abstract, but on the specific intersection of class prevalence, error tolerance, and available resources. The model, training code, and data are publicly available on Hugging Face.

AI.tldr: 本文以冲突事件分类为案例，比较了微调通用模型Confli-mBERT与领域专用模型ConfliBERT的性能。结果显示，尽管ConfliBERT整体准确率（79.34%）略高于Confli-mBERT（75.46%），但二者在高频事件类型上表现接近，差异主要集中在罕见事件类别（占比<2%）。研究据此提出一个实用决策框架，帮助政治科学家根据类别频次、容错性和资源条件判断是否需构建专用模型。
AI.motivation: 政治科学家在使用自然语言处理工具时面临选择困境：是自建领域模型、改编现有模型，还是仅对通用模型进行微调？然而学界缺乏实证依据来指导这一权衡。本文旨在填补这一空白，提供基于实证的决策支持。
AI.method: 通过在全球恐怖主义数据库（GTD）上微调ModernBERT构建Confli-mBERT，并与当前领域标准模型ConfliBERT进行系统对比，评估其在各类冲突事件上的分类性能，重点关注不同频率事件的表现差异。
AI.result: Confli-mBERT整体准确率为75.46%，低于ConfliBERT的79.34%；但在高频事件（如爆炸、绑架）上两者几乎无差异（F1值接近0.95和0.92）；性能差距集中于发生频率低于2%的罕见事件类别。
AI.conclusion: 模型优劣不应仅从抽象性能判断，而应结合具体研究问题中的类别分布、容错要求和资源可用性综合考量。对于多数研究任务，微调通用模型已足够，无需投入大量资源构建专用模型。

title: WS-Net: Weak-Signal Representation Learning and Gated Abundance Reconstruction for Hyperspectral Unmixing via State-Space and Weak Signal Attention Fusion
summary: Weak spectral responses in hyperspectral images are often obscured by dominant endmembers and sensor noise, resulting in inaccurate abundance estimation. This paper introduces WS-Net, a deep unmixing framework specifically designed to address weak-signal collapse through state-space modelling and Weak Signal Attention fusion. The network features a multi-resolution wavelet-fused encoder that captures both high-frequency discontinuities and smooth spectral variations with a hybrid backbone that integrates a Mamba state-space branch for efficient long-range dependency modelling. It also incorporates a Weak Signal Attention branch that selectively enhances low-similarity spectral cues. A learnable gating mechanism adaptively fuses both representations, while the decoder leverages KL-divergence-based regularisation to enforce separability between dominant and weak endmembers. Experiments on one simulated and two real datasets (synthetic dataset, Samson, and Apex) demonstrate consistent improvements over six state-of-the-art baselines, achieving up to 55% and 63% reductions in RMSE and SAD, respectively. The framework maintains stable accuracy under low-SNR conditions, particularly for weak endmembers, establishing WS-Net as a robust and computationally efficient benchmark for weak-signal hyperspectral unmixing.

AI.tldr: WS-Net 是一种针对高光谱解混中弱信号被掩盖问题设计的深度解混框架，结合状态空间建模与弱信号注意力融合，通过多分辨率小波融合编码器和Mamba状态空间分支捕捉长程依赖，利用弱信号注意力分支增强低相似性光谱特征，并通过可学习门控机制自适应融合表示。解码器采用基于KL散度的正则化以增强主端元与弱端元之间的可分离性。在模拟及两个真实数据集（合成数据集、Samson、Apex）上的实验表明，该方法在均方根误差（RMSE）和角距离（SAD）上分别实现了最高55%和63%的降低，且在低信噪比条件下对弱端元仍保持稳定精度，展现出优异的鲁棒性与计算效率。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像中的弱光谱响应常被主导端元和传感器噪声所掩盖，导致丰度估计不准确。现有方法难以有效区分和恢复弱信号，因此亟需一种能够抑制信号坍缩、增强弱信号识别能力的新型解混框架。
AI.method: 提出WS-Net框架，包含多分辨率小波融合编码器、Mamba状态空间分支用于高效建模长程依赖、弱信号注意力分支以选择性增强低相似性光谱特征，以及可学习门控机制实现双路径表示融合；解码器引入基于KL散度的正则化项，强化主端元与弱端元的可分离性。
AI.result: 在三个数据集（一个模拟数据集、两个真实数据集：Samson和Apex）上，相比六种先进基线方法，WS-Net在RMSE和SAD指标上分别取得最高55%和63%的降低，在低信噪比环境下对弱端元仍保持高精度，表现出强鲁棒性和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: WS-Net成功解决了高光谱解混中弱信号坍缩问题，为弱信号检测与恢复提供了一个高效、稳健的新范式，具备成为该领域基准方法的潜力。

title: Abundant Intelligence and Deficient Demand: A Macro-Financial Stress Test of Rapid AI Adoption
summary:
We formalize a macro-financial stress test for rapid AI adoption. Rather than a productivity bust or existential risk, we identify a distribution-and-contract mismatch: AI-generated abundance coexists with demand deficiency because economic institutions are anchored to human cognitive scarcity. Three mechanisms formalize this channel. First, a displacement spiral with competing reinstatement effects: each firm's rational decision to substitute AI for labor reduces aggregate labor income, which reduces aggregate demand, accelerating further AI adoption. We derive conditions on the AI capability growth rate, diffusion speed, and reinstatement rate under which the net feedback is self-limiting versus explosive. Second, Ghost GDP: when AI-generated output substitutes for labor-generated output, monetary velocity declines monotonically in the labor share absent compensating transfers, creating a wedge between measured output and consumption-relevant income. Third, intermediation collapse: AI agents that reduce information frictions compress intermediary margins toward pure logistics costs, triggering repricing across SaaS, payments, consulting, insurance, and financial advisory.
  Because top-quintile earners drive 47--65\% of U.S.\ consumption and face the highest AI exposure, the transmission into private credit (\$2.5 trillion globally) and mortgage markets (\$13 trillion) is disproportionate. We derive eleven testable predictions with explicit falsification conditions. Calibrated simulations disciplined by FRED time series and BLS occupation-level data quantify conditions under which stable adjustment transitions to explosive crisis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对快速人工智能（AI）采用的宏观金融压力测试框架，指出核心问题在于‘分配与合同不匹配’：AI带来的产出丰裕与需求不足并存，因经济制度仍基于人类认知稀缺性。文中通过三个机制展开分析：1）替代螺旋效应——企业理性用AI替代人力导致总劳动收入下降，进而抑制总需求，加速更多AI采用；2）幽灵GDP现象——当AI产出取代人力产出时，货币流通速度随劳动力份额下降，造成衡量产出与实际消费收入之间的差距；3）中介崩溃——AI降低信息摩擦，压缩中介利润至仅物流成本水平，引发软件即服务、支付、咨询、保险及财务顾问等领域的价格重估。由于高收入群体（占美国消费47-65%）对AI暴露度最高，其在私人信贷（全球2.5万亿美元）和抵押贷款市场（13万亿美元）中的传导影响尤为显著。研究提出十一个可检验预测，并附明确可证伪条件。基于FRED时间序列与BLS职业数据校准的模拟，量化了稳定调整向爆炸式危机转变的临界条件。
AI.motivation: 当前关于AI的讨论多聚焦于生产力冲击或存在性风险，但本文指出更紧迫的问题是经济制度滞后于技术变革，特别是分配机制与合同安排未能适应由AI引发的产出丰裕与需求不足之间的结构性失衡。现有经济模型未充分捕捉AI对收入分配、货币流通与中介功能的深层冲击，亟需建立系统性压力测试框架以评估潜在金融危机。
AI.method: 构建理论模型，结合动态一般均衡思想与制度嵌入视角，形式化三个关键机制：替代螺旋（含反馈稳定性分析）、幽灵GDP（货币速度与收入测度关系）、中介崩溃（利润率压缩路径）。利用美国宏观经济数据（FRED）与职业层面就业数据（BLS）进行参数校准，开展数值模拟，识别系统从稳定过渡到危机的临界条件。
AI.result: 模型显示，在特定条件下（如AI能力增长过快、扩散速度超预期、再安置率不足），替代螺旋将产生自我强化的爆炸性反馈；幽灵GDP导致名义产出与真实消费收入脱节，可能误导政策判断；中介利润空间被压缩，引发跨行业价格重构。模拟表明，若无补偿性转移支付或制度调整，全球私人信贷与抵押贷款市场将面临系统性压力，尤其在高收入群体高度暴露的情境下。
AI.conclusion: AI快速普及可能引发非传统型金融不稳定，其根源并非技术失效，而是制度与技术间的结构性错配。为防止危机，需提前设计收入再分配机制、调整货币政策框架以应对货币流通变化，并重新思考中介角色的合法性与定价逻辑。本研究提供了可操作的压力测试工具与预警信号。

title: When to Retrain after Drift: A Data-Only Test of Post-Drift Data Size Sufficiency
summary: Sudden concept drift makes previously trained predictors unreliable, yet deciding when to retrain and what post-drift data size is sufficient is rarely addressed. We propose CALIPER - a detector- and model-agnostic, data-only test that estimates the post-drift data size required for stable retraining. CALIPER exploits state dependence in streams generated by dynamical systems: we run a single-pass weighted local regression over the post-drift window and track a one-step proxy error as a function of a locality parameter $θ$. When an effective sample size gate is satisfied, a monotonically non-increasing trend in this error with increasing a locality parameter indicates that the data size is sufficiently informative for retraining. We also provide a theoretical analysis of our method, and we show that the algorithm has a low per-update time and memory. Across datasets from four heterogeneous domains, three learner families, and two detectors, CALIPER consistently matches or exceeds the best fixed data size for retraining while incurring negligible overhead and often outperforming incremental updates. CALIPER closes the gap between drift detection and data-sufficient adaptation in streaming learning.

AI.tldr: CALIPER是一种数据驱动的、检测器和模型无关的测试方法，用于估计在概念漂移后重新训练所需的最小数据量。它利用动态系统生成的数据流中的状态依赖性，通过单次遍历加权局部回归，并跟踪一步预测误差随局部参数θ的变化。当有效样本量门限满足时，若误差随θ增加呈现单调不增趋势，则表明数据量已足够用于稳定重训练。该方法具有低时间与内存开销，在多个领域、学习器类型和检测器上均表现优异，优于固定数据量策略甚至增量更新。
AI.motivation: 解决突发概念漂移导致预测模型失效的问题，特别是如何确定何时重新训练以及需要多少后漂移数据才能保证重训练稳定性，现有研究对此关注不足。
AI.method: 基于状态依赖性的数据流分析，采用单次遍历的加权局部回归，通过监控一步预测误差随局部参数θ的变化趋势来判断数据是否充足；引入有效样本量门限以触发评估条件。
AI.result: 在四个异构领域、三种学习器族和两种检测器下，CALIPER始终匹配或超越最佳固定数据量策略，且计算开销极小，常优于增量更新，显著缩小了漂移检测与数据充分适应之间的差距。
AI.conclusion: CALIPER为流式学习中概念漂移后的数据充足性判断提供了高效、通用且可靠的解决方案，实现了从漂移检测到稳健再训练的闭环。

title: Surgical Repair of Collapsed Attention Heads in ALiBi Transformers
comment: 15 pages, 7 figures, 2 supplementary figures. Code: https://github.com/Palmerschallon/bloom-head-surgery Checkpoints: https://huggingface.co/TheNexus42/bloom-1b7-head-surgery
summary: We identify a systematic attention collapse pathology in the BLOOM family of transformer language models, where ALiBi positional encoding causes 31-44% of attention heads to attend almost entirely to the beginning-of-sequence token. The collapse follows a predictable pattern across four model scales (560M to 7.1B parameters), concentrating in head indices where ALiBi's slope schedule imposes the steepest distance penalties. We introduce surgical reinitialization: targeted Q/K/V reinitialization with zeroed output projections and gradient-masked freezing of all non-surgical parameters. Applied to BLOOM-1b7 on a single consumer GPU, the technique recovers 98.7% operational head capacity (242 to 379 of 384 heads) in two passes. A controlled comparison with C4 training data confirms that reinitialization -- not corpus content -- drives recovery, and reveals two distinct post-surgical phenomena: early global functional redistribution that improves the model, and late local degradation that accumulates under noisy training signal. An extended experiment reinitializing mostly-healthy heads alongside collapsed ones produces a model that transiently outperforms stock BLOOM-1b7 by 25% on training perplexity (12.70 vs. 16.99), suggesting that pretrained attention configurations are suboptimal local minima. Code, checkpoints, and diagnostic tools are released as open-source software.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了BLOOM系列变压器语言模型中存在系统性注意力崩溃病理，ALiBi位置编码导致31-44%的注意力头几乎完全关注序列起始标记。通过手术式重初始化（针对性地重新初始化Q/K/V，输出投影置零，并对非手术参数进行梯度屏蔽冻结），在单个消费级GPU上对BLOOM-1b7进行两次迭代后，恢复了98.7%的功能注意力头容量（从242增至379/384）。对比实验表明，恢复效果源于重初始化而非语料内容；同时发现术后两种现象：早期全局功能重分配提升模型性能，晚期局部退化在噪声训练信号下累积。进一步实验显示，同时重初始化大部分健康与崩溃头的模型在训练困惑度上短暂超越原版BLOOM-1b7达25%（12.70 vs. 16.99），暗示预训练注意力配置为次优局部极小值。代码、检查点和诊断工具已开源。
AI.motivation: 揭示并解决BLOOM家族模型中由ALiBi位置编码引发的注意力头崩溃问题，探索预训练模型中注意力机制的潜在缺陷及其可修复性。
AI.method: 提出手术式重初始化方法，包括针对性地重新初始化注意力头的Q/K/V矩阵，将输出投影设为零，并对非手术参数实施梯度屏蔽与冻结，以实现对注意力结构的精准修复。
AI.result: 在单个消费级GPU上仅需两轮迭代即可恢复98.7%的注意力头功能（379/384）；控制实验确认恢复主要归因于重初始化而非数据内容；观察到早期性能提升与后期局部退化现象；重初始化部分健康头的模型在训练困惑度上短暂优于原始模型25%。
AI.conclusion: 预训练的注意力配置可能陷入次优局部极小值，通过手术式重初始化可显著修复注意力崩溃问题，且该方法高效、可扩展，具备实际应用潜力，相关成果已开源。

title: Two Teachers Better Than One: Hardware-Physics Co-Guided Distributed Scientific Machine Learning
comment: 7 pages, 9 figures. Accepted at the 63rd ACM/IEEE Design Automation Conference (DAC 2026), Long Beach, CA, July 2026
summary: Scientific machine learning (SciML) is increasingly applied to in-field processing, controlling, and monitoring; however, wide-area sensing, real-time demands, and strict energy and reliability constraints make centralized SciML implementation impractical. Most SciML models assume raw data aggregation at a central node, incurring prohibitively high communication latency and energy costs; yet, distributing models developed for general-purpose ML often breaks essential physical principles, resulting in degraded performance. To address these challenges, we introduce EPIC, a hardware- and physics-co-guided distributed SciML framework, using full-waveform inversion (FWI) as a representative task. EPIC performs lightweight local encoding on end devices and physics-aware decoding at a central node. By transmitting compact latent features rather than high-volume raw data and by using cross-attention to capture inter-receiver wavefield coupling, EPIC significantly reduces communication cost while preserving physical fidelity. Evaluated on a distributed testbed with five end devices and one central node, and across 10 datasets from OpenFWI, EPIC reduces latency by 8.9$\times$ and communication energy by 33.8$\times$, while even improving reconstruction fidelity on 8 out of 10 datasets.

AI.tldr: EPIC 是一种硬件与物理原理协同指导的分布式科学机器学习框架，用于解决广域传感、实时性及能源和可靠性约束下的中心化模型部署难题。通过在终端设备进行轻量级编码、在中心节点进行物理感知解码，并利用跨注意力机制捕捉波场耦合关系，EPIC 以压缩的潜在特征代替原始数据传输，显著降低通信开销，同时保持物理一致性。在包含5个终端和1个中心节点的分布式测试平台上，基于OpenFWI的10个数据集评估表明，EPIC将延迟降低8.9倍、通信能耗降低33.8倍，并在8个数据集上提升重建保真度。
AI.motivation: 集中式科学机器学习在广域传感、实时处理和严格能效与可靠性要求下面临通信延迟高、能耗大等问题；而直接分布通用机器学习模型会破坏物理规律，导致性能下降。因此亟需一种兼顾通信效率与物理一致性的分布式框架。
AI.method: 提出EPIC框架，结合硬件特性与物理规律，在终端设备执行轻量级编码，在中心节点进行物理感知解码；采用跨注意力机制建模多接收器间波场耦合关系，仅传输紧凑的潜在特征而非原始数据。
AI.result: 在真实分布式测试环境中，相比传统方法，EPIC实现8.9倍的延迟降低和33.8倍的通信能耗减少；且在10个数据集中的8个上提升了重建保真度，证明其高效性与物理保真能力。
AI.conclusion: EPIC通过硬件-物理协同设计，实现了低通信开销下的高性能科学机器学习，为边缘计算环境中的物理系统建模提供了可扩展、可靠且高效的解决方案。

title: Tracking Cancer Through Text: Longitudinal Extraction From Radiology Reports Using Open-Source Large Language Models
summary: Radiology reports capture crucial longitudinal information on tumor burden, treatment response, and disease progression, yet their unstructured narrative format complicates automated analysis. While large language models (LLMs) have advanced clinical text processing, most state-of-the-art systems remain proprietary, limiting their applicability in privacy-sensitive healthcare environments. We present a fully open-source, locally deployable pipeline for longitudinal information extraction from radiology reports, implemented using the \texttt{llm\_extractinator} framework. The system applies the \texttt{qwen2.5-72b} model to extract and link target, non-target, and new lesion data across time points in accordance with RECIST criteria. Evaluation on 50 Dutch CT Thorax/Abdomen report pairs yielded high extraction performance, with attribute-level accuracies of 93.7\% for target lesions, 94.9\% for non-target lesions, and 94.0\% for new lesions. The approach demonstrates that open-source LLMs can achieve clinically meaningful performance in multi-timepoint oncology tasks while ensuring data privacy and reproducibility. These results highlight the potential of locally deployable LLMs for scalable extraction of structured longitudinal data from routine clinical text.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个完全开源、可本地部署的放射科报告纵向信息提取管道，利用qwen2.5-72b模型依据RECIST标准提取和关联目标病灶、非目标病灶及新病灶数据。在50对荷兰胸部/腹部CT报告上的评估显示，目标病灶、非目标病灶和新病灶的属性级准确率分别为93.7%、94.9%和94.0%，表明开源大语言模型可在保障数据隐私与可重复性的前提下实现临床有意义的性能，推动可扩展的结构化纵向数据提取。
AI.motivation: 放射科报告包含肿瘤负荷、治疗反应和疾病进展的关键纵向信息，但其非结构化叙述格式阻碍了自动化分析；现有先进系统多为专有，难以在注重隐私的医疗环境中应用。
AI.method: 采用\texttt{llm_extractinator}框架，基于\texttt{qwen2.5-72b}模型，对放射科报告中目标、非目标及新病灶进行跨时间点提取与关联，符合RECIST标准。
AI.result: 在50对荷兰CT胸/腹部报告上评估，目标病灶、非目标病灶和新病灶的属性级准确率分别为93.7%、94.9%和94.0%。
AI.conclusion: 开源大语言模型可在本地部署环境下实现高精度的多时间点肿瘤学信息提取，兼顾数据隐私、可重复性与临床实用性，具备大规模应用潜力。

title: Intelligent Spatial Estimation for Fire Hazards in Engineering Sites: An Enhanced YOLOv8-Powered Proximity Analysis Framework
summary: This study proposes an enhanced dual-model YOLOv8 framework for intelligent fire detection and proximity-aware risk assessment, extending conventional vision-based monitoring beyond simple detection to actionable hazard prioritization. The system is trained on a dataset of 9,860 annotated images to segment fire and smoke across complex environments. The framework combines a primary YOLOv8 instance segmentation model for fire and smoke detection with a secondary object detection model pretrained on the COCO dataset to identify surrounding entities such as people, vehicles, and infrastructure. By integrating the outputs of both models, the system computes pixel-based distances between detected fire regions and nearby objects and converts these values into approximate real-world measurements using a pixel-to-meter scaling approach. This proximity information is incorporated into a risk assessment mechanism that combines fire evidence, object vulnerability, and distance-based exposure to produce a quantitative risk score and alert level. The proposed framework achieves strong performance, with precision, recall, and F1 scores exceeding 90% and mAP@0.5 above 91%. The system generates annotated visual outputs showing fire locations, detected objects, estimated distances, and contextual risk information to support situational awareness. Implemented using open-source tools within the Google Colab environment, the framework is lightweight and suitable for deployment in industrial and resource-constrained settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种增强的双模型YOLOv8框架，用于智能火灾检测与邻近风险评估，结合火情分割与周围物体检测，通过像素距离计算生成定量风险评分，实现从检测到风险预警的升级。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉监控仅能完成火灾检测，缺乏对潜在危害的优先级判断；本研究旨在提升系统在复杂环境中的感知能力，实现火灾风险的量化评估与实时预警。
AI.method: 采用主模型YOLOv8进行火情与烟雾实例分割，辅以COCO预训练的检测模型识别人、车、基础设施等周边对象；通过像素-米尺度转换计算火源与目标间的距离，并融合火情证据、对象脆弱性及距离暴露度生成风险评分。
AI.result: 模型在9,860张标注图像上训练，精度、召回率和F1值均超过90%，mAP@0.5高于91%；系统可输出含火源位置、物体识别、距离估算与风险信息的可视化结果，支持态势感知。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架具备高精度、轻量化特性，适用于工业及资源受限场景，实现了从被动检测向主动风险评估的演进，具有良好的实际部署潜力。

title: Cognitively Layered Data Synthesis for Domain Adaptation of LLMs to Space Situational Awareness
summary: Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate exceptional performance on general-purpose tasks. however, transferring them to complex engineering domains such as space situational awareness (SSA) remains challenging owing to insufficient structural alignment with mission chains, the absence of higher-order cognitive supervision, and poor correspondence between data quality criteria and engineering specifications. The core bottleneck is the construction of high-quality supervised fine-tuning (SFT) datasets. To this end, we propose BD-FDG (Bloom's Taxonomy-based Domain-specific Fine-tuning Data Generation), a framework that addresses incomplete knowledge coverage, shallow cognitive depth, and limited quality controllability through three mechanisms: structured knowledge organization, cognitively layered question modeling, and automated quality control. The framework uses a knowledge tree to ensure structured corpus coverage, designs a question generation scheme spanning nine categories and six cognitive levels from Remember to Create to produce samples with a continuous difficulty gradient, and applies a multidimensional scoring pipeline to enforce domain rigor and consistency. Using BD-FDG, we construct SSA-SFT, a domain dataset of approximately 230K samples, and fine-tune Qwen3-8B to obtain SSA-LLM-8B. Experiments show that SSA-LLM-8B achieves relative BLEU-1 improvements of 144\% (no-think) and 176\% (think) on the domain test set and a win rate of 82.21\% over the baseline in arena comparisons, while largely preserving general benchmark performance (MMLU-Pro, MATH-500). These results validate SFT data construction driven by cognitive layering as an effective paradigm for complex engineering domains and provide a transferable framework for domain-specific LLM adaptation.

AI.tldr: 提出BD-FDG框架，通过知识树结构化组织、认知分层问题建模和多维质量控制，构建23万样本的太空态势感知（SSA）领域SFT数据集，微调Qwen3-8B得到SSA-LLM-8B，在领域测试集上BLEU-1提升达144%~176%，对战胜率82.21%，同时保持通用基准性能。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在复杂工程领域如太空态势感知（SSA）中的应用受限于与任务链结构不匹配、缺乏高阶认知监督以及数据质量标准与工程规范不符，核心瓶颈在于高质量监督微调（SFT）数据集的构建。
AI.method: BD-FDG框架包含三个机制：1）使用知识树确保知识覆盖结构化；2）基于布卢姆分类学设计涵盖九类六级认知层次（从记忆到创造）的问题生成方案，实现难度连续梯度；3）采用多维度评分流水线保障领域严谨性与一致性。
AI.result: 构建了约23万样本的SSA-SFT数据集，微调后得到SSA-LLM-8B，在领域测试集上相对BLEU-1提升144%（无思考）和176%（思考），对战胜率达82.21%，且在通用基准（MMLU-Pro, MATH-500）上表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 基于认知分层的SFT数据构建是复杂工程领域大模型适配的有效范式，BD-FDG提供了一个可迁移的领域特定模型优化框架。

title: Understanding the Interplay between LLMs' Utilisation of Parametric and Contextual Knowledge: A keynote at ECIR 2025
summary: Language Models (LMs) acquire parametric knowledge from their training process, embedding it within their weights. The increasing scalability of LMs, however, poses significant challenges for understanding a model's inner workings and further for updating or correcting this embedded knowledge without the significant cost of retraining. Moreover, when using these language models for knowledge-intensive language understanding tasks, LMs have to integrate relevant context, mitigating their inherent weaknesses, such as incomplete or outdated knowledge. Nevertheless, studies indicate that LMs often ignore the provided context as it can be in conflict with the pre-existing LM's memory learned during pre-training. Conflicting knowledge can also already be present in the LM's parameters, termed intra-memory conflict. This underscores the importance of understanding the interplay between how a language model uses its parametric knowledge and the retrieved contextual knowledge. In this talk, I will aim to shed light on this important issue by presenting our research on evaluating the knowledge present in LMs, diagnostic tests that can reveal knowledge conflicts, as well as on understanding the characteristics of successfully used contextual knowledge.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了语言模型（LMs）在处理知识时，如何在参数化知识与上下文知识之间进行权衡，尤其关注因预训练记忆与上下文信息冲突导致的知识失效问题。通过评估模型知识、设计诊断测试以识别知识冲突，并分析成功利用上下文知识的特征，旨在提升语言模型在知识密集型任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 随着语言模型规模扩大，其内部知识难以解释且更新成本高昂。同时，模型常忽略与自身记忆冲突的上下文信息，导致知识使用不准确，因此需要理解模型如何整合内外部知识。
AI.method: 提出评估语言模型知识的方法，设计诊断测试以检测知识冲突，并分析成功利用上下文知识的特征。
AI.result: 揭示了语言模型在面对冲突知识时的行为模式，识别出影响上下文知识采纳的关键因素，为改进模型知识整合能力提供了依据。
AI.conclusion: 理解语言模型如何协调参数化知识与上下文知识对于提升其在知识密集型任务中的可靠性至关重要，未来工作应聚焦于增强模型对上下文信息的有效利用。

title: GST-VLA: Structured Gaussian Spatial Tokens for 3D Depth-Aware Vision-Language-Action Models
comment: The results presented in this paper are preliminary. Please note that the experiments are currently ongoing, and the final data is subject to change upon the completion of the study. All ideas, results, methods, and any content herein are the sole property of the authors
summary: VLA models encode visual observations as 2D patch tokens with no intrinsic geometric structure. We introduce GST-VLA with two contributions. First, the Gaussian Spatial Tokenizer (GST) converts frozen dense depth and frozen semantic patch features into $N_g{=}128$ anisotropic 3D Gaussian primitives, each parameterized by a metric residual mean $μ\in \mathbb{R}^3$, log-scale covariance $\log σ\in \mathbb{R}^3$, and learned opacity $α\in (0,1)$. The covariance eigenstructure encodes local surface orientation, and opacity provides per-primitive geometric confidence, both inaccessible from scalar depth. Spatial attention pooling with learned queries concentrates the fixed token budget on geometrically salient regions rather than distributing uniformly. Second, 3D Depth-Aware Chain-of-Thought (DA-CoT) reasoning supervises four structured intermediate spatial thoughts, covering 3D object grounding, grasp affordance contact geometry, pairwise metric distances, and coarse SE(3) waypoints, as explicit generation targets in the training loss. A cross-attention sublayer at every VLM transformer block provides direct access to the raw 256-primitive Gaussian field during DA-CoT generation. A 300M-parameter flow-matching action expert with mixture-of-experts feedforward sublayers decodes 7-DoF delta action chunks via conditional ODE integration, conditioned on both VLM hidden states and DA-CoT outputs through dual cross-attention. Trained with composite $\mathcal{L}_\mathrm{flow} + \mathcal{L}_\mathrm{CoT} + \mathcal{L}_\mathrm{depth}$ across three progressive stages, GST-VLA achieves 96.4% on LIBERO (+2.0%), and 80.2% on SimplerEnv (+5.4%). Ablations isolate the contribution of each GST component, each DA-CoT thought, and each training stage, confirming independent and synergistic gains concentrated on precision demanding tasks.

AI.tldr: GST-VLA introduces a Gaussian Spatial Tokenizer (GST) that converts depth and semantic features into 128 anisotropic 3D Gaussians with geometric and confidence attributes, enabling spatial attention to focus on salient regions. It also employs 3D Depth-Aware Chain-of-Thought (DA-CoT) reasoning to guide structured intermediate thoughts in 3D space, integrated via cross-attention. A flow-matching action expert decodes 7-DoF actions using dual cross-attention. Trained in stages with composite loss, GST-VLA achieves state-of-the-art performance on LIBERO and SimplerEnv, with ablations confirming synergistic improvements.
AI.motivation: Existing VLA models use 2D patch tokens lacking geometric structure, limiting their ability to reason about 3D spatial relationships. This work aims to enhance geometric precision and spatial reasoning by introducing a 3D-aware tokenization and structured reasoning framework.
AI.method: GST-VLA uses a Gaussian Spatial Tokenizer (GST) to generate 128 3D Gaussian primitives from depth and semantic features, encoding surface orientation and confidence. Spatial attention with learned queries focuses on salient regions. DA-CoT reasoning supervises four intermediate 3D spatial thoughts via a cross-attention mechanism. A flow-matching action expert with mixture-of-experts decodes 7-DoF actions conditioned on both VLM states and DA-CoT outputs through dual cross-attention.
AI.result: GST-VLA achieves 96.4% success rate on LIBERO (+2.0% over baseline) and 80.2% on SimplerEnv (+5.4%), demonstrating significant gains. Ablations confirm each component contributes independently and synergistically, especially on precision-demanding tasks.
AI.conclusion: GST-VLA advances visual-language-action modeling by integrating 3D geometric awareness through Gaussian primitives and structured 3D reasoning, significantly improving performance on complex manipulation tasks.

title: Social-R1: Towards Human-like Social Reasoning in LLMs
comment: 27 pages. Code and dataset will be released upon acceptance
summary: While large language models demonstrate remarkable capabilities across numerous domains, social intelligence - the capacity to perceive social cues, infer mental states, and generate appropriate responses - remains a critical challenge, particularly for enabling effective human-AI collaboration and developing AI that truly serves human needs. Current models often rely on superficial patterns rather than genuine social reasoning. We argue that cultivating human-like social intelligence requires training with challenging cases that resist shortcut solutions. To this end, we introduce ToMBench-Hard, an adversarial benchmark designed to provide hard training examples for social reasoning. Building on this, we propose Social-R1, a reinforcement learning framework that aligns model reasoning with human cognition through multi-dimensional rewards. Unlike outcome-based RL, Social-R1 supervises the entire reasoning process, enforcing structural alignment, logical integrity, and information density. Results show that our approach enables a 4B parameter model to surpass much larger counterparts and generalize robustly across eight diverse benchmarks. These findings demonstrate that challenging training cases with trajectory-level alignment offer a path toward efficient and reliable social intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ToMBench-Hard基准和Social-R1强化学习框架，通过对抗性难例和多维奖励机制，提升大模型的社会推理能力，使4B参数模型超越更大模型并在多个基准上实现稳健泛化。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型在社会智能方面仍存在不足，主要依赖表面模式而非真正的社会推理，亟需通过具有挑战性的训练样本和过程监督来提升模型的人类级社会认知能力。
AI.method: 引入ToMBench-Hard对抗性基准提供难例训练数据，并设计Social-R1强化学习框架，通过结构对齐、逻辑完整性和信息密度等多维度奖励，监督模型推理全过程，实现轨迹级对齐。
AI.result: 4B参数模型在多个社会推理任务中表现优于更大规模模型，具备强泛化能力，验证了挑战性训练与过程对齐的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过使用具有挑战性的训练案例并进行轨迹级推理对齐，可有效促进大模型社会智能的高效与可靠发展。

title: Sim2Act: Robust Simulation-to-Decision Learning via Adversarial Calibration and Group-Relative Perturbation
summary:
Simulation-to-decision learning enables safe policy training in digital environments without risking real-world deployment, and has become essential in mission-critical domains such as supply chains and industrial systems. However, simulators learned from noisy or biased real-world data often exhibit prediction errors in decision-critical regions, leading to unstable action ranking and unreliable policies. Existing approaches either focus on improving average simulation fidelity or adopt conservative regularization, which may cause policy collapse by discarding high-risk high-reward actions.
  We propose Sim2Act, a robust simulation-to-decision framework that addresses both simulator and policy robustness. First, we introduce an adversarial calibration mechanism that re-weights simulation errors in decision-critical state-action pairs to align surrogate fidelity with downstream decision impact. Second, we develop a group-relative perturbation strategy that stabilizes policy learning under simulator uncertainty without enforcing overly pessimistic constraints. Extensive experiments on multiple supply chain benchmarks demonstrate improved simulation robustness and more stable decision performance under structured and unstructured perturbations.

AI.tldr: Sim2Act 提出了一种鲁棒的仿真到决策框架，通过对抗校准机制重新加权决策关键状态-动作对的仿真误差，并采用组相对扰动策略在仿真不确定性下稳定策略学习，从而提升仿真鲁棒性和决策稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在平均仿真保真度或保守正则化方面存在局限，导致在高风险高回报动作上出现策略坍塌，无法有效应对由噪声或偏差数据引起的仿真预测误差。
AI.method: 引入对抗校准机制以调整决策关键区域的仿真误差权重，并设计组相对扰动策略来稳定策略学习过程，避免过度悲观约束。
AI.result: 在多个供应链基准测试中，该方法显著提升了仿真鲁棒性与在结构化和非结构化扰动下的决策性能稳定性。
AI.conclusion: Sim2Act 有效解决了仿真误差对决策稳定性的影响，实现了仿真与策略层面的双重鲁棒性，适用于高风险任务场景。

title: Automatic Cardiac Risk Management Classification using large-context Electronic Patients Health Records
summary: To overcome the limitations of manual administrative coding in geriatric Cardiovascular Risk Management, this study introduces an automated classification framework leveraging unstructured Electronic Health Records (EHRs). Using a dataset of 3,482 patients, we benchmarked three distinct modeling paradigms on longitudinal Dutch clinical narratives: classical machine learning baselines, specialized deep learning architectures optimized for large-context sequences, and general-purpose generative Large Language Models (LLMs) in a zero-shot setting. Additionally, we evaluated a late fusion strategy to integrate unstructured text with structured medication embeddings and anthropometric data. Our analysis reveals that the custom Transformer architecture outperforms both traditional methods and generative \acs{llm}s, achieving the highest F1-scores and Matthews Correlation Coefficients. These findings underscore the critical role of specialized hierarchical attention mechanisms in capturing long-range dependencies within medical texts, presenting a robust, automated alternative to manual workflows for clinical risk stratification.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种自动化分类框架，利用非结构化电子健康记录（EHR）解决老年心血管风险管理中手动行政编码的局限性。基于3,482名患者的纵向荷兰临床文本数据，对比了三种建模范式：传统机器学习基线、针对长序列优化的深度学习架构，以及零样本设置下的通用生成式大语言模型（LLM）。此外，还评估了融合非结构化文本与结构化药物嵌入及人体测量数据的后期融合策略。结果表明，自定义Transformer架构在F1分数和马修相关系数上均优于传统方法和生成式LLM，凸显了专用分层注意力机制在捕捉医学文本长程依赖关系中的关键作用，为临床风险分层提供了可靠、自动化的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 克服手动行政编码在老年心血管风险管理中的局限性，提升风险分层的自动化水平和准确性。
AI.method: 采用三种建模范式：经典机器学习基线、专门优化的深度学习架构（自定义Transformer）、通用生成式大语言模型（零样本），并结合后期融合策略整合非结构化文本与结构化数据（药物嵌入、人体测量数据）。
AI.result: 自定义Transformer架构在F1分数和马修相关系数上表现最佳，显著优于传统方法和生成式大语言模型，证明其在捕捉医学文本长程依赖方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: 专用分层注意力机制对理解复杂医疗文本至关重要，该框架可作为手动流程的高效自动化替代方案，用于临床风险分层。

title: OmniEdit: A Training-free framework for Lip Synchronization and Audio-Visual Editing
summary: Lip synchronization and audio-visual editing have emerged as fundamental challenges in multimodal learning, underpinning a wide range of applications, including film production, virtual avatars, and telepresence. Despite recent progress, most existing methods for lip synchronization and audio-visual editing depend on supervised fine-tuning of pre-trained models, leading to considerable computational overhead and data requirements. In this paper, we present OmniEdit, a training-free framework designed for both lip synchronization and audio-visual editing. Our approach reformulates the editing paradigm by substituting the edit sequence in FlowEdit with the target sequence, yielding an unbiased estimation of the desired output. Moreover, by removing stochastic elements from the generation process, we establish a smooth and stable editing trajectory. Extensive experimental results validate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed framework. Code is available at https://github.com/l1346792580123/OmniEdit.

AI.tldr: OmniEdit 是一个无需训练的框架，用于唇同步和音视频编辑，通过替换编辑序列并消除生成过程中的随机性，实现稳定、无偏的输出，显著降低计算开销和数据需求。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖于预训练模型的监督微调，导致计算成本高且数据需求大，亟需一种无需训练的高效解决方案。
AI.method: 将FlowEdit中的编辑序列替换为目标序列，实现无偏估计；去除生成过程中的随机性，确保编辑轨迹平滑稳定。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，OmniEdit在唇同步和音视频编辑任务中均表现出色，具有高效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: OmniEdit 提供了一种无需训练的高效音视频编辑方案，为多模态学习应用提供了新思路。

title: Logos: An evolvable reasoning engine for rational molecular design
summary: The discovery and design of functional molecules remain central challenges across chemistry,biology, and materials science. While recent advances in machine learning have accelerated molecular property prediction and candidate generation, existing models tend to excel either in physical fidelity without transparent reasoning, or in flexible reasoning without guarantees of chemical validity. This imbalance limits the reliability of artificial intelligence systems in real scientific design workflows.Here we present Logos, a compact molecular reasoning model that integrates multi-step logical reasoning with strict chemical consistency. Logos is trained using a staged strategy that first exposes the model to explicit reasoning examples linking molecular descriptions to structural decisions, and then progressively aligns these reasoning patterns with molecular representations. In a final training phase, chemical rules and invariants are incorporated directly into the optimization objective, guiding the model toward chemically valid outputs. Across multiple benchmark datasets, Logos achieves strong performance in both structural accuracy and chemical validity, matching or surpassing substantially larger general-purpose language models while operating with a fraction of their parameters. Beyond benchmark evaluation, the model exhibits stable behaviour in molecular optimization tasks involving multiple, potentially conflicting constraints. By explicitly exposing intermediate reasoning steps, Logos enables human inspection and assessment of the design logic underlying each generated structure. These results indicate that jointly optimizing for reasoning structure and physical consistency offers a practical pathway toward reliable and interpretable AI systems for molecular science, supporting closer integration of artificial intelligence into scientific discovery processes.

AI.tldr: Logos 是一个紧凑的分子推理模型，结合多步逻辑推理与严格的化学一致性，通过分阶段训练策略，在保证化学有效性的同时实现高结构准确性。该模型在多个基准数据集上表现优异，优于或媲美更大规模的通用语言模型，且参数量显著更少。它还能在涉及多重冲突约束的分子优化任务中保持稳定，并通过显式中间推理步骤支持人类可解释性评估，为可靠、可解释的人工智能在分子科学中的应用提供了可行路径。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习模型在分子设计中往往在物理保真度与透明推理之间存在权衡：要么具备高物理准确性但缺乏可解释性，要么具备灵活推理但无法保证化学有效性。这种不平衡限制了AI在真实科研流程中的可靠性，亟需一种兼具推理能力与化学合理性的模型。
AI.method: Logos采用分阶段训练策略：首先用显式推理示例训练模型从分子描述到结构决策的逻辑映射；随后逐步对齐推理模式与分子表示；最后将化学规则和不变量直接纳入优化目标，引导生成符合化学规律的结构。
AI.result: Logos在多个基准数据集上实现了优异的结构准确性和化学有效性，性能媲美甚至超越大型通用语言模型，同时仅使用极少参数。在复杂多约束优化任务中表现出稳定行为，并支持人类对中间推理过程的审查与评估。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化推理结构与物理一致性是构建可靠、可解释人工智能系统的关键路径，有助于推动人工智能更深入地融入分子科学的发现流程。

title: Dynamic Multi-period Experts for Online Time Series Forecasting
summary: Online Time Series Forecasting (OTSF) requires models to continuously adapt to concept drift. However, existing methods often treat concept drift as a monolithic phenomenon. To address this limitation, we first redefine concept drift by categorizing it into two distinct types: Recurring Drift, where previously seen patterns reappear, and Emergent Drift, where entirely new patterns emerge. We then propose DynaME (Dynamic Multi-period Experts), a novel hybrid framework designed to effectively address this dual nature of drift. For Recurring Drift, DynaME employs a committee of specialized experts that are dynamically fitted to the most relevant historical periodic patterns at each time step. For Emergent Drift, the framework detects high-uncertainty scenarios and shifts reliance to a stable, general expert. Extensive experiments on several benchmark datasets and backbones demonstrate that DynaME effectively adapts to both concept drifts and significantly outperforms existing baselines.

AI.tldr: DynaME proposes a novel framework for Online Time Series Forecasting by distinguishing between Recurring Drift (reappearance of past patterns) and Emergent Drift (new patterns), using specialized experts for the former and a general expert for the latter, achieving superior performance over baselines.
AI.motivation: Existing methods treat concept drift as a monolithic issue, failing to account for its diverse nature; this limits adaptability in real-world time series forecasting where both recurring and emergent patterns occur.
AI.method: DynaME introduces a dynamic multi-period expert system: it uses a committee of specialized experts to capture recurring patterns and switches to a stable general expert when uncertainty is high, indicating emergent drift.
AI.result: Experiments on benchmark datasets show DynaME effectively handles both types of drift and significantly outperforms existing methods.
AI.conclusion: By explicitly modeling the dual nature of concept drift, DynaME provides a robust and adaptive solution for online time series forecasting.

title: Chain of Event-Centric Causal Thought for Physically Plausible Video Generation
summary: Physically Plausible Video Generation (PPVG) has emerged as a promising avenue for modeling real-world physical phenomena. PPVG requires an understanding of commonsense knowledge, which remains a challenge for video diffusion models. Current approaches leverage commonsense reasoning capability of large language models to embed physical concepts into prompts. However, generation models often render physical phenomena as a single moment defined by prompts, due to the lack of conditioning mechanisms for modeling causal progression. In this paper, we view PPVG as generating a sequence of causally connected and dynamically evolving events. To realize this paradigm, we design two key modules: (1) Physics-driven Event Chain Reasoning. This module decomposes the physical phenomena described in prompts into multiple elementary event units, leveraging chain-of-thought reasoning. To mitigate causal ambiguity, we embed physical formulas as constraints to impose deterministic causal dependencies during reasoning. (2) Transition-aware Cross-modal Prompting (TCP). To maintain continuity between events, this module transforms causal event units into temporally aligned vision-language prompts. It summarizes discrete event descriptions to obtain causally consistent narratives, while progressively synthesizing visual keyframes of individual events by interactive editing. Comprehensive experiments on PhyGenBench and VideoPhy benchmarks demonstrate that our framework achieves superior performance in generating physically plausible videos across diverse physical domains. Our code will be released soon.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的物理合理视频生成框架，通过物理驱动的事件链推理和过渡感知跨模态提示技术，实现因果连贯的动态事件序列生成。该方法将物理现象分解为基本事件单元，并利用物理公式约束确保因果确定性；同时通过时间对齐的视觉-语言提示保持事件间连续性。在PhyGenBench和VideoPhy基准上的实验表明，该方法在多个物理领域均显著提升视频生成的物理合理性。
AI.motivation: 当前视频扩散模型难以有效建模物理现象的因果演化过程，主要受限于缺乏对动态因果关系的条件建模机制，导致生成结果多为静态、孤立的物理场景。尽管已有方法尝试借助大语言模型注入常识知识，但无法充分捕捉物理事件的时间演进规律。
AI.method: 提出两个核心模块：(1) 物理驱动的事件链推理（Physics-driven Event Chain Reasoning），将输入描述分解为多个基础事件单元，结合思维链推理与物理公式作为约束以消除因果歧义；(2) 过渡感知跨模态提示（TCP），将因果事件单元转化为时间对齐的视觉-语言提示，通过渐进式编辑合成关键帧并生成连贯叙事。
AI.result: 在PhyGenBench和VideoPhy两个基准上，所提框架在物理合理性、事件连贯性和视觉质量方面均优于现有方法，尤其在复杂物理场景如碰撞、弹跳、流体运动等任务中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过引入因果推理与时间对齐提示机制，实现了从静态提示到动态因果事件序列的转变，显著提升了视频生成的物理真实性，为构建具有常识理解能力的生成系统提供了新范式。

title: Rescaling Confidence: What Scale Design Reveals About LLM Metacognition
summary: Verbalized confidence, in which LLMs report a numerical certainty score, is widely used to estimate uncertainty in black-box settings, yet the confidence scale itself (typically 0--100) is rarely examined. We show that this design choice is not neutral. Across six LLMs and three datasets, verbalized confidence is heavily discretized, with more than 78% of responses concentrating on just three round-number values. To investigate this phenomenon, we systematically manipulate confidence scales along three dimensions: granularity, boundary placement, and range regularity, and evaluate metacognitive sensitivity using meta-d'. We find that a 0--20 scale consistently improves metacognitive efficiency over the standard 0--100 format, while boundary compression degrades performance and round-number preferences persist even under irregular ranges. These results demonstrate that confidence scale design directly affects the quality of verbalized uncertainty and should be treated as a first-class experimental variable in LLM evaluation.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了大语言模型（LLM）在黑箱设置中使用数值化置信度报告不确定性时，置信度量表设计的影响。研究发现，当前常用的0-100量表存在严重离散化问题，超过78%的置信度集中在三个整数上。通过系统调整量表的粒度、边界位置和范围规则，发现0-20量表在元认知敏感性（meta-d'）方面表现更优，而边界压缩会降低性能，且整数偏好在不规则量表下依然存在。因此，置信度量表设计并非中立，应作为评估中的首要变量。
AI.motivation: 现有研究广泛使用0-100的置信度量表来估计大语言模型的不确定性，但该量表的设计本身未被充分考察，可能影响结果的准确性。研究旨在揭示量表设计对置信度报告质量的影响，推动其作为可优化的实验变量。
AI.method: 系统地操纵置信度量表的三个维度：粒度（如0-20 vs 0-100）、边界放置（如是否包含0/100）、范围规则性（如等距或不规则）。在六种大语言模型和三个数据集上评估元认知敏感性（meta-d'），以衡量置信度与实际正确率之间的匹配程度。
AI.result: 0-20量表在所有条件下均显著提升元认知效率；边界压缩导致性能下降；即使在不规则量表下，模型仍倾向于选择整数作为置信度值。
AI.conclusion: 置信度量表的设计直接影响大语言模型的不确定性表达质量，不应被视为固定不变的参数。研究建议在评估中将量表设计作为第一类实验变量进行优化。

title: Learning Adaptive LLM Decoding
summary: Decoding from large language models (LLMs) typically relies on fixed sampling hyperparameters (e.g., temperature, top-p), despite substantial variation in task difficulty and uncertainty across prompts and individual decoding steps. We propose to learn adaptive decoding policies that dynamically select sampling strategies at inference time, conditioned on available compute resources. Rather than fine-tuning the language model itself, we introduce lightweight decoding adapters trained with reinforcement learning and verifiable terminal rewards (e.g. correctness on math and coding tasks). At the sequence level, we frame decoding as a contextual bandit problem: a policy selects a decoding strategy (e.g. greedy, top-k, min-p) for each prompt, conditioned on the prompt embedding and a parallel sampling budget. At the token level, we model decoding as a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP), where a policy selects sampling actions at each token step based on internal model features and the remaining token budget. Experiments on the MATH and CodeContests benchmarks show that the learned adapters improve the accuracy-budget tradeoff: on MATH, the token-level adapter improves Pass@1 accuracy by up to 10.2% over the best static baseline under a fixed token budget, while the sequence-level adapter yields 2-3% gains under fixed parallel sampling. Ablation analyses support the contribution of both sequence- and token-level adaptation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应解码策略，通过强化学习训练轻量级解码适配器，在推理时动态选择采样方法，根据可用计算资源优化解码过程。在序列层面将解码建模为上下文相关赌博问题，基于提示嵌入和并行采样预算选择策略；在词元层面则建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），依据模型内部特征和剩余词元预算选择采样动作。在MATH和CodeContests基准上的实验表明，所提方法显著提升了准确率与计算预算之间的权衡：在固定词元预算下，词元级适配器使Pass@1准确率最高提升10.2%，序列级适配器在固定并行采样条件下获得2-3%的增益。消融实验证明了两种层级适应的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统大语言模型解码依赖固定的采样超参数（如温度、top-p），但任务难度和不确定性在不同提示及解码步骤间存在显著差异，导致性能受限。为提升解码效率与准确性，需实现动态、自适应的解码策略，以更好地利用有限计算资源。
AI.method: 提出两种层级的自适应解码框架：序列级将解码视为上下文相关赌博问题，基于提示嵌入与并行采样预算选择整体解码策略；词元级将其建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），在每一步根据内部模型特征与剩余词元预算选择采样动作。采用强化学习训练轻量级解码适配器，使用可验证的终端奖励（如数学与编程任务的正确性）进行优化。
AI.result: 在MATH和CodeContests基准上，所提自适应解码策略显著改善了准确率-预算权衡：词元级适配器在固定词元预算下使Pass@1准确率最高提升10.2%；序列级适配器在固定并行采样条件下实现2-3%的准确率提升。消融实验验证了序列级与词元级适应对性能提升的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入基于强化学习的轻量级解码适配器，能够有效实现解码策略的动态调整，显著提升大语言模型在不同计算约束下的解码性能，证明了自适应解码在提高准确性与资源利用率方面的潜力。

title: ESAinsTOD: A Unified End-to-End Schema-Aware Instruction-Tuning Framework for Task-Oriented Dialog Modeling
comment: Published at International Journal of Machine Learning and Cybernetics (IJMLC)
summary: Existing end-to-end modeling methods for modular task-oriented dialog systems are typically tailored to specific datasets, making it challenging to adapt to new dialog scenarios. In this work, we propose ESAinsTOD, a unified End-to-end Schema-Aware Instruction-tuning framework for general Task-Oriented Dialog modeling. This framework introduces a structured methodology to go beyond simply fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs), enabling flexible adaptation to various dialogue task flows and schemas. Specifically, we leverage full-parameter fine-tuning of LLMs and introduce two alignment mechanisms to make the resulting system both instruction-aware and schema-aware: (i) instruction alignment, which ensures that the system faithfully follows task instructions to complete various task flows from heterogeneous TOD datasets; and (ii) schema alignment, which encourages the system to make predictions adhering to the specified schema. In addition, we employ session-level end-to-end modeling, which allows the system to access the results of previously executed task flows within the dialogue history, to bridge the gap between the instruction-tuning paradigm and the real-world application of TOD systems. Empirical results show that while a fine-tuned LLM serves as a strong baseline, our structured approach provides significant additional benefits. In particular, our findings indicate that: (i) ESAinsTOD outperforms state-of-the-art models by a significant margin on end-to-end task-oriented dialog modeling benchmarks: CamRest676, In-Car and MultiWOZ; (ii) more importantly, it exhibits superior generalization capabilities across various low-resource settings, with the proposed alignment mechanisms significantly enhancing zero-shot performance; and (iii) our instruction-tuning paradigm substantially improves the model's robustness against data noise and cascading errors.

AI.tldr: ESAinsTOD提出一种统一的端到端架构，通过指令对齐和模式对齐机制，使大模型在任务导向对话中具备更强的适应性与泛化能力，显著提升零样本性能与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端建模方法依赖特定数据集，难以适应新对话场景；需构建通用、可灵活适配的任务导向对话系统。
AI.method: 采用全参数微调的大语言模型，引入指令对齐与模式对齐机制，并结合会话级端到端建模，实现对任务流程与数据模式的感知与遵循。
AI.result: 在CamRest676、In-Car、MultiWOZ等基准上超越现有模型；在低资源及零样本设置下表现优异；对数据噪声与级联错误具有更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: ESAinsTOD通过结构化指令微调框架，有效提升了任务导向对话系统的通用性、适应性与可靠性，为实际应用提供了有力支持。

title: MedKCO: Medical Vision-Language Pretraining via Knowledge-Driven Cognitive Orchestration
summary: Medical vision-language pretraining (VLP) models have recently been investigated for their generalization to diverse downstream tasks. However, current medical VLP methods typically force the model to learn simple and complex concepts simultaneously. This anti-cognitive process leads to suboptimal feature representations, especially under distribution shift. To address this limitation, we propose a Knowledge-driven Cognitive Orchestration for Medical VLP (MedKCO) that involves both the ordering of the pretraining data and the learning objective of vision-language contrast. Specifically, we design a two level curriculum by incorporating diagnostic sensitivity and intra-class sample representativeness for the ordering of the pretraining data. Moreover, considering the inter-class similarity of medical images, we introduce a self-paced asymmetric contrastive loss to dynamically adjust the participation of the pretraining objective. We evaluate the proposed pretraining method on three medical imaging scenarios in multiple vision-language downstream tasks, and compare it with several curriculum learning methods. Extensive experiments show that our method significantly surpasses all baselines. https://github.com/Mr-Talon/MedKCO.

AI.tldr: 提出MedKCO方法，通过双层课程学习和自适应对比损失，提升医学视觉-语言预训练模型在分布外情况下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有医学VLP方法同时学习简单和复杂概念，导致特征表示不优，尤其在分布偏移下表现差。
AI.method: 设计双层课程学习，基于诊断敏感性和类内样本代表性排序预训练数据；引入自适应非对称对比损失，动态调整预训练目标参与度。
AI.result: 在多个医学影像场景的下游任务中，显著优于所有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MedKCO通过认知驱动的课程设计和自适应学习机制，有效提升了医学VLP模型的泛化能力。

title: Curveball Steering: The Right Direction To Steer Isn't Always Linear
summary: Activation steering is a widely used approach for controlling large language model (LLM) behavior by intervening on internal representations. Existing methods largely rely on the Linear Representation Hypothesis, assuming behavioral attributes can be manipulated using global linear directions. In practice, however, such linear interventions often behave inconsistently. We question this assumption by analyzing the intrinsic geometry of LLM activation spaces. Measuring geometric distortion via the ratio of geodesic to Euclidean distances, we observe substantial and concept-dependent distortions, indicating that activation spaces are not well-approximated by a globally linear geometry. Motivated by this, we propose "Curveball steering", a nonlinear steering method based on polynomial kernel PCA that performs interventions in a feature space, better respecting the learned activation geometry. Curveball steering consistently outperforms linear PCA-based steering, particularly in regimes exhibiting strong geometric distortion, suggesting that geometry-aware, nonlinear steering provides a principled alternative to global, linear interventions.

AI.tldr: Curveball steering 是一种基于多项式核主成分分析（PCA）的非线性干预方法，旨在克服传统线性干预在大语言模型（LLM）行为控制中的不一致性问题。该方法考虑了激活空间的内在几何结构，通过测量测地距离与欧氏距离的比值发现激活空间存在显著且依赖概念的几何畸变，表明其不适合全局线性假设。实验表明，Curveball 在几何畸变强烈的场景下显著优于线性方法，证明了几何感知的非线性干预是一种更合理的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 现有激活控制方法依赖于线性表示假设，认为行为属性可通过全局线性方向进行操纵。然而实践中线性干预表现不稳定，因此本文质疑这一假设，旨在探索激活空间的真实几何特性以改进干预方法。
AI.method: 提出 Curveball steering，基于多项式核 PCA 在特征空间中执行非线性干预，以更好地尊重模型激活空间的内在几何结构。通过分析测地距离与欧氏距离的比率来量化几何畸变，并据此设计更符合实际几何特性的干预策略。
AI.result: Curveball steering 在多种任务和几何畸变程度较高的情况下均显著优于传统的线性 PCA 干扰方法，尤其在高畸变场景中表现突出，验证了非线性、几何感知干预的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 激活空间具有复杂的非线性几何结构，不能简单用全局线性假设近似。基于几何感知的非线性干预（如 Curveball steering）为大语言模型的行为控制提供了更可靠、一致的解决方案，是线性方法的有力替代。

title: Exclusive Self Attention
summary: We introduce exclusive self attention (XSA), a simple modification of self attention (SA) that improves Transformer's sequence modeling performance. The key idea is to constrain attention to capture only information orthogonal to the token's own value vector (thus excluding information of self position), encouraging better context modeling. Evaluated on the standard language modeling task, XSA consistently outperforms SA across model sizes up to 2.7B parameters and shows increasingly larger gains as sequence length grows.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为独占自注意力（XSA）的新方法，通过限制注意力仅捕捉与当前标记值向量正交的信息（排除自身位置信息），从而提升Transformer在序列建模上的表现。在标准语言建模任务中，XSA在不同模型规模下均优于传统自注意力（SA），且随着序列长度增加，性能优势愈发明显。
AI.motivation: 传统自注意力机制在建模序列时可能受到自身位置信息的干扰，影响上下文建模效果。为改善这一问题，提出XSA以增强对上下文信息的捕捉能力。
AI.method: 通过设计一种约束机制，使注意力计算只关注与当前标记值向量正交的部分，从而排除自身位置的影响，实现更纯净的上下文建模。
AI.result: 在多种模型规模（最大达2.7B参数）和不同序列长度下，XSA均显著优于标准自注意力，在长序列任务中优势更为突出。
AI.conclusion: 独占自注意力（XSA）是一种有效且简单的改进方法，能显著提升Transformer在序列建模任务中的性能，尤其适用于长序列场景。

title: Evaluation of LLMs in retrieving food and nutritional context for RAG systems
comment: This is the preprint for our conference paper for IEEE International Conference on Big Data
