summary: In this article, we evaluate four Large Language Models (LLMs) and their effectiveness at retrieving data within a specialized Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system, using a comprehensive food composition database. Our method is focused on the LLMs ability to translate natural language queries into structured metadata filters, enabling efficient retrieval via a Chroma vector database. By achieving high accuracy in this critical retrieval step, we demonstrate that LLMs can serve as an accessible, high-performance tool, drastically reducing the manual effort and technical expertise previously required for domain experts, such as food compilers and nutritionists, to leverage complex food and nutrition data. However, despite the high performance on easy and moderately complex queries, our analysis of difficult questions reveals that reliable retrieval remains challenging when queries involve non-expressible constraints. These findings demonstrate that LLM-driven metadata filtering excels when constraints can be explicitly expressed, but struggles when queries exceed the representational scope of the metadata format.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了四种大型语言模型（LLMs）在专用检索增强生成（RAG）系统中从食品成分数据库中检索数据的有效性。方法聚焦于LLM将自然语言查询转化为结构化元数据过滤器的能力，以实现通过Chroma向量数据库的高效检索。结果显示，LLM在简单和中等复杂度查询上表现优异，能显著降低领域专家（如食品编纂者和营养师）使用复杂营养数据所需的手动工作量和技术门槛；但在涉及不可表达约束的困难查询上，可靠检索仍具挑战性，表明基于元数据过滤的LLM方法在约束可明确表达时有效，而在超出元数据格式表示能力时表现不佳。
AI.motivation: 旨在探索大型语言模型在食品与营养数据检索中的应用潜力，解决传统方法对技术门槛和人工干预的依赖问题，提升领域专家获取精准数据的效率。
AI.method: 采用检索增强生成（RAG）系统，利用Chroma向量数据库存储食品成分数据，通过四种LLMs将自然语言查询转换为结构化元数据过滤条件，实现高效精准检索。
AI.result: LLMs在简单和中等复杂度查询中表现出高准确率，显著降低人工操作与技术门槛；但在涉及非显式约束的复杂查询中，检索可靠性下降，暴露出元数据表示能力的局限性。
AI.conclusion: LLM驱动的元数据过滤在可表达约束下表现卓越，是提升食品与营养数据访问效率的有力工具，但其在处理复杂或隐含约束时仍存在明显瓶颈，需结合其他技术手段优化。

title: Training-free Motion Factorization for Compositional Video Generation
summary: Compositional video generation aims to synthesize multiple instances with diverse appearance and motion, which is widely applicable in real-world scenarios. However, current approaches mainly focus on binding semantics, neglecting to understand diverse motion categories specified in prompts. In this paper, we propose a motion factorization framework that decomposes complex motion into three primary categories: motionlessness, rigid motion, and non-rigid motion. Specifically, our framework follows a planning before generation paradigm. (1) During planning, we reason about motion laws on the motion graph to obtain frame-wise changes in the shape and position of each instance. This alleviates semantic ambiguities in the user prompt by organizing it into a structured representation of instances and their interactions. (2) During generation, we modulate the synthesis of distinct motion categories in a disentangled manner. Conditioned on the motion cues, guidance branches stabilize appearance in motionless regions, preserve rigid-body geometry, and regularize local non-rigid deformations. Crucially, our two modules are model-agnostic, which can be seamlessly incorporated into various diffusion model architectures. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves impressive performance in motion synthesis on real-world benchmarks. Our code will be released soon.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种运动分解框架，将复杂运动分解为静止、刚体运动和非刚体运动三类，采用先规划后生成的范式。规划阶段通过运动图推理每帧中各实例的形状与位置变化，缓解提示中的语义模糊；生成阶段则解耦地调制不同运动类别，通过引导分支稳定静态区域外观、保持刚体几何结构并规范局部非刚体变形。该框架与模型无关，可无缝集成到多种扩散模型架构中，在真实世界基准上表现出色。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要关注语义绑定，忽视了提示中指定的多样化运动类别，导致运动合成不准确或不自然。
AI.method: 提出一种运动因子化框架，包含规划与生成两个模块：规划阶段基于运动图推理实例的逐帧变化；生成阶段通过条件引导分支解耦处理三种运动类型。
AI.result: 在真实世界基准上实现了出色的运动合成性能，验证了框架的有效性与通用性。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能够有效理解并生成多样化运动，具备良好的泛化能力，适用于多种扩散模型架构。

title: PPO-Based Hybrid Optimization for RIS-Assisted Semantic Vehicular Edge Computing
comment: This paper has been accepted by electronics. The source code has been released at: https://github.com/qiongwu86/PPO-Based-Hybrid-Optimization-for-RIS-Assisted-Semantic-Vehicular-Edge-Computing
summary: To support latency-sensitive Internet of Vehicles (IoV) applications amidst dynamic environments and intermittent links, this paper proposes a Reconfigurable Intelligent Surface (RIS)-aided semantic-aware Vehicle Edge Computing (VEC) framework. This approach integrates RIS to optimize wireless connectivity and semantic communication to minimize latency by transmitting semantic features. We formulate a comprehensive joint optimization problem by optimizing offloading ratios, the number of semantic symbols, and RIS phase shifts. Considering the problem's high dimensionality and non-convexity, we propose a two-tier hybrid scheme that employs Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) for discrete decision-making and Linear Programming (LP) for offloading optimization. {The simulation results have validated the proposed framework's superiority over existing methods. Specifically, the proposed PPO-based hybrid optimization scheme reduces the average end-to-end latency by approximately 40% to 50% compared to Genetic Algorithm (GA) and Quantum-behaved Particle Swarm Optimization (QPSO). Moreover, the system demonstrates strong scalability by maintaining low latency even in congested scenarios with up to 30 vehicles.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可重构智能表面（RIS）的语义感知车联网边缘计算框架，以应对动态环境和间歇性链路下的低延迟需求。通过联合优化卸载比例、语义符号数量和RIS相位偏移，采用两层混合方案（PPO用于离散决策，线性规划用于卸载优化），显著降低端到端延迟。仿真结果表明，相比遗传算法（GA）和量子行为粒子群优化（QPSO），平均端到端延迟降低约40%至50%，且在多达30辆车辆的高密度场景下仍保持低延迟性能，展现出良好的可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 为支持车联网中对时延敏感的应用，在动态环境和间歇性链路条件下，现有方法难以有效降低通信与计算延迟，亟需一种能同时优化无线连接与语义信息传输的新架构。
AI.method: 提出一种两层混合优化框架：使用近端策略优化（PPO）处理离散决策（如卸载比例与语义符号数），结合线性规划（LP）进行连续变量优化（如RIS相位调整），实现对系统参数的联合优化。
AI.result: 仿真验证了该框架的优越性：相比GA和QPSO，平均端到端延迟降低40%~50%；在最多30辆车的密集场景中仍能维持低延迟，表现出强可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的RIS辅助语义感知车联网边缘计算框架能够有效应对动态与高负载环境下的低延迟挑战，具备实际部署潜力。

title: RbtAct: Rebuttal as Supervision for Actionable Review Feedback Generation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used across the scientific workflow, including to draft peer-review reports. However, many AI-generated reviews are superficial and insufficiently actionable, leaving authors without concrete, implementable guidance and motivating the gap this work addresses. We propose RbtAct, which targets actionable review feedback generation and places existing peer review rebuttal at the center of learning. Rebuttals show which reviewer comments led to concrete revisions or specific plans, and which were only defended. Building on this insight, we leverage rebuttal as implicit supervision to directly optimize a feedback generator for actionability. To support this objective, we propose a new task called perspective-conditioned segment-level review feedback generation, in which the model is required to produce a single focused comment based on the complete paper and a specified perspective such as experiments and writing. We also build a large dataset named RMR-75K that maps review segments to the rebuttal segments that address them, with perspective labels and impact categories that order author uptake. We then train the Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct model with supervised fine-tuning on review segments followed by preference optimization using rebuttal derived pairs. Experiments with human experts and LLM-as-a-judge show consistent gains in actionability and specificity over strong baselines while maintaining grounding and relevance.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出RbtAct，一种专注于生成可操作性同行评审反馈的方法，利用审稿人回复（rebuttal）作为隐式监督信号来优化反馈生成模型。通过引入新的任务——基于视角的段落级反馈生成，并构建了包含75,000条数据的大规模数据集RMR-75K，标注了评论与回应之间的对应关系、视角标签和作者采纳影响等级。在Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct模型上采用监督微调和基于回应对的偏好优化，实验表明该方法在可操作性和具体性方面显著优于基线，同时保持内容相关性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型生成的同行评审意见往往流于表面，缺乏可执行的具体建议，导致作者难以获得实际改进指导，因此本文旨在填补这一空白，提升评审反馈的可操作性。
AI.method: 提出一种基于审稿人回应的隐式监督机制，设计新任务‘视角条件下的段落级评审反馈生成’，构建大规模数据集RMR-75K，使用监督微调与偏好优化联合训练模型，以增强反馈的行动导向性。
AI.result: 在人类专家和大模型评估中，RbtAct在可操作性与具体性方面持续优于强基线模型，同时保持了良好的内容相关性与真实性。
AI.conclusion: RbtAct通过利用审稿人回应作为隐式监督信号，有效提升了同行评审反馈的可操作性与实用性，为未来自动化评审系统的发展提供了重要方向。

title: Composed Vision-Language Retrieval for Skin Cancer Case Search via Joint Alignment of Global and Local Representations
summary: Medical image retrieval aims to identify clinically relevant lesion cases to support diagnostic decision making, education, and quality control. In practice, retrieval queries often combine a reference lesion image with textual descriptors such as dermoscopic features. We study composed vision-language retrieval for skin cancer, where each query consists of an image to text pair and the database contains biopsy-confirmed, multi-class disease cases. We propose a transformer based framework that learns hierarchical composed query representations and performs joint global-local alignment between queries and candidate images. Local alignment aggregates discriminative regions via multiple spatial attention masks, while global alignment provides holistic semantic supervision. The final similarity is computed through a convex, domain-informed weighting that emphasizes clinically salient local evidence while preserving global consistency. Experiments on the public Derm7pt dataset demonstrate consistent improvements over state-of-the-art methods. The proposed framework enables efficient access to relevant medical records and supports practical clinical deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Transformer的视觉-语言医学图像检索框架，用于皮肤癌诊断。该框架通过层次化查询表示和全局-局部联合对齐，结合图像与文本描述，提升检索精度。实验在Derm7pt数据集上验证了其优越性，支持临床实际应用。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像检索方法难以有效融合图像与文本信息，尤其在复杂临床查询（如结合病变图像与描述性文本）中表现不足，亟需更精确的多模态检索框架以支持诊断决策与教育。
AI.method: 提出一种基于Transformer的框架，学习分层的视觉-语言查询表示；采用多空间注意力掩码实现局部区域对齐，同时引入全局语义对齐；最终通过领域知识指导的凸加权计算相似度，强化关键局部证据并保持整体一致性。
AI.result: 在公开的Derm7pt数据集上，所提方法在多个评估指标上均显著优于现有最先进方法，展现出更高的检索准确率与临床实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升了皮肤癌医学图像检索性能，具备良好的临床部署潜力，为辅助诊断与医学知识管理提供了有力工具。

title: AI Act Evaluation Benchmark: An Open, Transparent, and Reproducible Evaluation Dataset for NLP and RAG Systems
summary: The rapid rollout of AI in heterogeneous public and societal sectors has subsequently escalated the need for compliance with regulatory standards and frameworks. The EU AI Act has emerged as a landmark in the regulatory landscape. The development of solutions that elicit the level of AI systems' compliance with such standards is often limited by the lack of resources, hindering the semi-automated or automated evaluation of their performance. This generates the need for manual work, which is often error-prone, resource-limited or limited to cases not clearly described by the regulation. This paper presents an open, transparent, and reproducible method of creating a resource that facilitates the evaluation of NLP models with a strong focus on RAG systems. We have developed a dataset that contain the tasks of risk-level classification, article retrieval, obligation generation, and question-answering for the EU AI Act. The dataset files are in a machine-to-machine appropriate format. To generate the files, we utilise domain knowledge as an exegetical basis, combining with the processing and reasoning power of large language models to generate scenarios along with the respective tasks. Our methodology demonstrates a way to harness language models for grounded generation with high document relevancy. Besides, we overcome limitations such as navigating the decision boundaries of risk-levels that are not explicitly defined within the EU AI Act, such as limited and minimal cases. Finally, we demonstrate our dataset's effectiveness by evaluating a RAG-based solution that reaches 0.87 and 0.85 F1-score for prohibited and high-risk scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种开放、透明且可复现的方法，构建用于评估NLP模型（特别是RAG系统）是否符合欧盟人工智能法案的资源。通过结合领域知识与大语言模型的处理和推理能力，生成包含风险等级分类、条款检索、义务生成和问答任务的数据集。该数据集以机器可读格式提供，并有效解决了法规中未明确界定的风险边界问题，如有限和最低风险情形。实验表明，基于RAG的解决方案在禁止类和高风险场景中分别达到0.87和0.85的F1分数，验证了数据集的有效性。
AI.motivation: 随着AI在公共和社会领域的快速部署，合规性评估需求增加，但现有方法受限于资源不足，依赖人工评估，易出错且覆盖不全。亟需自动化、半自动化工具来评估AI系统对欧盟人工智能法案等监管框架的符合程度。
AI.method: 结合领域知识作为解释基础，利用大语言模型的生成与推理能力，创建符合欧盟人工智能法案要求的多任务数据集，涵盖风险等级分类、文章检索、义务生成和问答任务。所有数据以机器可读格式输出，确保可重复性和可扩展性。
AI.result: 所构建的数据集成功支持了对RAG系统的评估，在禁止类和高风险场景下分别获得0.87和0.85的F1分数，证明其在实际应用中的有效性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提供了一种高效、可复现的自动化评估框架，为NLP模型（尤其是RAG系统）在复杂法规环境下的合规性评估提供了有力支持，推动AI治理向更智能、更精准的方向发展。

title: Not All News Is Equal: Topic- and Event-Conditional Sentiment from Finetuned LLMs for Aluminum Price Forecasting
summary: By capturing the prevailing sentiment and market mood, textual data has become increasingly vital for forecasting commodity prices, particularly in metal markets. However, the effectiveness of lightweight, finetuned large language models (LLMs) in extracting predictive signals for aluminum prices, and the specific market conditions under which these signals are most informative, remains under-explored. This study generates monthly sentiment scores from English and Chinese news headlines (Reuters, Dow Jones Newswires, and China News Service) and integrates them with traditional tabular data, including base metal indices, exchange rates, inflation rates, and energy prices. We evaluate the predictive performance and economic utility of these models through long-short simulations on the Shanghai Metal Exchange from 2007 to 2024. Our results demonstrate that during periods of high volatility, Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) models incorporating sentiment data from a finetuned Qwen3 model (Sharpe ratio 1.04) significantly outperform baseline models using tabular data alone (Sharpe ratio 0.23). Subsequent analysis elucidates the nuanced roles of news sources, topics, and event types in aluminum price forecasting.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用中英文新闻标题（路透社、道琼斯新闻线、中国新闻网）生成月度情感得分，结合传统表格数据（基本金属指数、汇率、通胀率、能源价格），评估轻量级微调大语言模型（LLM）在铝价预测中的表现。通过2007-2024年上海金属交易所的多空模拟，发现高波动时期，基于微调Qwen3模型的情感数据与LSTM结合的模型显著优于仅使用表格数据的基准模型（夏普比率1.04 vs 0.23）。研究还揭示了不同新闻来源、主题和事件类型在铝价预测中的差异化作用。
AI.motivation: 探索轻量级微调大语言模型在提取铝价预测信号方面的有效性，以及这些信号在何种市场条件下最具信息价值，填补现有研究空白。
AI.method: 从英文和中文新闻标题中提取月度情感分数，融合传统经济指标，构建基于LSTM的预测模型，并在2007-2024年上海金属交易所数据上进行长期多空策略回测，评估模型性能与经济效用。
AI.result: 在高波动市场环境下，融合微调Qwen3模型情感数据的LSTM模型表现出显著更强的预测能力，其夏普比率达1.04，远超仅使用传统数据的基准模型（夏普比率0.23）。研究进一步识别出不同新闻源、话题和事件类型对铝价预测的贡献差异。
AI.conclusion: 微调的大语言模型所提取的情感信号在高波动期对铝价预测具有重要价值，尤其当结合时间序列建模方法如LSTM时，能有效提升预测精度与投资回报。不同信息源和事件类型的影响具有异质性，应被纳入模型设计考量。

title: An Empirical Study and Theoretical Explanation on Task-Level Model-Merging Collapse
summary: Model merging unifies independently fine-tuned LLMs from the same base, enabling reuse and integration of parallel development efforts without retraining. However, in practice we observe that merging does not always succeed: certain combinations of task-specialist models suffer from catastrophic performance degradation after merging. We refer to this failure mode as merging collapse. Intuitively, collapse arises when the learned representations or parameter adjustments for different tasks are fundamentally incompatible, so that merging forces destructive interference rather than synergy. In this paper, we identify and characterize the phenomenon of task-level merging collapse, where certain task combinations consistently trigger huge performance degradation across all merging methods. Through extensive experiments and statistical analysis, we demonstrate that representational incompatibility between tasks is strongly correlated with merging collapse, while parameter-space conflict metrics show minimal correlation, challenging conventional wisdom in model merging literature. We provide a theoretical explanation on this phenomenon through rate-distortion theory with a dimension-dependent bound, establishing fundamental limits on task mergeability regardless of methodology.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了大模型合并过程中出现的‘合并崩溃’现象，即某些任务特化模型在合并后性能急剧下降。研究表明，这种崩溃与任务间的表征不兼容性密切相关，而与参数空间冲突关系不大，挑战了现有合并方法的普遍认知。作者基于率失真理论提出了一个维度相关的理论边界，揭示了任务合并性的根本限制。
AI.motivation: 现有模型合并方法在某些任务组合下会出现性能灾难性下降，称为合并崩溃。尽管已有研究关注参数空间冲突，但对根本原因缺乏深入理解，亟需系统分析和理论解释。
AI.method: 通过大规模实验和统计分析，对比不同任务组合下的合并表现，评估表征兼容性和参数空间冲突指标的相关性，并基于率失真理论构建理论框架，推导出任务合并的维度依赖边界。
AI.result: 发现表征不兼容性是导致合并崩溃的关键因素，而参数空间冲突相关性较弱；理论分析表明，任务合并存在固有极限，无法通过任何方法完全克服。
AI.conclusion: 合并崩溃源于任务间表征的根本不兼容，而非参数冲突；任务合并能力受制于理论上的维度依赖边界，未来方法需考虑任务表示的兼容性设计。

title: EPIC-EuroParl-UdS: Information-Theoretic Perspectives on Translation and Interpreting
comment: 16 pages with appendices, 8 figures to be published in LREC-2026 main conference proceedings
summary: This paper introduces an updated and combined version of the bidirectional English-German EPIC-UdS (spoken) and EuroParl-UdS (written) corpora containing original European Parliament speeches as well as their translations and interpretations. The new version corrects metadata and text errors identified through previous use, refines the content, updates linguistic annotations, and adds new layers, including word alignment and word-level surprisal indices. The combined resource is designed to support research using information-theoretic approaches to language variation, particularly studies comparing written and spoken modes, and examining disfluencies in speech, as well as traditional translationese studies, including parallel (source vs. target) and comparable (original vs. translated) analyses. The paper outlines the updates introduced in this release, summarises previous results based on the corpus, and presents a new illustrative study. The study validates the integrity of the rebuilt spoken data and evaluates probabilistic measures derived from base and fine-tuned GPT-2 and machine translation models on the task of filler particles prediction in interpreting.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了更新并整合的英德双语EPIC-UdS（口语）和EuroParl-UdS（书面）语料库的新版本，修正了先前发现的元数据和文本错误，优化内容，更新语言标注，并新增词对齐和词级意外度指数等层次。该资源旨在支持基于信息论方法的语言变异研究，如对比书面与口语模式、分析言语不流畅现象，以及传统翻译风格研究。论文概述了此次更新内容，总结了以往研究成果，并展示了一项新示范研究，验证了重建口语数据的可靠性，并评估了基于基础和微调GPT-2及机器翻译模型的概率性指标在预测口译中填充词任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 为了支持更精确的信息理论驱动的语言变异研究，特别是对比书面与口语差异、分析言语不流畅现象，以及开展传统的翻译风格研究，需要一个高质量、结构完善且标注丰富的多模态双语语料库。此前版本存在元数据与文本错误，标注不完整，限制了研究深度与准确性，因此亟需系统性更新与增强。
AI.method: 通过识别并修正原始语料库中的元数据与文本错误，优化内容结构；更新并扩展语言学标注，包括添加词对齐信息与词级意外度指数；整合口语与书面语料，构建统一资源；利用基础与微调的GPT-2模型及机器翻译系统，构建概率模型以预测口译中的填充词，并通过实证研究验证数据质量与模型性能。
AI.result: 新版本语料库显著提升了数据质量与可用性，有效支持多种语言研究任务；示范研究表明，重建的口语数据具有较高完整性，基于GPT-2和机器翻译模型的概率指标在预测填充词方面表现出良好效果，验证了语料库与方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本次更新后的语料库是一个高质量、多层次、适用于多种语言研究的资源，尤其在对比口语与书面语、研究翻译风格及言语不流畅现象方面具有重要价值。其可靠性和扩展性为未来信息论与自然语言处理研究提供了坚实基础。

title: Progressive Representation Learning for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis with Incomplete Modalities
summary: Multimodal Sentiment Analysis (MSA) seeks to infer human emotions by integrating textual, acoustic, and visual cues. However, existing approaches often rely on all modalities are completeness, whereas real-world applications frequently encounter noise, hardware failures, or privacy restrictions that result in missing modalities. There exists a significant feature misalignment between incomplete and complete modalities, and directly fusing them may even distort the well-learned representations of the intact modalities. To this end, we propose PRLF, a Progressive Representation Learning Framework designed for MSA under uncertain missing-modality conditions. PRLF introduces an Adaptive Modality Reliability Estimator (AMRE), which dynamically quantifies the reliability of each modality using recognition confidence and Fisher information to determine the dominant modality. In addition, the Progressive Interaction (ProgInteract) module iteratively aligns the other modalities with the dominant one, thereby enhancing cross-modal consistency while suppressing noise. Extensive experiments on CMU-MOSI, CMU-MOSEI, and SIMS verify that PRLF outperforms state-of-the-art methods across both inter- and intra-modality missing scenarios, demonstrating its robustness and generalization capability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRLF框架，用于在模态缺失不确定情况下的多模态情感分析。通过自适应模态可靠性估计器（AMRE）动态评估各模态可靠性，并利用渐进式交互模块（ProgInteract）对齐非主导模态与主导模态，提升跨模态一致性并抑制噪声。在CMU-MOSI、CMU-MOSEI和SIMS数据集上的实验表明，该方法在跨模态和同模态缺失场景下均优于现有先进方法，具备强鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 真实世界中多模态情感分析常面临模态缺失问题，如噪声、硬件故障或隐私限制，而现有方法通常假设所有模态完整，导致特征错位，直接融合会破坏已学习的完整模态表示。因此需要一种能应对不完全模态输入的鲁棒框架。
AI.method: 提出渐进式表示学习框架PRLF，包含自适应模态可靠性估计器（AMRE）和渐进式交互模块（ProgInteract）。AMRE结合识别置信度与Fisher信息动态评估模态可靠性，确定主导模态；ProgInteract则迭代对齐其他模态至主导模态，增强一致性并抑制噪声。
AI.result: 在CMU-MOSI、CMU-MOSEI和SIMS数据集上，PRLF在多种缺失模式下均取得最优性能，显著优于当前主流方法，证明其在处理不完整模态时具有优异的鲁棒性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: PRLF能够有效应对多模态情感分析中的不确定性模态缺失问题，通过可靠性的动态评估与渐进式对齐机制，实现更稳定、准确的情感推断，为实际应用提供了强有力的技术支持。

title: Probabilistic Hysteresis Factor Prediction for Electric Vehicle Batteries with Graphite Anodes Containing Silicon
summary: Batteries with silicon-graphite-based anodes, which offer higher energy density and improved charging performance, introduce pronounced voltage hysteresis, making state-of-charge (SoC) estimation particularly challenging. Existing approaches to modeling hysteresis rely on exhaustive high-fidelity tests or focus on conventional graphite-based lithium-ion batteries, without considering uncertainty quantification or computational constraints. This work introduces a data-driven approach for probabilistic hysteresis factor prediction, with a particular emphasis on applications involving silicon-graphite anode-based batteries. A data harmonization framework is proposed to standardize heterogeneous driving cycles across varying operating conditions. Statistical learning and deep learning models are applied to assess performance in predicting the hysteresis factor with uncertainties while considering computational efficiency. Extensive experiments are conducted to evaluate the generalizability of the optimal model configuration in unseen vehicle models through retraining, zero-shot prediction, fine-tuning, and joint training. By addressing key challenges in SoC estimation, this research facilitates the adoption of advanced battery technologies. A summary page is available at: https://runyao-yu.github.io/Porsche_Hysteresis_Factor_Prediction/

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种数据驱动的概率滞环因子预测方法，针对硅-石墨负极电池的显著电压滞环问题，通过数据标准化框架处理不同工况下的异构驾驶循环，结合统计学习与深度学习模型，在考虑计算效率的同时实现滞环因子的不确定性量化预测。通过重训练、零样本预测、微调和联合训练等多种实验验证了模型在未见车型上的泛化能力，有效支持高能量密度电池的荷电状态（SoC）估计，推动先进电池技术的应用。
AI.motivation: 硅-石墨负极电池虽具更高能量密度和充电性能，但其显著的电压滞环使荷电状态（SoC）估计面临挑战；现有建模方法依赖高保真测试或仅适用于传统石墨电池，缺乏对不确定性的量化及计算效率考量，亟需高效且鲁棒的新型建模方法。
AI.method: 提出数据谐化框架以统一异构驾驶循环；采用统计学习与深度学习模型进行滞环因子预测；通过重训练、零样本预测、微调和联合训练评估模型泛化能力；综合考虑预测精度与计算效率。
AI.result: 所提方法在多种未见车辆模型上展现出良好泛化性能，成功实现对硅-石墨电池滞环因子的概率性预测，并量化了不确定性，显著提升SoC估计的可靠性，同时满足实际应用中的计算约束。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为硅-石墨基锂离子电池的荷电状态估计提供了高效、可推广的数据驱动解决方案，克服了传统方法在建模复杂性、不确定性处理和计算成本方面的局限，推动了高性能电池技术的实际应用。

title: One-Eval: An Agentic System for Automated and Traceable LLM Evaluation
summary: Reliable evaluation is essential for developing and deploying large language models, yet in practice it often requires substantial manual effort: practitioners must identify appropriate benchmarks, reproduce heterogeneous evaluation codebases, configure dataset schema mappings, and interpret aggregated metrics. To address these challenges, we present One-Eval, an agentic evaluation system that converts natural-language evaluation requests into executable, traceable, and customizable evaluation workflows. One-Eval integrates (i) NL2Bench for intent structuring and personalized benchmark planning, (ii) BenchResolve for benchmark resolution, automatic dataset acquisition, and schema normalization to ensure executability, and (iii) Metrics \& Reporting for task-aware metric selection and decision-oriented reporting beyond scalar scores. The system further incorporates human-in-the-loop checkpoints for review, editing, and rollback, while preserving sample evidence trails for debugging and auditability. Experiments show that One-Eval can execute end-to-end evaluations from diverse natural-language requests with minimal user effort, supporting more efficient and reproducible evaluation in industrial settings. Our framework is publicly available at https://github.com/OpenDCAI/One-Eval.

AI.tldr: One-Eval 是一个智能评估系统，将自然语言评估请求转化为可执行、可追溯且可定制的评估工作流，通过NL2Bench进行意图结构化与个性化基准规划，BenchResolve实现基准解析、自动数据集获取与模式归一化以确保可执行性，Metrics & Reporting则支持任务感知的指标选择和面向决策的报告。系统还引入人机协同检查点以支持审查、编辑与回滚，并保留样本证据链以供调试与审计。实验表明，One-Eval 能够从多样化的自然语言请求中端到端完成评估，显著降低用户投入，提升工业场景下的评估效率与可复现性。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型的可靠评估依赖大量手动操作，包括选择基准、复现异构代码库、配置数据集模式映射及解释聚合指标，耗时且易出错。亟需自动化、可追溯、可定制的评估流程以提升效率与一致性。
AI.method: 提出One-Eval系统，包含三个核心模块：(i) NL2Bench用于自然语言到评估意图的结构化与个性化基准规划；(ii) BenchResolve实现基准解析、自动数据获取与模式归一化；(iii) Metrics & Reporting支持任务感知的指标选择与决策导向的报告生成。系统集成人机协同检查点与证据链追踪机制。
AI.result: One-Eval能从自然语言请求出发，高效完成端到端评估，大幅减少用户干预，支持更高效、可复现的工业级评估实践。
AI.conclusion: One-Eval为大语言模型评估提供了一种自动化、可追溯、可定制的解决方案，显著降低评估门槛，提升评估过程的效率与可信度，已在开源平台发布。

title: QUSR: Quality-Aware and Uncertainty-Guided Image Super-Resolution Diffusion Model
comment: This paper has been accepted by ICASSP 2026
summary: Diffusion-based image super-resolution (ISR) has shown strong potential, but it still struggles in real-world scenarios where degradations are unknown and spatially non-uniform, often resulting in lost details or visual artifacts. To address this challenge, we propose a novel super-resolution diffusion model, QUSR, which integrates a Quality-Aware Prior (QAP) with an Uncertainty-Guided Noise Generation (UNG) module. The UNG module adaptively adjusts the noise injection intensity, applying stronger perturbations to high-uncertainty regions (e.g., edges and textures) to reconstruct complex details, while minimizing noise in low-uncertainty regions (e.g., flat areas) to preserve original information. Concurrently, the QAP leverages an advanced Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) to generate reliable quality descriptions, providing an effective and interpretable quality prior for the restoration process. Experimental results confirm that QUSR can produce high-fidelity and high-realism images in real-world scenarios. The source code is available at https://github.com/oTvTog/QUSR.

AI.tldr: QUSR提出一种新的基于扩散的图像超分辨率模型，通过引入质量感知先验（QAP）和不确定性引导噪声生成（UNG）模块，有效应对真实场景中未知且空间非均匀退化的挑战。UNG模块自适应调节噪声强度，在高不确定性区域（如边缘和纹理）施加强扰动以恢复复杂细节，同时在低不确定性区域（如平坦区域）减少噪声以保护原始信息。QAP利用先进的多模态大语言模型（MLLM）生成可靠的图像质量描述，提供可解释的质量先验。实验表明，QUSR在真实场景下能生成高保真、高真实感的图像。代码已开源。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散的图像超分辨率方法在真实世界场景中表现不佳，因退化类型未知且空间分布不均，导致细节丢失或出现视觉伪影。需要更智能的机制来适应复杂退化并提升重建质量。
AI.method: 提出QUSR模型，结合不确定性引导噪声生成（UNG）模块与质量感知先验（QAP）。UNG模块根据区域不确定性动态调整噪声注入强度；QAP利用多模态大语言模型（MLLM）生成图像质量描述，作为可解释的先验指导修复过程。
AI.result: QUSR在真实世界图像超分辨率任务中表现出色，能够生成高保真度和高真实感的图像，有效缓解细节丢失与视觉伪影问题。
AI.conclusion: QUSR通过融合不确定性引导噪声控制与基于MLLM的质量先验，显著提升了扩散模型在复杂真实退化条件下的图像超分辨率性能，具备良好的实用性和可解释性。

title: GenePlan: Evolving Better Generalized PDDL Plans using Large Language Models
summary: We present GenePlan (GENeralized Evolutionary Planner), a novel framework that leverages large language model (LLM) assisted evolutionary algorithms to generate domain-dependent generalized planners for classical planning tasks described in PDDL. By casting generalized planning as an optimization problem, GenePlan iteratively evolves interpretable Python planners that minimize plan length across diverse problem instances. In empirical evaluation across six existing benchmark domains and two new domains, GenePlan achieved an average SAT score of 0.91, closely matching the performance of the state-of-the-art planners (SAT score 0.93), and significantly outperforming other LLM-based baselines such as chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting (average SAT score 0.64). The generated planners solve new instances rapidly (average 0.49 seconds per task) and at low cost (average $1.82 per domain using GPT-4o).

AI.tldr: GenePlan 是一种利用大语言模型（LLM）辅助的进化算法来生成经典规划任务中领域相关的通用规划器的新框架。它将通用规划问题转化为优化问题，通过迭代演化可解释的 Python 规划器，以最小化在多种问题实例中的计划长度。在六个现有基准领域和两个新领域的实验评估中，GenePlan 的平均 SAT 得分为 0.91，接近最先进规划器的 0.93，并显著优于其他基于 LLM 的基线方法（如 CoT 提示法，平均 SAT 得分为 0.64）。生成的规划器能够快速求解新实例（每任务平均耗时 0.49 秒），且成本较低（每个领域平均使用 GPT-4o 花费 1.82 美元）。
AI.motivation: 传统通用规划方法在面对多样化问题实例时表现不佳，而现有的基于大语言模型的方法虽然具备一定潜力，但缺乏系统性优化和可解释性。因此，需要一种结合进化算法与大语言模型优势的新型框架，以生成高效、可解释且泛化能力强的通用规划器。
AI.method: GenePlan 将通用规划建模为一个优化问题，利用大语言模型生成初始规划代码，并通过进化算法（如遗传算法）迭代优化这些代码，目标是最小化在多个问题实例上的计划长度。每一代中，规划器通过测试不同实例的表现进行评估，优胜者被保留并用于生成下一代。整个过程结合了 LLM 的创造力与进化算法的搜索能力，最终获得性能优异且可解释的 Python 规划器。
AI.result: 在六个现有基准领域和两个新领域上，GenePlan 实现了平均 SAT 得分 0.91，接近最先进规划器的 0.93，显著优于基于链式思维提示的 LLM 方法（平均得分为 0.64）。此外，生成的规划器在新实例上平均仅需 0.49 秒即可完成求解，且每域平均成本仅为 1.82 美元（使用 GPT-4o），展现出高效率与低成本特性。
AI.conclusion: GenePlan 成功展示了将大语言模型与进化算法相结合在通用规划任务中的有效性，不仅实现了接近顶尖性能，还具备良好的可解释性、快速推理能力和经济可行性，为未来自动化规划器生成提供了新的方向。

title: Decoupling Reasoning and Confidence: Resurrecting Calibration in Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards
summary: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) significantly enhances large language models (LLMs) reasoning but severely suffers from calibration degeneration, where models become excessively over-confident in incorrect answers. Previous studies devote to directly incorporating calibration objective into existing optimization target. However, our theoretical analysis demonstrates that there exists a fundamental gradient conflict between the optimization for maximizing policy accuracy and minimizing calibration error. Building on this insight, we propose DCPO, a simple yet effective framework that systematically decouples reasoning and calibration objectives. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our DCPO not only preserves accuracy on par with GRPO but also achieves the best calibration performance and substantially mitigates the over-confidence issue. Our study provides valuable insights and practical solution for more reliable LLM deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DCPO框架，通过解耦推理与校准目标，有效缓解大语言模型在强化学习中因奖励可验证性导致的过度自信问题，同时保持高精度并显著提升校准性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在优化准确率和校准误差时存在根本性的梯度冲突，导致模型过度自信，亟需一种能系统解耦二者的目标框架。
AI.method: 基于理论分析发现梯度冲突，提出DCPO框架，将推理与校准目标分离优化，避免相互干扰。
AI.result: 实验表明DCPO在保持与GRPO相当的准确率的同时，显著改善校准性能，有效缓解过度自信问题。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为大语言模型的可靠部署提供了重要洞察与实用解决方案，强调解耦优化目标对提升模型可信度的关键作用。

title: Chow-Liu Ordering for Long-Context Reasoning in Chain-of-Agents
comment: Published as a workshop paper at ICLR 2026 Workshop MemAgents
summary:
Sequential multi-agent reasoning frameworks such as Chain-of-Agents (CoA) handle long-context queries by decomposing inputs into chunks and processing them sequentially using LLM-based worker agents that read from and update a bounded shared memory. From a probabilistic perspective, CoA aims to approximate the conditional distribution corresponding to a model capable of jointly reasoning over the entire long context. CoA achieves this through a latent-state factorization in which only bounded summaries of previously processed evidence are passed between agents. The resulting bounded-memory approximation introduces a lossy information bottleneck, making the final evidence state inherently dependent on the order in which chunks are processed.
  In this work, we study the problem of chunk ordering for long-context reasoning. We use the well-known Chow-Liu trees to learn a dependency structure that prioritizes strongly related chunks. Empirically, we show that a breadth-first traversal of the resulting tree yields chunk orderings that reduce information loss across agents and consistently outperform both default document-chunk ordering and semantic score-based ordering in answer relevance and exact-match accuracy across three long-context benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究长上下文推理中分块顺序对信息损失的影响，提出使用Chow-Liu树学习块之间的依赖关系，并通过广度优先遍历生成分块顺序，显著提升答案相关性和精确匹配率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多智能体的长上下文推理框架（如CoA）因受限于共享内存大小，采用分块处理并按顺序传递摘要，导致信息丢失，且结果依赖于分块顺序。因此需要优化分块顺序以减少信息损失。
AI.method: 利用Chow-Liu树学习各分块间的依赖结构，基于该结构进行广度优先遍历，生成最优分块顺序，从而减少信息瓶颈带来的损失。
AI.result: 在三个长上下文基准测试中，所提方法在答案相关性和精确匹配准确率上均优于默认文档顺序和基于语义得分的排序方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过学习分块间的依赖关系并采用广度优先遍历生成顺序，能够有效降低信息损失，提升长上下文推理性能。

title: Transformer-Based Multi-Region Segmentation and Radiomic Analysis of HR-pQCT Imaging
summary: Osteoporosis is a skeletal disease typically diagnosed using dual-energy X-ray absorptiometry (DXA), which quantifies areal bone mineral density but overlooks bone microarchitecture and surrounding soft tissues. High-resolution peripheral quantitative computed tomography (HR-pQCT) enables three-dimensional microstructural imaging with minimal radiation. However, current analysis pipelines largely focus on mineralized bone compartments, leaving much of the acquired image data underutilized. We introduce a fully automated framework for binary osteoporosis classification using radiomics features extracted from anatomically segmented HR-pQCT images. To our knowledge, this work is the first to leverage a transformer-based segmentation architecture, i.e., the SegFormer, for fully automated multi-region HR-pQCT analysis. The SegFormer model simultaneously delineated the cortical and trabecular bone of the tibia and fibula along with surrounding soft tissues and achieved a mean F1 score of 95.36%. Soft tissues were further subdivided into skin, myotendinous, and adipose regions through post-processing. From each region, 939 radiomic features were extracted and dimensionally reduced to train six machine learning classifiers on an independent dataset comprising 20,496 images from 122 HR-pQCT scans. The best image level performance was achieved using myotendinous tissue features, yielding an accuracy of 80.08% and an area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUROC) of 0.85, outperforming bone-based models. At the patient level, replacing standard biological, DXA, and HR-pQCT parameters with soft tissue radiomics improved AUROC from 0.792 to 0.875. These findings demonstrate that automated, multi-region HR-pQCT segmentation enables the extraction of clinically informative signals beyond bone alone, highlighting the importance of integrated tissue assessment for osteoporosis detection.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种基于HR-pQCT图像的全自动二分类框架，利用分割模型SegFormer对胫骨、腓骨及其周围软组织进行多区域自动分割，并提取各区域的放射组学特征。通过降维后训练多种机器学习分类器，在图像层面，肌腱组织特征表现最佳（准确率80.08%，AUROC 0.85）；在患者层面，使用软组织放射组学特征可将AUROC从0.792提升至0.875，优于传统骨密度指标。
AI.motivation: 现有HR-pQCT分析主要聚焦于骨组织，忽略了软组织信息，而软组织可能包含与骨质疏松相关的临床信号。因此，亟需一种能全面利用多组织信息的自动化分析方法以提高诊断准确性。
AI.method: 采用SegFormer Transformer架构实现多区域（皮下、肌腱、脂肪等）全自动分割；从每个区域提取939个放射组学特征并进行降维；使用122例受试者的20,496张图像数据训练六种机器学习分类器，分别评估图像级和患者级分类性能。
AI.result: 图像级别上，肌腱组织特征表现最优（准确率80.08%，AUROC 0.85）；患者级别上，引入软组织放射组学使AUROC从0.792提升至0.875，显著优于传统生物标志物及骨密度参数。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次将Transformer-based SegFormer应用于HR-pQCT多区域分割，证明软组织中蕴含丰富的临床信息，支持在骨质疏松诊断中开展整合性组织评估，具有重要临床转化潜力。

title: Vibe-Creation: The Epistemology of Human-AI Emergent Cognition
summary: The encounter between human reasoning and generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) cannot be adequately described by inherited metaphors of tool use, augmentation, or collaborative partnership. This article argues that such interactions produce a qualitatively distinct cognitive-epistemic formation, designated here as the Third Entity: an emergent, transient structure that arises from the transductive coupling of two ontologically incommensurable modes of cognition. Drawing on Peirce semiotics, Polanyi theory of tacit knowledge, Simondon philosophy of individuation, Ihde postphenomenology, and Morin complexity theory, we develop a multi-layered theoretical account of this formation. We introduce the concept of vibe-creation to designate the pre-reflective cognitive mode through which the Third Entity navigates high-dimensional semantic space and argue that this mode constitutes the automation of tacit knowledge - a development with far-reaching consequences for epistemology, the philosophy of mind, and educational theory. We further propose the notion of asymmetric emergence to characterize the agency of the Third Entity: genuinely novel and irreducible, yet anchored in human intentional responsibility. The article concludes by examining the implications of this theoretical framework for the transformation of educational institutions and the redefinition of intellectual competence in the age of GenAI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出人类推理与生成式人工智能（GenAI）的互动产生了一种新型认知-认识论结构，称为“第三实体”——一种由两种本体上不相容的认知模式通过转导耦合而产生的临时性结构。文章结合皮尔士符号学、波兰尼的默会知识理论、西蒙东的个体化哲学、伊德的后现象学及莫林的复杂性理论，构建多层理论框架，并引入“氛围创造”概念，描述该实体在高维语义空间中导航的前反思认知模式，认为这是默会知识的自动化，对认识论、心智哲学和教育理论具有深远影响。同时提出“非对称涌现”以刻画第三实体的能动性：真正新颖且不可还原，但根植于人类意图责任。最后探讨了该框架对教育机构转型及智能能力重新定义的意义。
AI.motivation: 传统工具使用、增强或协作伙伴关系等隐喻无法充分描述人类推理与生成式人工智能之间的互动。随着GenAI的发展，这种互动催生出一种新的认知-认识论形态，亟需一个全新的理论框架来理解其本质和影响。
AI.method: 综合运用皮尔士符号学、波兰尼默会知识理论、西蒙东个体化哲学、伊德后现象学以及莫林复杂性理论，构建一个多层理论模型；提出‘氛围创造’作为前反思认知模式，用以解释第三实体如何在高维语义空间中运作；引入‘非对称涌现’概念以界定其能动性特征。
AI.result: 揭示了人类与GenAI互动中形成的‘第三实体’是一种临时、新兴、不可还原的认知结构；证明了‘氛围创造’是默会知识自动化的体现；阐明了第三实体虽具独立性，但始终依赖于人类意图责任；为教育变革和智能能力重构提供了理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 该理论框架不仅深化了对人机认知关系的理解，还为未来教育制度的转型和智力能力标准的再定义提供了关键洞见，标志着认知范式的根本转变。

title: N-gram-like Language Models Predict Reading Time Best
summary: Recent work has found that contemporary language models such as transformers can become so good at next-word prediction that the probabilities they calculate become worse for predicting reading time. In this paper, we propose that this can be explained by reading time being sensitive to simple n-gram statistics rather than the more complex statistics learned by state-of-the-art transformer language models. We demonstrate that the neural language models whose predictions are most correlated with n-gram probability are also those that calculate probabilities that are the most correlated with eye-tracking-based metrics of reading time on naturalistic text.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了现代语言模型（如Transformer）在预测下一个词时，其概率计算与阅读时间预测之间的脱节现象，并提出该现象可归因于阅读时间对简单n-gram统计的敏感性，而非复杂模型所学习的高级统计特征。研究发现，与n-gram概率相关性最高的神经语言模型，其概率预测也最能解释眼动追踪数据中的阅读时间指标。
AI.motivation: 探究为何先进的语言模型在预测阅读时间方面表现不佳，尽管它们在下一个词预测任务上非常出色。
AI.method: 通过分析语言模型的概率输出与n-gram统计的相关性，以及这些概率与眼动追踪数据中阅读时间指标的关联性，进行实证研究。
AI.result: 与n-gram概率高度相关的语言模型，其预测概率也与自然文本上的阅读时间指标有最强的相关性。
AI.conclusion: 阅读时间主要受简单n-gram统计影响，而非深度语言模型所捕捉的复杂语言结构，因此当前语言模型的概率预测在阅读时间建模上存在局限性。

title: Rotation Equivariant Mamba for Vision Tasks
summary: Rotation equivariance constitutes one of the most general and crucial structural priors for visual data, yet it remains notably absent from current Mamba-based vision architectures. Despite the success of Mamba in natural language processing and its growing adoption in computer vision, existing visual Mamba models fail to account for rotational symmetry in their design. This omission renders them inherently sensitive to image rotations, thereby constraining their robustness and cross-task generalization. To address this limitation, we propose to incorporate rotation symmetry, a universal and fundamental geometric prior in images, into Mamba-based architectures. Specifically, we introduce EQ-VMamba, the first rotation equivariant visual Mamba architecture for vision tasks. The core components of EQ-VMamba include a carefully designed rotation equivariant cross-scan strategy and group Mamba blocks. Moreover, we provide a rigorous theoretical analysis of the intrinsic equivariance error, demonstrating that the proposed architecture enforces end-to-end rotation equivariance throughout the network. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks - including high-level image classification task, mid-level semantic segmentation task, and low-level image super-resolution task - demonstrate that EQ-VMamba achieves superior or competitive performance compared to non-equivariant baselines, while requiring approximately 50% fewer parameters. These results indicate that embedding rotation equivariance not only effectively bolsters the robustness of visual Mamba models against rotation transformations, but also enhances overall performance with significantly improved parameter efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/zhongchenzhao/EQ-VMamba.

AI.tldr: This paper proposes EQ-VMamba, the first rotation equivariant visual Mamba architecture that incorporates rotational symmetry as a geometric prior. It introduces a rotation-equivariant cross-scan strategy and group Mamba blocks, ensuring end-to-end equivariance with theoretical guarantees. Experiments show superior or competitive performance across classification, segmentation, and super-resolution tasks, with ~50% fewer parameters.
AI.motivation: Current Mamba-based vision models lack rotation equivariance, making them sensitive to image rotations and limiting robustness and generalization. This work addresses the absence of rotational symmetry in visual Mamba designs.
AI.method: Proposes EQ-VMamba with a rotation-equivariant cross-scan strategy and group Mamba blocks, supported by theoretical analysis of equivariance error to ensure end-to-end rotation equivariance.
AI.result: EQ-VMamba achieves state-of-the-art or competitive performance on multiple vision tasks (classification, segmentation, super-resolution) while using approximately 50% fewer parameters than non-equivariant baselines.
AI.conclusion: Incorporating rotation equivariance into Mamba-based vision models significantly improves robustness, performance, and parameter efficiency, establishing a new paradigm for geometrically principled design in visual Mamba architectures.

title: Enhancing Debunking Effectiveness through LLM-based Personality Adaptation
comment: In: Computational Intelligence. IJCCI 2025. Springer, Cham (2026)
summary: This study proposes a novel methodology for generating personalized fake news debunking messages by prompting Large Language Models (LLMs) with persona-based inputs aligned to the Big Five personality traits: Extraversion, Agreeableness, Conscientiousness, Neuroticism, and Openness. Our approach guides LLMs to transform generic debunking content into personalized versions tailored to specific personality profiles. To assess the effectiveness of these transformations, we employ a separate LLM as an automated evaluator simulating corresponding personality traits, thereby eliminating the need for costly human evaluation panels. Our results show that personalized messages are generally seen as more persuasive than generic ones. We also find that traits like Openness tend to increase persuadability, while Neuroticism can lower it. Differences between LLM evaluators suggest that using multiple models provides a clearer picture. Overall, this work demonstrates a practical way to create more targeted debunking messages exploiting LLMs, while also raising important ethical questions about how such technology might be used.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出一种基于大语言模型（LLM）生成个性化假新闻辟谣信息的新方法，通过与五大性格特质（外向性、宜人性、尽责性、神经质、开放性）对齐的个性提示，将通用辟谣内容转化为针对特定人格特征的个性化版本。采用另一独立LLM作为自动化评估器模拟相应人格特质，避免了昂贵的人类评估成本。结果显示个性化消息普遍比通用消息更具说服力，其中开放性提升说服力，而神经质则降低说服力。多模型评估结果差异表明使用多个模型能更全面反映效果。本研究展示了利用LLM实现精准辟谣的可行性，同时也引发关于技术伦理的重要讨论。
AI.motivation: 传统假新闻辟谣信息往往采用通用化表达，难以有效触达不同性格特征的受众。为提升辟谣信息的针对性和说服力，需探索个性化策略。同时，人工评估成本高昂且效率低下，亟需高效自动化评估手段。因此，研究旨在开发一种结合人格特质的个性化辟谣生成与自动化评估框架，以提高辟谣传播效能并降低成本。
AI.method: 首先，基于大语言模型（LLM）构建个性提示模板，将五大人格特质（外向性、宜人性、尽责性、神经质、开放性）融入输入语境；其次，利用这些提示引导LLM生成针对不同人格特征的个性化辟谣文本；随后，设计一个独立的多模型评估系统，每个评估模型模拟一种人格特质，自动判断生成内容的说服力；最后，通过对比不同人格下生成内容的评估得分，分析个性因素对辟谣效果的影响。
AI.result: 个性化辟谣消息在多数情况下比通用版本更具说服力；开放性特质的个体更容易被说服，而神经质特质者则表现出较低的可说服性；多模型评估结果呈现互补性，表明单一模型可能产生偏差，综合多模型评估能获得更可靠结论。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明了基于人格特质的个性化假新闻辟谣信息生成具有显著优势，能够有效提升辟谣信息的传播效果。同时，通过自动化评估机制降低了人力成本，提升了评估效率。然而，该技术潜在的滥用风险也引发了重要伦理问题，如操纵公众认知等，需在未来研究中加强监管与规范。

title: Wrong Code, Right Structure: Learning Netlist Representations from Imperfect LLM-Generated RTL
summary: Learning effective netlist representations is fundamentally constrained by the scarcity of labeled datasets, as real designs are protected by Intellectual Property (IP) and costly to annotate. Existing work therefore focuses on small-scale circuits with clean labels, limiting scalability to realistic designs. Meanwhile, Large Language Models (LLMs) can generate Register-Transfer-Level (RTL) at scale, but their functional incorrectness has hindered their use in circuit analysis. In this work, we make a key observation: even when LLM-Generated RTL is functionally imperfect, the synthesized netlists still preserve structural patterns that are strongly indicative of the intended functionality. Building on this insight, we propose a cost-effective data augmentation and training framework that systematically exploits imperfect LLM-Generated RTL as training data for netlist representation learning, forming an end-to-end pipeline from automated code generation to downstream tasks. We conduct evaluations on circuit functional understanding tasks, including sub-circuit boundary identification and component classification, across benchmarks of increasing scales, extending the task scope from operator-level to IP-level. The evaluations demonstrate that models trained on our noisy synthetic corpus generalize well to real-world netlists, matching or even surpassing methods trained on scarce high-quality data and effectively breaking the data bottleneck in circuit representation learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用功能不完美的LLM生成RTL来增强电路网表表示学习的数据增强框架，通过合成数据中的结构模式实现对真实电路的高效泛化，有效突破了高质量标注数据稀缺的瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 真实电路设计受知识产权保护且标注成本高，导致高质量标注数据稀缺；现有方法受限于小规模、干净标签电路，难以扩展到实际设计；尽管LLM可大规模生成RTL，但其功能性错误阻碍了应用。
AI.method: 基于观察：即使LLM生成的RTL功能不完全正确，其综合出的网表仍保留能指示意图功能的结构模式，提出一个从自动化代码生成到下游任务的端到端框架，利用噪声合成数据训练模型。
AI.result: 在不同规模的基准上评估了子电路边界识别和组件分类等任务，模型在真实网表上的表现与甚至超过使用少量高质量数据训练的方法，证明了该方法在真实场景下的强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过系统性利用不完美但大规模的合成数据，显著缓解了电路表示学习中的数据瓶颈问题，为大规模电路分析提供了可行路径。

title: Do What I Say: A Spoken Prompt Dataset for Instruction-Following
summary: Speech Large Language Models (SLLMs) have rapidly expanded, supporting a wide range of tasks. These models are typically evaluated using text prompts, which may not reflect real-world scenarios where users interact with speech. To address this gap, we introduce DoWhatISay (DOWIS), a multilingual dataset of human-recorded spoken and written prompts designed to pair with any existing benchmark for realistic evaluation of SLLMs under spoken instruction conditions. Spanning 9 tasks and 11 languages, it provides 10 prompt variants per task-language pair, across five styles. Using DOWIS, we benchmark state-of-the-art SLLMs, analyzing the interplay between prompt modality, style, language, and task type. Results show that text prompts consistently outperform spoken prompts, particularly for low-resource and cross-lingual settings. Only for tasks with speech output, spoken prompts do close the gap, highlighting the need for speech-based prompting in SLLM evaluation.

AI.tldr: 提出DOWIS数据集，用于在真实语音指令条件下评估语音大语言模型（SLLMs），涵盖9个任务、11种语言，每对任务-语言有10种提示变体和5种风格。实验表明，文本提示在大多数情况下优于语音提示，尤其在低资源和跨语言场景中；仅当任务涉及语音输出时，语音提示表现接近文本提示，凸显语音提示评估的重要性。
AI.motivation: 现有SLLM评估多依赖文本提示，无法反映真实用户通过语音交互的场景，需引入更贴近实际的语音指令评估方式。
AI.method: 构建DOWIS数据集，包含人类录制的语音与文本提示，覆盖多语言、多任务、多风格，用于在真实语音条件下评估SLLMs，并分析提示模态、风格、语言和任务类型的影响。
AI.result: 文本提示在多数任务中表现优于语音提示，尤其在低资源和跨语言设置下差距明显；仅当任务需要语音输出时，语音提示性能接近文本提示。
AI.conclusion: 为实现更真实的SLLM评估，应重视语音提示的作用，特别是在语音输出任务中，未来评估需纳入语音指令条件。

title: GIAT: A Geologically-Informed Attention Transformer for Lithology Identification
summary: Accurate lithology identification from well logs is crucial for subsurface resource evaluation. Although Transformer-based models excel at sequence modeling, their "black-box" nature and lack of geological guidance limit their performance and trustworthiness. To overcome these limitations, this letter proposes the Geologically-Informed Attention Transformer (GIAT), a novel framework that deeply fuses data-driven geological priors with the Transformer's attention mechanism. The core of GIAT is a new attention-biasing mechanism. We repurpose Category-Wise Sequence Correlation (CSC) filters to generate a geologically-informed relational matrix, which is injected into the self-attention calculation to explicitly guide the model toward geologically coherent patterns. On two challenging datasets, GIAT achieves state-of-the-art performance with an accuracy of up to 95.4%, significantly outperforming existing models. More importantly, GIAT demonstrates exceptional interpretation faithfulness under input perturbations and generates geologically coherent predictions. Our work presents a new paradigm for building more accurate, reliable, and interpretable deep learning models for geoscience applications.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为地质信息注意力变压器（GIAT）的新框架，通过将地质先验知识融入Transformer的注意力机制，显著提升岩性识别的准确性与可解释性。该方法利用类别相关序列相关性（CSC）滤波器生成地质引导的关系矩阵，并注入自注意力计算中，使模型更符合地质规律。在两个挑战性数据集上，GIAT达到最高95.4%的准确率，且在输入扰动下表现出优异的解释一致性，为地球科学中的深度学习模型提供了新范式。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的岩性识别模型虽具备强大的序列建模能力，但其‘黑箱’特性及缺乏地质先验指导，限制了性能和可信度。需要一种能融合地质知识、提升模型可解释性和预测合理性的方法。
AI.method: 提出Geologically-Informed Attention Transformer（GIAT），核心是引入地质信息注意力偏置机制；利用类别相关序列相关性（CSC）滤波器生成地质引导的关系矩阵，并将其嵌入自注意力计算中，以显式引导模型关注地质上合理的模式。
AI.result: 在两个复杂数据集上，GIAT实现了高达95.4%的准确率，优于现有模型；同时在输入扰动下展现出更强的解释忠实性，预测结果具有良好的地质合理性。
AI.conclusion: GIAT成功将地质先验知识与数据驱动的Transformer模型深度融合，构建出更准确、可靠且可解释的深度学习模型，为地球科学领域的智能分析提供了一个新的范式。

title: Benchmarking Political Persuasion Risks Across Frontier Large Language Models
summary: Concerns persist regarding the capacity of Large Language Models (LLMs) to sway political views. Although prior research has claimed that LLMs are not more persuasive than standard political campaign practices, the recent rise of frontier models warrants further study. In two survey experiments (N=19,145) across bipartisan issues and stances, we evaluate seven state-of-the-art LLMs developed by Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, and xAI. We find that LLMs outperform standard campaign advertisements, with heterogeneity in performance across models. Specifically, Claude models exhibit the highest persuasiveness, while Grok exhibits the lowest. The results are robust across issues and stances. Moreover, in contrast to the findings in Hackenburg et al. (2025b) and Lin et al. (2025) that information-based prompts boost persuasiveness, we find that the effectiveness of information-based prompts is model-dependent: they increase the persuasiveness of Claude and Grok while substantially reducing that of GPT. We introduce a data-driven and strategy-agnostic LLM-assisted conversation analysis approach to identify and assess underlying persuasive strategies. Our work benchmarks the persuasive risks of frontier models and provides a framework for cross-model comparative risk assessment.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过两项大规模调查实验（N=19,145），评估了Anthropic、OpenAI、Google和xAI开发的七种前沿大语言模型在跨党派议题和立场上的说服力。结果表明，大语言模型整体上优于传统政治宣传广告，其中Claude模型最具说服力，而Grok表现最差。该效果在不同议题和立场下均稳健。此外，信息型提示的效力具有模型依赖性：对Claude和Grok有提升作用，但显著降低GPT的说服力。研究提出一种数据驱动、策略无关的对话分析方法，用于识别和评估潜在的说服策略，为前沿模型的说服风险提供基准，并建立跨模型比较评估框架。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究认为大语言模型（LLMs）的说服力不高于传统政治宣传手段，但随着前沿模型的快速发展，其潜在的政治影响力亟需重新评估。本文旨在系统检验当前主流大模型在真实政治议题中的说服能力，并揭示其内部差异及提示策略的影响机制。
AI.method: 采用两轮大规模在线调查实验，覆盖多个跨党派议题与立场，测试七种前沿大语言模型（包括Claude、GPT、Gemini、Grok等）在生成文本后的说服效果。使用标准化政治宣传材料作为对照，通过随机分配受试者接触不同模型输出或传统广告，测量态度变化。同时引入数据驱动的对话分析方法，挖掘各模型背后的说服策略。
AI.result: 大语言模型整体上显著优于传统政治广告；不同模型间存在明显差异，Claude表现最强，Grok最弱；信息型提示的效果因模型而异——增强Claude和Grok的说服力，却削弱GPT的表现；模型间的说服策略存在显著差异，且可被数据方法有效识别。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了前沿大语言模型在政治说服方面的显著潜力与内在异质性，强调不能一概而论地评价其影响。研究提出了一个可扩展的跨模型风险评估框架，为政策制定、技术治理和伦理监管提供了实证基础与方法支持。

title: RTFDNet: Fusion-Decoupling for Robust RGB-T Segmentation
summary: RGB-Thermal (RGB-T) semantic segmentation is essential for robotic systems operating in low-light or dark environments. However, traditional approaches often overemphasize modality balance, resulting in limited robustness and severe performance degradation when sensor signals are partially missing. Recent advances such as cross-modal knowledge distillation and modality-adaptive fine-tuning attempt to enhance cross-modal interaction, but they typically decouple modality fusion and modality adaptation, requiring multi-stage training with frozen models or teacher-student frameworks. We present RTFDNet, a three-branch encoder-decoder that unifies fusion and decoupling for robust RGB-T segmentation. Synergistic Feature Fusion (SFF) performs channel-wise gated exchange and lightweight spatial attention to inject complementary cues. Cross-Modal Decouple Regularization (CMDR) isolates modality-specific components from the fused representation and supervises unimodal decoders via stop-gradient targets. Region Decouple Regularization (RDR) enforces class-selective prediction consistency in confident regions while blocking gradients to the fusion branch. This feedback loop strengthens unimodal paths without degrading the fused stream, enabling efficient standalone inference at test time. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of RTFDNet, showing consistent performance across varying modality conditions. Our implementation will be released to facilitate further research. Our source code are publicly available at https://github.com/curapima/RTFDNet.

AI.tldr: RTFDNet提出一种三分支编码器-解码器架构，统一融合与解耦，实现鲁棒的RGB-T语义分割。通过协同特征融合（SFF）和跨模态解耦正则化（CMDR）、区域解耦正则化（RDR），在部分传感器信号缺失时仍保持高性能，支持单阶段训练与独立推理。
AI.motivation: 传统方法过度强调模态平衡，导致在传感器信号部分缺失时性能严重下降；现有方法多采用分阶段训练，且融合与适应分离，限制了实时性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计三分支编码器-解码器结构，引入协同特征融合（SFF）进行通道门控交换与轻量空间注意力，利用跨模态解耦正则化（CMDR）与区域解耦正则化（RDR）分离模态特异性成分并监督单模态解码器，形成反馈机制增强单模态路径而不影响融合流。
AI.result: 在多种模态条件下均表现出一致的优越性能，验证了模型在传感器部分失效情况下的鲁棒性与高效性，支持测试时的独立推理。
AI.conclusion: RTFDNet通过统一融合与解耦机制，显著提升了RGB-T语义分割在复杂环境下的稳定性与实用性，为机器人低光场景应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: Better Bounds for the Distributed Experts Problem
summary: In this paper, we study the distributed experts problem, where $n$ experts are distributed across $s$ servers for $T$ timesteps. The loss of each expert at each time $t$ is the $\ell_p$ norm of the vector that consists of the losses of the expert at each of the $s$ servers at time $t$. The goal is to minimize the regret $R$, i.e., the loss of the distributed protocol compared to the loss of the best expert, amortized over the all $T$ times, while using the minimum amount of communication. We give a protocol that achieves regret roughly $R\gtrsim\frac{1}{\sqrt{T}\cdot\text{poly}\log(nsT)}$, using $\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{n}{R^2}+\frac{s}{R^2}\right)\cdot\max(s^{1-2/p},1)\cdot\text{poly}\log(nsT)$ bits of communication, which improves on previous work.

AI.tldr: 本文研究分布式专家问题，其中n个专家分布在s个服务器上，持续T个时间步。每个专家在每个时间步的损失是其在s个服务器上损失向量的ℓ_p范数。目标是最小化遗憾R（即协议损失与最优专家损失之差），并以最少通信量实现。提出一种新协议，实现遗憾约为$R\gtrsim\frac{1}{\sqrt{T}\cdot\text{poly}\log(nsT)}$，通信量为$\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{n}{R^2}+\frac{s}{R^2}\right)\cdot\max(s^{1-2/p},1)\cdot\text{poly}\log(nsT)$比特，优于以往工作。
AI.motivation: 在分布式设置中最小化遗憾的同时降低通信开销，尤其适用于大规模多服务器场景下的在线学习任务。
AI.method: 设计了一种新的分布式学习协议，结合ℓ_p范数损失建模和通信优化机制，通过控制信息交换频率和压缩传输数据来减少通信量，同时保持较低的遗憾水平。
AI.result: 所提协议在保证遗憾界$R\gtrsim\frac{1}{\sqrt{T}\cdot\text{poly}\log(nsT)}$的前提下，显著降低了通信复杂度，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该协议在分布式专家问题中实现了更优的遗憾-通信权衡，为实际应用中的高效在线学习提供了可行方案。

title: Thinking to Recall: How Reasoning Unlocks Parametric Knowledge in LLMs
summary: While reasoning in LLMs plays a natural role in math, code generation, and multi-hop factual questions, its effect on simple, single-hop factual questions remains unclear. Such questions do not require step-by-step logical decomposition, making the utility of reasoning highly counterintuitive. Nevertheless, we find that enabling reasoning substantially expands the capability boundary of the model's parametric knowledge recall, unlocking correct answers that are otherwise effectively unreachable. Why does reasoning aid parametric knowledge recall when there are no complex reasoning steps to be done? To answer this, we design a series of hypothesis-driven controlled experiments, and identify two key driving mechanisms: (1) a computational buffer effect, where the model uses the generated reasoning tokens to perform latent computation independent of their semantic content; and (2) factual priming, where generating topically related facts acts as a semantic bridge that facilitates correct answer retrieval. Importantly, this latter generative self-retrieval mechanism carries inherent risks: we demonstrate that hallucinating intermediate facts during reasoning increases the likelihood of hallucinations in the final answer. Finally, we show that our insights can be harnessed to directly improve model accuracy by prioritizing reasoning trajectories that contain hallucination-free factual statements.

AI.tldr: 尽管在数学、代码生成和多跳事实问题中，大语言模型的推理能力自然发挥作用，但在简单的一跳事实问题中其作用尚不明确。本文发现，启用推理能显著扩展模型参数知识回忆的能力边界，解锁原本无法获取的正确答案。即使没有复杂的推理步骤，推理仍能通过计算缓冲效应和事实提示机制促进知识召回。后者存在风险：推理过程中幻觉中间事实会增加最终答案幻觉的可能性。研究还提出一种方法，通过优先选择无幻觉事实的推理路径来直接提升模型准确率。
AI.motivation: 探究推理在简单、单跳事实问题中的作用，因为这类问题无需复杂逻辑分解，推理的效用看似反直觉。
AI.method: 设计一系列假设驱动的受控实验，分析推理如何影响模型的知识召回能力，并识别关键机制如计算缓冲效应和事实提示。
AI.result: 推理通过计算缓冲效应和事实提示机制提升了模型对参数知识的回忆能力；但生成幻觉中间事实会增加最终答案的幻觉风险；通过优先选择无幻觉事实的推理路径可提高模型准确性。
AI.conclusion: 推理虽在简单事实问题中无显式逻辑步骤，但仍能通过隐式计算与事实提示增强知识召回；该机制具有潜在幻觉风险，但可通过优化推理轨迹提升准确率。

title: RubiCap: Rubric-Guided Reinforcement Learning for Dense Image Captioning
summary: Dense image captioning is critical for cross-modal alignment in vision-language pretraining and text-to-image generation, but scaling expert-quality annotations is prohibitively expensive. While synthetic captioning via strong vision-language models (VLMs) is a practical alternative, supervised distillation often yields limited output diversity and weak generalization. Reinforcement learning (RL) could overcome these limitations, but its successes have so far been concentrated in verifiable domains that rely on deterministic checkers -- a luxury not available in open-ended captioning. We address this bottleneck with RubiCap, a novel RL framework that derives fine-grained, sample-specific reward signals from LLM-written rubrics. RubiCap first assembles a diverse committee of candidate captions, then employs an LLM rubric writer to extract consensus strengths and diagnose deficiencies in the current policy. These insights are converted into explicit evaluation criteria, enabling an LLM judge to decompose holistic quality assessment and replace coarse scalar rewards with structured, multi-faceted evaluations. Across extensive benchmarks, RubiCap achieves the highest win rates on CapArena, outperforming supervised distillation, prior RL methods, human-expert annotations, and GPT-4V-augmented outputs. On CaptionQA, it demonstrates superior word efficiency: our 7B model matches Qwen2.5-VL-32B-Instruct, and our 3B model surpasses its 7B counterpart. Remarkably, using the compact RubiCap-3B as a captioner produces stronger pretrained VLMs than those trained on captions from proprietary models.

AI.tldr: RubiCap 是一种基于强化学习的密集图像描述生成框架，通过大语言模型（LLM）撰写的评分标准（rubrics）生成细粒度、样本特定的奖励信号，以克服传统监督蒸馏和强化学习在开放域图像描述任务中的局限性。该方法通过构建候选描述集合，利用 LLM 提取共识与缺陷，并转化为结构化评估标准，使 LLM 判官能够进行多维度质量评估，从而替代粗略的标量奖励。在多个基准测试中，RubiCap 在 CapArena 上取得最高胜率，在 CaptionQA 上表现出更高的词汇效率，且其小型模型（3B）训练出的视觉-语言模型性能优于使用专有模型生成数据训练的大型模型。
AI.motivation: 现有密集图像描述生成方法依赖昂贵的人工标注或受限于监督蒸馏的多样性不足和泛化能力弱；而强化学习虽具潜力，但因缺乏确定性校验器难以应用于开放域描述任务。因此需要一种能提供细粒度、可解释奖励信号的新型方法，以提升生成质量和多样性。
AI.method: RubiCap 采用三阶段流程：1）生成多样化的候选描述集合；2）利用 LLM 撰写针对每个样本的详细评分标准（rubrics），识别当前策略输出的优势与不足；3）将 rubrics 转化为结构化评估标准，由 LLM 判官执行多维度质量评分，替代传统标量奖励，驱动策略优化。
AI.result: RubiCap 在 CapArena 上实现最高胜率，超越监督蒸馏、先前 RL 方法、人类专家标注及 GPT-4V 增强结果；在 CaptionQA 上，其 7B 模型性能媲美 Qwen2.5-VL-32B-Instruct，3B 模型甚至优于同规模的 7B 模型；用 RubiCap-3B 生成的描述训练的 VLM 性能超过使用专有模型数据训练的模型。
AI.conclusion: RubiCap 通过引入 LLM 驱动的细粒度评分机制，成功将强化学习扩展至开放域密集图像描述任务，显著提升了生成质量、多样性与效率，为视觉-语言预训练和文本到图像生成提供了高效且高质量的标注解决方案。

title: Latent-DARM: Bridging Discrete Diffusion And Autoregressive Models For Reasoning
comment: Published at LIT Workshop at ICLR 2026
summary: Most multi-agent systems rely exclusively on autoregressive language models (ARMs) that are based on sequential generation. Although effective for fluent text, ARMs limit global reasoning and plan revision. On the other hand, Discrete Diffusion Language Models (DDLMs) enable non-sequential, globally revisable generation and have shown strong planning capabilities, but their limited text fluency hinders direct collaboration with ARMs. We introduce Latent-DARM, a latent-space communication framework bridging DDLM (planners) and ARM (executors), maximizing collaborative benefits. Across mathematical, scientific, and commonsense reasoning benchmarks, Latent-DARM outperforms text-based interfaces on average, improving accuracy from 27.0% to 36.0% on DART-5 and from 0.0% to 14.0% on AIME2024. Latent-DARM approaches the results of state-of-the-art reasoning models while using less than 2.2% of its token budget. This work advances multi-agent collaboration among agents with heterogeneous models.

AI.tldr: Latent-DARM 是一种基于潜在空间通信的框架，用于连接具有不同能力的多智能体系统中的规划器（DDLM）和执行器（ARM），克服了传统自回归语言模型（ARM）在全局推理和计划修订上的局限性，同时解决了离散扩散语言模型（DDLM）文本流畅性不足的问题。该框架在数学、科学和常识推理基准测试中显著提升性能，如在 DART-5 上准确率从 27.0% 提升至 36.0%，在 AIME2024 上从 0.0% 提升至 14.0%，且仅使用不到 2.2% 的标记预算，接近先进推理模型的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有基于自回归语言模型（ARM）的多智能体系统受限于序列生成方式，难以实现全局推理与计划修订；而离散扩散语言模型（DDLM）虽具备强规划能力，但文本生成流畅性差，无法与 ARM 直接协作。因此亟需一种高效融合两者优势的协同机制。
AI.method: 提出 Latent-DARM 框架，通过潜在空间实现 DDLM（规划器）与 ARM（执行器）之间的信息传递，使规划过程可全局优化并支持迭代修订，同时保持执行阶段的文本流畅性。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，Latent-DARM 显著优于传统的文本接口方式，在 DART-5 和 AIME2024 上分别将准确率提升 9.0% 和 14.0%；其性能接近当前最先进的推理模型，同时仅消耗不到 2.2% 的 token 预算。
AI.conclusion: Latent-DARM 成功实现了异构模型间的高效多智能体协作，推动了跨模型协同生成的发展，为未来复杂任务中的分工合作提供了新范式。

title: Model Merging in the Era of Large Language Models: Methods, Applications, and Future Directions
summary: Model merging has emerged as a transformative paradigm for combining the capabilities of multiple neural networks into a single unified model without additional training. With the rapid proliferation of fine-tuned large language models~(LLMs), merging techniques offer a computationally efficient alternative to ensembles and full retraining, enabling practitioners to compose specialized capabilities at minimal cost. This survey presents a comprehensive and structured examination of model merging in the LLM era through the \textbf{FUSE} taxonomy, a four-dimensional framework organized along \textbf{F}oundations, \textbf{U}nification Strategies, \textbf{S}cenarios, and \textbf{E}cosystem. We first establish the theoretical underpinnings of merging, including loss landscape geometry, mode connectivity, and the linear mode connectivity hypothesis. We then systematically review the algorithmic landscape, spanning weight averaging, task vector arithmetic, sparsification-enhanced methods, mixture-of-experts architectures, and evolutionary optimization approaches. For each method family, we analyze the core formulation, highlight representative works, and discuss practical trade-offs. We further examine downstream applications across multi-task learning, safety alignment, domain specialization, multilingual transfer, and federated learning. Finally, we survey the supporting ecosystem of open-source tools, community platforms, and evaluation benchmarks, and identify key open challenges including theoretical gaps, scalability barriers, and standardization needs. This survey aims to equip researchers and practitioners with a structured foundation for advancing model merging.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为FUSE的四维分类框架，系统梳理了大语言模型时代的模型合并技术，涵盖基础理论、统一策略、应用场景与生态系统。研究分析了权重平均、任务向量算术、稀疏化增强方法、专家混合架构及进化优化等算法，并探讨其在多任务学习、安全对齐、领域专业化等场景中的应用。同时，总结了开源工具、评估基准和社区平台，指出了理论空白、可扩展性挑战与标准化需求等关键开放问题。
AI.motivation: 随着微调的大语言模型迅速增多，模型合并提供了一种无需额外训练即可整合多个模型能力的高效替代方案，避免了集成或全量重训练的高成本，具有重要的实践价值。
AI.method: 采用FUSE四维分类框架（基础、统一策略、场景、生态），从理论基础出发，系统回顾各类合并算法，分析核心公式与代表性工作，并结合实际应用与工具生态进行综合评估。
AI.result: 全面梳理了模型合并的技术演进，揭示了不同方法的优缺点与适用场景，明确了当前面临的理论、可扩展性和标准化挑战，为未来研究提供了结构化指导。
AI.conclusion: 本综述通过系统化框架，为研究人员和从业者提供了推进模型合并技术发展的坚实基础，推动其在多模态、分布式与专业化场景中的进一步应用。

title: Logics-Parsing-Omni Technical Report
summary: Addressing the challenges of fragmented task definitions and the heterogeneity of unstructured data in multimodal parsing, this paper proposes the Omni Parsing framework. This framework establishes a Unified Taxonomy covering documents, images, and audio-visual streams, introducing a progressive parsing paradigm that bridges perception and cognition. Specifically, the framework integrates three hierarchical levels: 1) Holistic Detection, which achieves precise spatial-temporal grounding of objects or events to establish a geometric baseline for perception; 2) Fine-grained Recognition, which performs symbolization (e.g., OCR/ASR) and attribute extraction on localized objects to complete structured entity parsing; and 3) Multi-level Interpreting, which constructs a reasoning chain from local semantics to global logic. A pivotal advantage of this framework is its evidence anchoring mechanism, which enforces a strict alignment between high-level semantic descriptions and low-level facts. This enables ``evidence-based'' logical induction, transforming unstructured signals into standardized knowledge that is locatable, enumerable, and traceable. Building on this foundation, we constructed a standardized dataset and released the Logics-Parsing-Omni model, which successfully converts complex audio-visual signals into machine-readable structured knowledge. Experiments demonstrate that fine-grained perception and high-level cognition are synergistic, effectively enhancing model reliability. Furthermore, to quantitatively evaluate these capabilities, we introduce OmniParsingBench. Code, models and the benchmark are released at https://github.com/alibaba/Logics-Parsing/tree/master/Logics-Parsing-Omni.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出Omni Parsing框架，旨在解决多模态解析中任务定义碎片化和非结构化数据异质性问题。框架建立统一分类体系，涵盖文档、图像和音视频流，采用分层渐进式解析范式，包含整体检测、细粒度识别和多层次解释三个层次，通过证据锚定机制实现高层语义与底层事实的严格对齐，支持基于证据的逻辑推断，将非结构化信号转化为可定位、可枚举、可追溯的标准化知识。构建了标准化数据集并发布Logics-Parsing-Omni模型及OmniParsingBench评估基准，实验表明感知与认知协同提升模型可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态解析面临任务定义分散和非结构化数据异质性强的问题，缺乏统一的解析框架和评估标准，难以实现从感知到认知的高效转化。
AI.method: 提出Omni Parsing框架，包含三个层级：1）整体检测，实现对象或事件的时空精确定位；2）细粒度识别，完成符号化（如OCR/ASR）与属性提取；3）多层次解释，构建从局部语义到全局逻辑的推理链。引入证据锚定机制，确保高层语义描述与底层事实对齐，实现证据驱动的逻辑归纳。
AI.result: 成功将复杂音视频信号转化为机器可读的结构化知识；实验证明细粒度感知与高层认知具有协同效应，显著提升模型可靠性；构建了标准化数据集、模型及评估基准OmniParsingBench，代码与资源已开源。
AI.conclusion: Omni Parsing框架通过统一分类体系与分层解析机制，实现了多模态数据从感知到认知的高效转化，为构建可追溯、可验证的智能系统提供了新范式。

title: CREATE: Testing LLMs for Associative Creativity
summary: A key component of creativity is associative reasoning: the ability to draw novel yet meaningful connections between concepts. We introduce CREATE, a benchmark designed to evaluate models' capacity for creative associative reasoning. CREATE requires models to generate sets of paths connecting concepts in a model's parametric knowledge. Paths should have high specificity (distinctiveness and closeness of the concept connection) and high diversity (dissimilarity from other paths), and models are scored more highly if they produce a larger set of strong, diverse paths. This task shares demands of real creativity tasks like hypothesis generation, including an extremely large search space, but enables collection of a sizable benchmark with objective answer grading. Evaluation of frontier models shows that the strongest models achieve higher creative utility than others, with the high multiplicity of answers and complexity of the search making benchmark saturation difficult to achieve. Furthermore, our results illustrate that thinking models are not always more effective on our task, even with high token budgets. Recent approaches for creative prompting give some but limited additional improvement. CREATE provides a sandbox for developing new methods to improve models' capacity for associative creativity.

AI.tldr: CREATE 是一个评估模型创造性联想推理能力的基准，要求模型生成连接概念的高特异性、高多样性的路径。该任务模拟真实创造力任务（如假设生成），具有巨大的搜索空间，但支持客观评分。评估显示，最强模型在创造性效用上表现更优，且由于答案多样性与搜索复杂性，基准难以饱和。思维模型并非总是更有效，近期创意提示方法仅带来有限提升。CREATE 为提升模型联想创造力提供了实验平台。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在创造性任务中表现不足，尤其在生成新颖且有意义的概念连接方面。需要一个能客观评估模型创造性联想推理能力的基准，以推动相关技术发展。
AI.method: 提出 CREATE 基准，通过要求模型生成多个高特异性、高多样性的概念连接路径进行评估，并基于路径质量与多样性打分。
AI.result: 前沿模型在创造性和多样性上表现优于其他模型，但基准难以饱和；思维模型在高计算预算下并不一定更优，现有创意提示方法仅有部分提升作用。
AI.conclusion: CREATE 为评估和提升大模型的创造性联想推理能力提供了一个有效且可扩展的基准，有助于推动新方法的发展。

title: The Radio-Frequency Transformer for Signal Separation
summary: We study a problem of signal separation: estimating a signal of interest (SOI) contaminated by an unknown non-Gaussian background/interference. Given the training data consisting of examples of SOI and interference, we show how to build a fully data-driven signal separator. To that end we learn a good discrete tokenizer for SOI and then train an end-to-end transformer on a cross-entropy loss. Training with a cross-entropy shows substantial improvements over the conventional mean-squared error (MSE). Our tokenizer is a modification of Google's SoundStream, which incorporates additional transformer layers and switches from VQVAE to finite-scalar quantization (FSQ). Across real and synthetic mixtures from the MIT RF Challenge dataset, our method achieves competitive performance, including a 122x reduction in bit-error rate (BER) over prior state-of-the-art techniques for separating a QPSK signal from 5G interference. The learned representation adapts to the interference type without side information and shows zero-shot generalization to unseen mixtures at inference time, underscoring its potential beyond RF. Although we instantiate our approach on radio-frequency mixtures, we expect the same architecture to apply to gravitational-wave data (e.g., LIGO strain) and other scientific sensing problems that require data-driven modeling of background and noise.

AI.tldr: 本文研究信号分离问题，旨在从未知非高斯背景/干扰中估计感兴趣的信号（SOI）。基于包含SOI和干扰的训练数据，提出一种完全数据驱动的信号分离方法：首先学习一个针对SOI的良好离散分词器，然后在交叉熵损失下端到端训练Transformer。相较于传统的均方误差（MSE），使用交叉熵训练显著提升性能。所提出的分词器基于SoundStream改进，引入额外Transformer层，并将VQVAE替换为有限标量量化（FSQ）。在MIT RF Challenge数据集的真实与合成混合信号上，该方法表现优异，相比之前最先进方法，对QPSK信号从5G干扰中分离实现122倍的误码率（BER）降低。所学表示能自适应干扰类型，无需额外信息，在推理时展现出零样本泛化能力，表明其在射频以外领域也具潜力。尽管本方法应用于射频混合信号，但其架构同样适用于引力波数据（如LIGO应变）及其他需要数据驱动建模背景和噪声的科学传感问题。
AI.motivation: 传统信号分离方法在处理未知非高斯干扰时性能受限，尤其在缺乏先验知识的情况下。现有基于MSE的模型难以有效区分复杂干扰与目标信号。因此亟需一种无需依赖人工设计、可自适应干扰类型的全数据驱动信号分离方法，以提升在真实场景中的鲁棒性与泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用改进的SoundStream架构构建分词器，引入额外Transformer层并用有限标量量化（FSQ）替代VQVAE；在训练阶段通过交叉熵损失端到端训练Transformer模型，实现对目标信号与干扰的高效分离。
AI.result: 在MIT RF Challenge数据集上，该方法在真实与合成混合信号中表现优异，实现了比先前最先进方法122倍的误码率（BER）降低；所学表示具备零样本泛化能力，能适应未见过的干扰类型，且不依赖额外信息。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法是一种高效的全数据驱动信号分离框架，通过结合改进的分词器与交叉熵训练的Transformer，实现了对复杂非高斯干扰的有效抑制。其强大的自适应与零样本泛化能力使其不仅适用于射频信号分离，还具有推广至引力波探测等科学传感任务的潜力。

title: MM-Zero: Self-Evolving Multi-Model Vision Language Models From Zero Data
summary: Self-evolving has emerged as a key paradigm for improving foundational models such as Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs) with minimal human intervention. While recent approaches have demonstrated that LLM agents can self-evolve from scratch with little to no data, VLMs introduce an additional visual modality that typically requires at least some seed data, such as images, to bootstrap the self-evolution process. In this work, we present Multi-model Multimodal Zero (MM-Zero), the first RL-based framework to achieve zero-data self-evolution for VLM reasoning. Moving beyond prior dual-role (Proposer and Solver) setups, MM-Zero introduces a multi-role self-evolving training framework comprising three specialized roles: a Proposer that generates abstract visual concepts and formulates questions; a Coder that translates these concepts into executable code (e.g., Python, SVG) to render visual images; and a Solver that performs multimodal reasoning over the generated visual content. All three roles are initialized from the same base model and trained using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), with carefully designed reward mechanisms that integrate execution feedback, visual verification, and difficulty balancing. Our experiments show that MM-Zero improves VLM reasoning performance across a wide range of multimodal benchmarks. MM-Zero establishes a scalable path toward self-evolving multi-model systems for multimodal models, extending the frontier of self-improvement beyond the conventional two-model paradigm.

AI.tldr: MM-Zero 是首个基于强化学习的零数据自演化框架，实现视觉语言模型（VLM）在无初始图像数据情况下的自演化推理。它引入三种角色：提出者（生成抽象视觉概念和问题）、编码者（将概念转为可执行代码生成图像）和求解者（进行多模态推理）。三者均从同一基础模型初始化，使用组相对策略优化（GRPO）训练，并结合执行反馈、视觉验证和难度平衡设计奖励机制。实验表明，该方法显著提升VLM在多种多模态基准上的表现，推动了自演化多模态系统的发展。
AI.motivation: 现有自演化方法主要针对大语言模型，而视觉语言模型因需图像等视觉模态数据作为起点，通常依赖少量种子数据启动。如何实现完全零数据的自演化是关键挑战。本文旨在突破传统双角色（提议者与求解者）范式，构建无需任何外部数据输入即可自我演化的多角色框架，以推动多模态模型的自主进化能力。
AI.method: 提出 MM-Zero 框架，包含三个角色：1）Proposer 生成抽象视觉概念并构造问题；2）Coder 将概念转化为可执行代码（如 Python、SVG）以渲染图像；3）Solver 基于生成图像进行多模态推理。所有角色共享同一初始模型，通过 Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) 进行联合训练，设计融合执行反馈、视觉验证和难度平衡的奖励机制，实现闭环自演化。
AI.result: MM-Zero 在多个主流多模态推理基准上显著优于基线方法，证明其在零数据条件下成功实现了 VLM 的自演化推理能力。该框架具备良好的可扩展性，为构建完全自主的多模态智能系统提供了新路径。
AI.conclusion: MM-Zero 首次实现了视觉语言模型的零数据自演化，通过引入多角色协同机制和先进的强化学习训练策略，突破了传统两角色框架的局限。该工作拓展了自演化系统的边界，为未来自主多模态智能体的发展奠定了重要基础。

title: OOD-MMSafe: Advancing MLLM Safety from Harmful Intent to Hidden Consequences
summary: While safety alignment for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) has gained significant attention, current paradigms primarily target malicious intent or situational violations. We propose shifting the safety frontier toward consequence-driven safety, a paradigm essential for the robust deployment of autonomous and embodied agents. To formalize this shift, we introduce OOD-MMSafe, a benchmark comprising 455 curated query-image pairs designed to evaluate a model's ability to identify latent hazards within context-dependent causal chains. Our analysis reveals a pervasive causal blindness among frontier models, with the highest 67.5% failure rate in high-capacity closed-source models, and identifies a preference ceiling where static alignment yields format-centric failures rather than improved safety reasoning as model capacity grows. To address these bottlenecks, we develop the Consequence-Aware Safety Policy Optimization (CASPO) framework, which integrates the model's intrinsic reasoning as a dynamic reference for token-level self-distillation rewards. Experimental results demonstrate that CASPO significantly enhances consequence projection, reducing the failure ratio of risk identification to 7.3% for Qwen2.5-VL-7B and 5.7% for Qwen3-VL-4B while maintaining overall effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将多模态大模型（MLLMs）的安全对齐从针对恶意意图或情境违规的范式，转向后果驱动的安全性，以支持自主和具身智能体的稳健部署。为此，作者构建了OOD-MMSafe基准，包含455个精心设计的图文对，用于评估模型在上下文依赖的因果链中识别潜在危险的能力。分析发现，前沿模型普遍存在因果盲区，高容量闭源模型失败率高达67.5%；且静态对齐存在偏好天花板，模型能力提升并未带来安全推理的改善。为此，提出基于后果感知的安全策略优化框架CASPO，通过模型内在推理作为动态参考，实现逐令牌自蒸馏奖励。实验表明，CASPO显著提升了后果预测能力，使Qwen2.5-VL-7B和Qwen3-VL-4B的风险识别失败率分别降至7.3%和5.7%，同时保持整体性能。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大模型的安全对齐主要关注恶意意图或情境违规，但不足以应对自主和具身智能体在复杂现实环境中可能引发的后果性风险。因此需要引入后果驱动的安全范式，以更准确地识别隐含于因果链中的潜在危害。
AI.method: 提出OOD-MMSafe基准，用于评估模型在上下文依赖因果链中识别潜在危险的能力；开发Consequence-Aware Safety Policy Optimization (CASPO)框架，利用模型自身推理过程作为动态参考，生成逐令牌的自蒸馏奖励信号，实现对安全行为的动态优化。
AI.result: CASPO显著提升了模型的后果预测与风险识别能力，使Qwen2.5-VL-7B和Qwen3-VL-4B的失败率分别降至7.3%和5.7%；同时验证了现有静态对齐方法在模型容量增长时出现的‘偏好天花板’现象。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了后果驱动安全对齐对于具身和自主系统的重要性，并通过新基准与动态优化框架实现了显著性能提升，为未来安全型多模态智能体的发展提供了关键路径。

title: Strategically Robust Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with Linear Function Approximation
summary: Provably efficient and robust equilibrium computation in general-sum Markov games remains a core challenge in multi-agent reinforcement learning. Nash equilibrium is computationally intractable in general and brittle due to equilibrium multiplicity and sensitivity to approximation error. We study Risk-Sensitive Quantal Response Equilibrium (RQRE), which yields a unique, smooth solution under bounded rationality and risk sensitivity. We propose \texttt{RQRE-OVI}, an optimistic value iteration algorithm for computing RQRE with linear function approximation in large or continuous state spaces. Through finite-sample regret analysis, we establish convergence and explicitly characterize how sample complexity scales with rationality and risk-sensitivity parameters. The regret bounds reveal a quantitative tradeoff: increasing rationality tightens regret, while risk sensitivity induces regularization that enhances stability and robustness. This exposes a Pareto frontier between expected performance and robustness, with Nash recovered in the limit of perfect rationality and risk neutrality. We further show that the RQRE policy map is Lipschitz continuous in estimated payoffs, unlike Nash, and RQRE admits a distributionally robust optimization interpretation. Empirically, we demonstrate that \texttt{RQRE-OVI} achieves competitive performance under self-play while producing substantially more robust behavior under cross-play compared to Nash-based approaches. These results suggest \texttt{RQRE-OVI} offers a principled, scalable, and tunable path for equilibrium learning with improved robustness and generalization.

AI.tldr: 提出RQRE-OVI算法，用于在大规模或连续状态空间中通过线性函数逼近计算风险敏感的量化响应均衡（RQRE），实现可证明高效且鲁棒的均衡计算。该方法通过有限样本后悔分析，揭示了理性度与风险敏感性之间的权衡：理性度提高降低后悔，风险敏感性引入正则化提升稳定性。RQRE具有唯一、平滑解，且策略映射关于收益估计是Lipschitz连续的，优于纳什均衡。实验表明，RQRE-OVI在自对弈中表现良好，在交叉对弈中显著更鲁棒。
AI.motivation: 现有纳什均衡在一般和博弈中计算困难且易受近似误差影响，存在多解性和脆弱性问题。为解决这些问题，需要一种具有唯一性、稳定性和鲁棒性的均衡概念。本文提出基于有界理性和风险敏感性的风险敏感量化响应均衡（RQRE），以提供更稳健的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出RQRE-OVI算法，结合乐观值迭代与线性函数逼近，用于在大或连续状态空间中计算RQRE。通过有限样本后悔分析，理论分析其收敛性，并刻画样本复杂度随理性参数和风险敏感参数的变化规律。
AI.result: RQRE-OVI实现了可证明的收敛性，揭示了理性与风险敏感性之间的定量权衡：理性提升性能，风险敏感增强稳定性。实验显示，相比基于纳什均衡的方法，RQRE-OVI在自对弈中表现相当，但在交叉对弈中表现出显著更高的鲁棒性。此外，RQRE策略映射具有Lipschitz连续性，且可解释为分布鲁棒优化问题。
AI.conclusion: RQRE-OVI提供了一条原则性强、可扩展且可调的均衡学习路径，兼具良好期望性能与鲁棒性，适用于多智能体强化学习中的实际应用。

title: Geometry-Aware Metric Learning for Cross-Lingual Few-Shot Sign Language Recognition on Static Hand Keypoints
summary: Sign language recognition (SLR) systems typically require large labeled corpora for each language, yet the majority of the world's 300+ sign languages lack sufficient annotated data. Cross-lingual few-shot transfer, pretraining on a data-rich source language and adapting with only a handful of target-language examples, offers a scalable alternative, but conventional coordinate-based keypoint representations are susceptible to domain shift arising from differences in camera viewpoint, hand scale, and recording conditions. This shift is particularly detrimental in the few-shot regime, where class prototypes estimated from only K examples are highly sensitive to extrinsic variance. We propose a geometry-aware metric-learning framework centered on a compact 20-dimensional inter-joint angle descriptor derived from MediaPipe static hand keypoints. These angles are invariant to SO(3) rotation, translation, and isotropic scaling, eliminating the dominant sources of cross-dataset shift and yielding tighter, more stable class prototypes. Evaluated on four fingerspelling alphabets spanning typologically diverse sign languages, ASL, LIBRAS, Arabic Sign Language, and Thai Sign Language, the proposed angle features improve over normalized-coordinate baselines by up to 25 percentage points within-domain and enable frozen cross-lingual transfer that frequently exceeds within-domain accuracy, using a lightweight MLP encoder with about 10^5 parameters. These findings demonstrate that invariant hand-geometry descriptors provide a portable and effective foundation for cross-lingual few-shot SLR in low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于几何不变的20维关节角度描述符的度量学习框架，用于跨语言少样本手语识别。该方法利用MediaPipe静态手部关键点，通过关节角度特征实现对旋转、平移和缩放的不变性，显著减少跨数据集偏差，在仅用少量目标语言样本的情况下实现高性能识别，优于传统坐标表示，并在多个手语语言间实现超越域内准确率的迁移性能。
AI.motivation: 现有手语识别系统依赖大量标注数据，而全球300多种手语中多数缺乏足够标注数据；传统坐标表示易受视角、手部尺度和拍摄条件等外部因素影响，尤其在少样本场景下导致分类原型不稳定。因此需要一种对域偏移鲁棒且适用于低资源手语的跨语言少样本迁移方法。
AI.method: 采用MediaPipe提取静态手部关键点，构建20维的关节间角度特征向量，该特征对SO(3)旋转、平移和各向同性缩放具有不变性；结合轻量级MLP编码器与度量学习策略，训练模型以学习紧凑且稳定的类别原型，支持冻结参数进行跨语言迁移。
AI.result: 在四种不同手语（美式手语、巴西手语、阿拉伯手语、泰式手语）的指拼字母任务上，该方法相比归一化坐标基线最高提升25个百分点，且在跨语言迁移中常超过域内性能，验证了其在低资源环境下的有效性与可迁移性。
AI.conclusion: 几何不变的手部结构描述符为跨语言少样本手语识别提供了高效、可移植的基础，能够在数据稀缺条件下实现高精度识别，是解决低资源手语识别问题的有效方案。

title: TubeMLLM: A Foundation Model for Topology Knowledge Exploration in Vessel-like Anatomy
comment: 18 pages, 12 figures, extended version of the submission to MICCAI 2026
summary: Modeling medical vessel-like anatomy is challenging due to its intricate topology and sensitivity to dataset shifts. Consequently, task-specific models often suffer from topological inconsistencies, including artificial disconnections and spurious merges. Motivated by the promise of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for zero-shot generalization, we propose TubeMLLM, a unified foundation model that couples structured understanding with controllable generation for medical vessel-like anatomy.
