summary: Autonomous space operations such as on-orbit servicing and active debris removal demand robust part-level semantic understanding and precise relative navigation of target spacecraft, yet collecting large-scale real data in orbit remains impractical due to cost and access constraints. Existing synthetic datasets, moreover, suffer from limited target diversity, single-modality sensing, and incomplete ground-truth annotations. We present \textbf{SpaceSense-Bench}, a large-scale multi-modal benchmark for spacecraft perception encompassing 136~satellite models with approximately 70~GB of data. Each frame provides time-synchronized 1024$\times$1024 RGB images, millimeter-precision depth maps, and 256-beam LiDAR point clouds, together with dense 7-class part-level semantic labels at both the pixel and point level as well as accurate 6-DoF pose ground truth. The dataset is generated through a high-fidelity space simulation built in Unreal Engine~5 and a fully automated pipeline covering data acquisition, multi-stage quality control, and conversion to mainstream formats. We benchmark five representative tasks (object detection, 2D semantic segmentation, RGB--LiDAR fusion-based 3D point cloud segmentation, monocular depth estimation, and orientation estimation) and identify two key findings: (i)~perceiving small-scale components (\emph{e.g.}, thrusters and omni-antennas) and generalizing to entirely unseen spacecraft in a zero-shot setting remain critical bottlenecks for current methods, and (ii)~scaling up the number of training satellites yields substantial performance gains on novel targets, underscoring the value of large-scale, diverse datasets for space perception research. The dataset, code, and toolkit are publicly available at https://github.com/wuaodi/SpaceSense-Bench.

AI.tldr: 提出SpaceSense-Bench，一个大规模多模态航天器感知基准，包含136个卫星模型、70GB数据，提供同步的RGB图像、深度图和LiDAR点云，以及像素级和点级的7类部件语义标签与6-DoF姿态真值。通过Unreal Engine 5高保真空间仿真和自动化流程生成，涵盖五大任务评测，发现小部件感知和零样本泛化仍是关键挑战，且增加训练卫星数量显著提升新目标性能。
AI.motivation: 现有合成数据集在目标多样性、传感器模态和标注完整性方面存在局限，难以支撑自主空间操作中的精确感知需求，亟需更全面、大规模的多模态数据集以推动航天器感知研究。
AI.method: 基于Unreal Engine 5构建高保真空间仿真环境，采用全自动数据采集、多阶段质量控制与格式转换流程，生成包含同步RGB、深度图与256束LiDAR点云的多模态数据，并附带密集的部件级语义标签与精确姿态真值。
AI.result: 在五个代表性任务上进行基准测试，结果显示：（i）小尺度部件（如推进器、全向天线）的感知及对完全未见航天器的零样本泛化仍是当前方法的主要瓶颈；（ii）增加训练用卫星数量能显著提升对新目标的性能，证明大规模多样化数据对空间感知研究的重要性。
AI.conclusion: SpaceSense-Bench为航天器感知研究提供了高质量、大规模、多模态的基准数据集，其公开可用性将推动空间自主操作中感知技术的发展，尤其在复杂部件识别与泛化能力方面具有重要价值。

title: OddGridBench: Exposing the Lack of Fine-Grained Visual Discrepancy Sensitivity in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable performance across a wide range of vision language tasks. However, their ability in low-level visual perception, particularly in detecting fine-grained visual discrepancies, remains underexplored and lacks systematic analysis. In this work, we introduce OddGridBench, a controllable benchmark for evaluating the visual discrepancy sensitivity of MLLMs. OddGridBench comprises over 1,400 grid-based images, where a single element differs from all others by one or multiple visual attributes such as color, size, rotation, or position. Experiments reveal that all evaluated MLLMs, including open-source families such as Qwen3-VL and InternVL3.5, and proprietary systems like Gemini-2.5-Pro and GPT-5, perform far below human levels in visual discrepancy detection. We further propose OddGrid-GRPO, a reinforcement learning framework that integrates curriculum learning and distance-aware reward. By progressively controlling the difficulty of training samples and incorporating spatial proximity constraints into the reward design, OddGrid-GRPO significantly enhances the model's fine-grained visual discrimination ability. We hope OddGridBench and OddGrid-GRPO will lay the groundwork for advancing perceptual grounding and visual discrepancy sensitivity in multimodal intelligence. Code and dataset are available at https://wwwtttjjj.github.io/OddGridBench/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OddGridBench，一个用于评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在视觉差异检测方面敏感性的可控基准测试集，包含超过1400张基于网格的图像，其中仅有一个元素在颜色、大小、旋转或位置等属性上与其余元素不同。实验表明，所有评测的MLLMs（包括Qwen3-VL、InternVL3.5、Gemini-2.5-Pro和GPT-5）在细粒度视觉差异检测上的表现远低于人类水平。为此，作者提出OddGrid-GRPO，一种结合课程学习与距离感知奖励的强化学习框架，通过逐步控制训练样本难度并引入空间邻近性约束优化奖励机制，显著提升了模型的精细视觉区分能力。该工作为推进多模态智能中的感知对齐与视觉差异敏感性提供了基础支持。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在高层视觉语言任务中表现优异，但在低层视觉感知，特别是细粒度视觉差异检测方面的能力仍不明确且缺乏系统评估。为了填补这一空白，亟需一个可控制、可量化的基准来深入分析和提升MLLMs在微小视觉差异识别上的性能。
AI.method: 提出OddGridBench基准数据集，包含1400+张精心设计的网格图像，每张图中仅一个元素在视觉属性上与其他不同；构建OddGrid-GRPO强化学习框架，融合课程学习策略与距离感知奖励函数，通过动态调整训练难度并引入空间位置约束，增强模型对细微视觉差异的敏感性。
AI.result: 所有评测的MLLMs在OddGridBench上的表现均显著低于人类水平，验证了其在细粒度视觉感知上的不足；OddGrid-GRPO框架有效提升了模型的视觉差异检测能力，在多个指标上实现明显改进。
AI.conclusion: OddGridBench和OddGrid-GRPO为研究和提升多模态大语言模型在低层视觉感知，尤其是细粒度视觉差异敏感性方面提供了重要工具与方法，有助于推动多模态智能向更深层次的感知对齐发展。

title: Towards Understanding Adam Convergence on Highly Degenerate Polynomials
summary: Adam is a widely used optimization algorithm in deep learning, yet the specific class of objective functions where it exhibits inherent advantages remains underexplored. Unlike prior studies requiring external schedulers and $β_2$ near 1 for convergence, this work investigates the "natural" auto-convergence properties of Adam. We identify a class of highly degenerate polynomials where Adam converges automatically without additional schedulers. Specifically, we derive theoretical conditions for local asymptotic stability on degenerate polynomials and demonstrate strong alignment between theoretical bounds and experimental results. We prove that Adam achieves local linear convergence on these degenerate functions, significantly outperforming the sub-linear convergence of Gradient Descent and Momentum. This acceleration stems from a decoupling mechanism between the second moment $v_t$ and squared gradient $g_t^2$, which exponentially amplifies the effective learning rate. Finally, we characterize Adam's hyperparameter phase diagram, identifying three distinct behavioral regimes: stable convergence, spikes, and SignGD-like oscillation.

AI.tldr: 该研究揭示了Adam优化器在特定退化多项式函数上的自动收敛特性，证明其在这些函数上可实现局部线性收敛，显著优于梯度下降和动量法的次线性收敛。其加速源于二阶矩 $v_t$ 与平方梯度 $g_t^2$ 的解耦机制，导致有效学习率指数级放大。研究还构建了Adam的超参数相图，识别出三种行为模式：稳定收敛、波动尖峰和类似SignGD的振荡。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多依赖外部调度器或设置 $β_2$ 接近1才能保证Adam收敛，但缺乏对其实现内在自动收敛的理论理解。本文旨在探索Adam在何种目标函数类中具备自然收敛能力，以揭示其真正的优势来源。
AI.method: 通过分析退化多项式函数的动态行为，推导局部渐近稳定性条件；结合理论建模与实验验证，分析Adam中 $v_t$ 与 $g_t^2$ 的解耦机制；利用相图方法系统刻画不同超参数组合下的优化行为。
AI.result: 在特定退化多项式上，Adam无需额外调度即可实现自动收敛；理论预测与实验结果高度一致；相较于梯度下降和动量法，其收敛速度达到局部线性；发现三种超参数行为区域：稳定收敛、尖峰和振荡。
AI.conclusion: Adam在特定退化多项式上具有天然的自动收敛能力，其性能优势源于二阶矩与梯度平方之间的解耦机制，该机制实现了有效学习率的指数放大。研究为理解Adam的内在动力学提供了理论支持，并指明了其超参数选择的关键区域。

title: Beyond Scaling: Assessing Strategic Reasoning and Rapid Decision-Making Capability of LLMs in Zero-sum Environments
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved strong performance on static reasoning benchmarks, yet their effectiveness as interactive agents operating in adversarial, time-sensitive environments remains poorly understood. Existing evaluations largely treat reasoning as a single-shot capability, overlooking the challenges of opponent-aware decision-making, temporal constraints, and execution under pressure. This paper introduces Strategic Tactical Agent Reasoning (STAR) Benchmark, a multi-agent evaluation framework that assesses LLMs through 1v1 zero-sum competitive interactions, framing reasoning as an iterative, adaptive decision-making process. STAR supports both turn-based and real-time settings, enabling controlled analysis of long-horizon strategic planning and fast-paced tactical execution within a unified environment. Built on a modular architecture with a standardized API and fully implemented execution engine, STAR facilitates reproducible evaluation and flexible task customization. To move beyond binary win-loss outcomes, we introduce a Strategic Evaluation Suite that assesses not only competitive success but also the quality of strategic behavior, such as execution efficiency and outcome stability. Extensive pairwise evaluations reveal a pronounced strategy-execution gap: while reasoning-intensive models dominate turn-based settings, their inference latency often leads to inferior performance in real-time scenarios, where faster instruction-tuned models prevail. These results show that strategic intelligence in interactive environments depends not only on reasoning depth, but also on the ability to translate plans into timely actions, positioning STAR as a principled benchmark for studying this trade-off in competitive, dynamic settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出STAR基准，一个用于评估大语言模型在对抗性、时间敏感环境中的交互式推理能力的多智能体框架。该框架通过1v1零和竞争互动，将推理视为迭代适应的决策过程，支持回合制与实时场景，以分析长期战略规划与快速战术执行。引入战略评估套件，不仅评估胜负，还衡量策略质量如执行效率与结果稳定性。实验发现，尽管推理能力强的模型在回合制中占优，但其延迟导致在实时场景中表现不佳，而更快的指令微调模型则更胜一筹，揭示了战略智能不仅依赖推理深度，还需及时行动能力。
AI.motivation: 现有评估大多将推理视为单次能力，忽视了对手感知决策、时间约束及高压环境下执行的挑战，因此需要一个能真实反映大语言模型在动态竞争环境中表现的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出STAR基准，采用模块化架构与标准化API，支持回合制与实时交互，构建统一环境进行多维度评估，并引入战略评估套件以量化策略质量。
AI.result: 实验显示存在显著的策略-执行差距：推理密集型模型在回合制中表现优异，但在实时场景中因延迟劣势；相反，快速指令微调模型在实时场景中更具优势。表明战略智能需兼顾推理深度与行动时效性。
AI.conclusion: STAR为研究大语言模型在动态竞争环境中的推理与执行权衡提供了一个系统化、可复现的基准，强调了及时行动能力在战略智能中的关键作用。

title: Nonparametric Variational Differential Privacy via Embedding Parameter Clipping
summary: The nonparametric variational information bottleneck (NVIB) provides the foundation for nonparametric variational differential privacy (NVDP), a framework for building privacy-preserving language models. However, the learned latent representations can drift into regions with high information content, leading to poor privacy guarantees, but also low utility due to numerical instability during training. In this work, we introduce a principled parameter clipping strategy to directly address this issue. Our method is mathematically derived from the objective of minimizing the Rényi Divergence (RD) upper bound, yielding specific, theoretically grounded constraints on the posterior mean, variance, and mixture weight parameters. We apply our technique to an NVIB based model and empirically compare it against an unconstrained baseline. Our findings demonstrate that the clipped model consistently achieves tighter RD bounds, implying stronger privacy, while simultaneously attaining higher performance on several downstream tasks. This work presents a simple yet effective method for improving the privacy-utility trade-off in variational models, making them more robust and practical.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于瑞尼散度上界最小化的参数裁剪策略，以解决非参数变分信息瓶颈（NVIB）中潜在表示因信息含量过高而导致隐私保障不足和训练数值不稳定的問題。该方法在理论上导出了对后验均值、方差和混合权重参数的约束，应用于基于NVIB的模型后，实验表明其在保持更高下游任务性能的同时，显著提升了隐私保护能力。
AI.motivation: 现有非参数变分微分隐私（NVDP）框架中，潜在表示可能漂移到高信息区域，导致隐私保障弱化和训练数值不稳定，亟需一种可理论支撑的机制来改善隐私-效用权衡。
AI.method: 从最小化瑞尼散度上界的优化目标出发，推导出对后验分布参数（均值、方差、混合权重）的理论约束，并实施参数裁剪策略。
AI.result: 所提方法在保持或提升下游任务性能的同时，实现了更紧的瑞尼散度上界，表明更强的隐私保护能力，验证了其在提高隐私-效用平衡方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的参数裁剪策略是一种简单但有效的改进方法，能够显著增强变分模型的隐私性与鲁棒性，推动其在实际应用中的可行性。

title: Predictive Spectral Calibration for Source-Free Test-Time Regression
summary: Test-time adaptation (TTA) for image regression has received far less attention than its classification counterpart. Methods designed for classification often depend on classification-specific objectives and decision boundaries, making them difficult to transfer directly to continuous regression targets. Recent progress revisits regression TTA through subspace alignment, showing that simple source-guided alignment can be both practical and effective. Building on this line of work, we propose Predictive Spectral Calibration (PSC), a source-free framework that extends subspace alignment to block spectral matching. Instead of relying on a fixed support subspace alone, PSC jointly aligns target features within the source predictive support and calibrates residual spectral slack in the orthogonal complement. PSC remains simple to implement, model-agnostic, and compatible with off-the-shelf pretrained regressors. Experiments on multiple image regression benchmarks show consistent improvements over strong baselines, with particularly clear gains under severe distribution shifts.

AI.tldr: 提出Predictive Spectral Calibration (PSC)，一种无需源数据的图像回归测试时自适应方法，通过块频谱匹配扩展子空间对齐，联合对齐目标特征并校准正交补空间中的残差频谱松弛，在多个图像回归基准上表现优于现有基线，尤其在严重分布偏移下效果显著。
AI.motivation: 图像回归的测试时自适应（TTA）研究远少于分类任务，现有分类方法依赖分类特定目标和决策边界，难以直接应用于连续回归任务；尽管近期工作通过子空间对齐取得进展，但仍存在优化空间。
AI.method: 提出PSC框架，利用源模型预测支持子空间进行目标特征对齐，并在正交补空间中校准残差频谱松弛，实现块频谱匹配，保持模型无关性和易实现性。
AI.result: 在多个图像回归基准上均取得一致改进，尤其在严重分布偏移情况下表现突出，优于多种强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: PSC是一种简单、通用且有效的源自由图像回归TTA方法，通过频谱级对齐与校准显著提升模型在分布外数据上的性能。

title: MM-algorithms for traditional and convex NMF with Tweedie and Negative Binomial cost functions and empirical evaluation
summary: Non-negative matrix factorisation (NMF) is a widely used tool for unsupervised learning and feature extraction, with applications ranging from genomics to text analysis and signal processing. Standard formulations of NMF are typically derived under Gaussian or Poisson noise assumptions, which may be inadequate for data exhibiting overdispersion or other complex mean-variance relationships. In this paper, we develop a unified framework for both traditional and convex NMF under a broad class of distributional assumptions, including Negative Binomial and Tweedie models, where the connection between the Tweedie and the $β$-divergence is also highlighted. Using a Majorize-Minimisation approach, we derive multiplicative update rules for all considered models, and novel updates for convex NMF with Poisson and Negative Binomial cost functions. We provide a unified implementation of all considered models, including the first implementations of several convex NMF models. Empirical evaluations on mutational and word count data demonstrate that the choice of noise model critically affects model fit and feature recovery, and that convex NMF can provide an efficient and robust alternative to traditional NMF in scenarios where the number of classes is large. The code for our proposed updates is available in the R package nmfgenr and can be found at https://github.com/MartaPelizzola/nmfgenr.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一框架，用于传统和凸非负矩阵分解（NMF），在包括负二项式和Tweedie模型在内的广泛分布假设下，通过极大化-最小化方法推导出所有模型的乘法更新规则，并为凸NMF提供了新的更新规则。实证评估表明，噪声模型的选择对模型拟合和特征恢复至关重要，且凸NMF在类别数量较大时可作为传统NMF的高效稳健替代方案。代码已开源于R包nmfgenr。
AI.motivation: 标准NMF通常基于高斯或泊松噪声假设，但这些假设在处理具有过度离散或其他复杂均值-方差关系的数据时可能不充分，因此需要更灵活的分布假设来提升模型适应性。
AI.method: 采用极大化-最小化方法，在广义分布假设（如负二项式、Tweedie）下推导出乘法更新规则，并针对凸NMF设计了新的更新算法，同时构建了统一实现框架。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，噪声模型的选择显著影响模型拟合效果与特征提取性能；凸NMF在大规模分类场景中表现出更高的效率与鲁棒性，优于传统NMF。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的统一框架有效扩展了NMF的应用范围，支持多种分布假设下的建模，且凸NMF是一种值得推广的高效稳健替代方法。

title: M3GCLR: Multi-View Mini-Max Infinite Skeleton-Data Game Contrastive Learning For Skeleton-Based Action Recognition
summary: In recent years, contrastive learning has drawn significant attention as an effective approach to reducing reliance on labeled data. However, existing methods for self-supervised skeleton-based action recognition still face three major limitations: insufficient modeling of view discrepancies, lack of effective adversarial mechanisms, and uncontrollable augmentation perturbations. To tackle these issues, we propose the Multi-view Mini-Max infinite skeleton-data Game Contrastive Learning for skeleton-based action Recognition (M3GCLR), a game-theoretic contrastive framework. First, we establish the Infinite Skeleton-data Game (ISG) model and the ISG equilibrium theorem, and further provide a rigorous proof, enabling mini-max optimization based on multi-view mutual information. Then, we generate normal-extreme data pairs through multi-view rotation augmentation and adopt temporally averaged input as a neutral anchor to achieve structural alignment, thereby explicitly characterizing perturbation strength. Next, leveraging the proposed equilibrium theorem, we construct a strongly adversarial mini-max skeleton-data game to encourage the model to mine richer action-discriminative information. Finally, we introduce the dual-loss equilibrium optimizer to optimize the game equilibrium, allowing the learning process to maximize action-relevant information while minimizing encoding redundancy, and we prove the equivalence between the proposed optimizer and the ISG model. Extensive Experiments show that M3GCLR achieves three-stream 82.1%, 85.8% accuracy on NTU RGB+D 60 (X-Sub, X-View) and 72.3%, 75.0% accuracy on NTU RGB+D 120 (X-Sub, X-Set). On PKU-MMD Part I and II, it attains 89.1%, 45.2% in three-stream respectively, all results matching or outperforming state-of-the-art performance. Ablation studies confirm the effectiveness of each component.

AI.tldr: 提出M3GCLR框架，通过博弈论思想解决骨架动作识别中视角差异、对抗机制不足和增强扰动不可控的问题。利用无限骨架数据博弈模型与极小极大优化，结合多视图旋转增强和时间平均输入作为中性锚点，实现结构对齐，并引入双损失均衡优化器以最大化动作相关信息并最小化编码冗余。在多个基准数据集上达到或超过现有最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督骨架动作识别方法存在视角差异建模不足、缺乏有效对抗机制以及增强扰动不可控等问题，限制了模型性能提升。
AI.method: 提出无限骨架数据博弈（ISG）模型及平衡定理，基于多视图旋转增强生成正常-极端数据对，采用时间平均输入作为中性锚点实现结构对齐；构建强对抗性极小极大骨架-数据博弈，并设计双损失均衡优化器以优化博弈平衡。
AI.result: 在NTU RGB+D 60（X-Sub, X-View）上取得82.1%、85.8%准确率，在NTU RGB+D 120（X-Sub, X-Set）上取得72.3%、75.0%准确率；在PKU-MMD Part I和II上分别达到89.1%、45.2%的三流准确率，均优于或匹配当前最优结果。消融实验验证各模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: M3GCLR通过游戏理论框架有效解决了自监督骨架动作识别中的关键挑战，显著提升了模型性能，为无标签学习提供了新范式。

title: MIL-PF: Multiple Instance Learning on Precomputed Features for Mammography Classification
comment: 10 pages, 2 figures, 4 tables. Code will be released
summary: Modern foundation models provide highly expressive visual representations, yet adapting them to high-resolution medical imaging remains challenging due to limited annotations and weak supervision. Mammography, in particular, is characterized by large images, variable multi-view studies and predominantly breast-level labels, making end-to-end fine-tuning computationally expensive and often impractical. We propose Multiple Instance Learning on Precomputed Features (MIL-PF), a scalable framework that combines frozen foundation encoders with a lightweight MIL head for mammography classification. By precomputing the semantic representations and training only a small task-specific aggregation module (40k parameters), the method enables efficient experimentation and adaptation without retraining large backbones. The architecture explicitly models the global tissue context and the sparse local lesion signals through attention-based aggregation. MIL-PF achieves state-of-the-art classification performance at clinical scale while substantially reducing training complexity. We release the code for full reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 提出MIL-PF框架，利用预计算特征和轻量级多实例学习头，实现高效乳腺影像分类，显著降低训练复杂度并达到领先性能。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率医学影像（如乳腺摄影）标注有限、监督信号弱，传统微调方法计算成本高且不切实际。
AI.method: 采用冻结的基础编码器预计算语义特征，仅训练一个小型任务特定聚合模块（40k参数），通过注意力机制建模全局组织上下文与局部病灶信号。
AI.result: 在临床规模数据上实现了最先进的分类性能，同时大幅减少训练复杂性，支持高效实验与适应。
AI.conclusion: MIL-PF为大规模乳腺影像分析提供了一种高效、可扩展的解决方案，适用于资源受限环境下的快速迭代与部署。

title: SinGeo: Unlock Single Model's Potential for Robust Cross-View Geo-Localization
summary: Robust cross-view geo-localization (CVGL) remains challenging despite the surge in recent progress. Existing methods still rely on field-of-view (FoV)-specific training paradigms, where models are optimized under a fixed FoV but collapse when tested on unseen FoVs and unknown orientations. This limitation necessitates deploying multiple models to cover diverse variations. Although studies have explored dynamic FoV training by simply randomizing FoVs, they failed to achieve robustness across diverse conditions -- implicitly assuming all FoVs are equally difficult. To address this gap, we present SinGeo, a simple yet powerful framework that enables a single model to realize robust cross-view geo-localization without additional modules or explicit transformations. SinGeo employs a dual discriminative learning architecture that enhances intra-view discriminability within both ground and satellite branches, and is the first to introduce a curriculum learning strategy to achieve robust CVGL. Extensive evaluations on four benchmark datasets reveal that SinGeo sets state-of-the-art (SOTA) results under diverse conditions, and notably outperforms methods specifically trained for extreme FoVs. Beyond superior performance, SinGeo also exhibits cross-architecture transferability. Furthermore, we propose a consistency evaluation method to quantitatively assess model stability under varying views, providing an explainable perspective for understanding and advancing robustness in future CVGL research. Codes will be available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: SinGeo提出一种简单而强大的框架，实现无需额外模块或显式变换的鲁棒跨视角地理定位。通过双判别学习架构增强地面与卫星分支内的视图内区分能力，并首次引入课程学习策略提升跨视角鲁棒性。在四个基准数据集上的实验表明，SinGeo在多种条件下均达到当前最优性能，尤其在极端视角下超越专门训练的方法。此外，该方法具有跨架构迁移能力，并提出一致性评估方法以量化模型在不同视角下的稳定性，为未来研究提供可解释性支持。
AI.motivation: 现有跨视角地理定位方法依赖特定视场角（FoV）的训练范式，在未见视场角和未知朝向时性能下降，需部署多个模型覆盖变化。尽管已有研究尝试随机化视场角进行动态训练，但未能实现对多样化条件的鲁棒性，且隐含假设所有视场角难度相同，存在明显局限。
AI.method: SinGeo采用双判别学习架构，强化地面与卫星分支内部的视图内区分能力；创新性地引入课程学习策略，逐步训练模型应对不同复杂度的视场角变化，从而提升整体鲁棒性。
AI.result: SinGeo在四个基准数据集上均取得当前最优结果，尤其在极端视场角条件下显著优于专门训练的方法；同时具备跨架构迁移能力，并通过新提出的定量一致性评估方法验证了模型在不同视角下的稳定性。
AI.conclusion: SinGeo实现了单一模型在多样视场角下的鲁棒跨视角地理定位，突破了传统多模型部署的限制，其高效性、泛化性和可解释性为未来研究提供了新方向。

title: FreqCycle: A Multi-Scale Time-Frequency Analysis Method for Time Series Forecasting
comment: 18 pages, 17 figures, accepted to AAAI 2026. Code available at https://github.com/boya-zhang-ai/FreqCycle
summary: Mining time-frequency features is critical for time series forecasting. Existing research has predominantly focused on modeling low-frequency patterns, where most time series energy is concentrated. The overlooking of mid to high frequency continues to limit further performance gains in deep learning models. We propose FreqCycle, a novel framework integrating: (i) a Filter-Enhanced Cycle Forecasting (FECF) module to extract low-frequency features by explicitly learning shared periodic patterns in the time domain, and (ii) a Segmented Frequency-domain Pattern Learning (SFPL) module to enhance mid to high frequency energy proportion via learnable filters and adaptive weighting. Furthermore, time series data often exhibit coupled multi-periodicity, such as intertwined weekly and daily cycles. To address coupled multi-periodicity as well as long lookback window challenges, we extend FreqCycle hierarchically into MFreqCycle, which decouples nested periodic features through cross-scale interactions. Extensive experiments on seven diverse domain benchmarks demonstrate that FreqCycle achieves state-of-the-art accuracy while maintaining faster inference speeds, striking an optimal balance between performance and efficiency.

AI.tldr: FreqCycle提出一种新框架，通过FECF模块提取低频特征，通过SFPL模块增强中高频能量，有效提升时序预测性能；进一步扩展为MFreqCycle以处理多周期耦合与长回溯窗口问题，在多个基准上实现最优性能与高效推理。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注低频模式建模，忽视中高频特征，限制了深度学习模型的性能提升。
AI.method: 提出FreqCycle框架，包含Filter-Enhanced Cycle Forecasting (FECF)模块用于学习共享周期模式，以及Segmented Frequency-domain Pattern Learning (SFPL)模块通过可学习滤波器和自适应加权增强中高频能量；进一步构建层次化MFreqCycle以解耦嵌套周期特征。
AI.result: 在七个不同领域的基准测试中，FreqCycle达到最先进的准确率，并保持更快的推理速度，实现了性能与效率的平衡。
AI.conclusion: FreqCycle及其扩展版本MFreqCycle能够有效捕捉时序数据中的多周期特征，显著提升预测精度并保证高效推理，为时序预测提供了新的解决方案。

title: EventVGGT: Exploring Cross-Modal Distillation for Consistent Event-based Depth Estimation
summary: Event cameras offer superior sensitivity to high-speed motion and extreme lighting, making event-based monocular depth estimation a promising approach for robust 3D perception in challenging conditions. However, progress is severely hindered by the scarcity of dense depth annotations. While recent annotation-free approaches mitigate this by distilling knowledge from Vision Foundation Models (VFMs), a critical limitation persists: they process event streams as independent frames. By neglecting the inherent temporal continuity of event data, these methods fail to leverage the rich temporal priors encoded in VFMs, ultimately yielding temporally inconsistent and less accurate depth predictions. To address this, we introduce EventVGGT, a novel framework that explicitly models the event stream as a coherent video sequence. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to distill spatio-temporal and multi-view geometric priors from the Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT) into the event domain. We achieve this via a comprehensive tri-level distillation strategy: (i) Cross-Modal Feature Mixture (CMFM) bridges the modality gap at the output level by fusing RGB and event features to generate auxiliary depth predictions; (ii) Spatio-Temporal Feature Distillation (STFD) distills VGGT's powerful spatio-temporal representations at the feature level; and (iii) Temporal Consistency Distillation (TCD) enforces cross-frame coherence at the temporal level by aligning inter-frame depth changes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EventVGGT consistently outperforms existing methods -- reducing the absolute mean depth error at 30m by over 53\% on EventScape (from 2.30 to 1.06) -- while exhibiting robust zero-shot generalization on the unseen DENSE and MVSEC datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EventVGGT框架，首次将视觉几何基础变压器（VGGT）中的时空与多视角几何先验蒸馏到事件域，通过三层次蒸馏策略（跨模态特征混合、时空特征蒸馏、时间一致性蒸馏），有效建模事件流的时间连续性，显著提升事件相机下的单目深度估计精度与时间一致性。在EventScape上绝对平均深度误差降低53%以上，且在DENSE和MVSEC数据集上展现强零样本泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有无标注事件深度估计方法将事件流视为独立帧，忽略事件数据的时间连续性，导致无法利用视觉基础模型中的丰富时空先验，造成深度预测不一致且精度不足。
AI.method: 提出EventVGGT框架，采用三层次蒸馏策略：(i) 跨模态特征混合（CMFM）融合RGB与事件特征生成辅助深度预测；(ii) 时空特征蒸馏（STFD）提取VGGT的时空表示；(iii) 时间一致性蒸馏（TCD）通过对齐帧间深度变化实现跨帧一致性。
AI.result: 在EventScape上绝对平均深度误差从2.30降至1.06，降幅超53%；在未见数据集DENSE和MVSEC上表现出优异的零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: EventVGGT首次系统性地将视觉模型中的时空与多视角几何先验引入事件域，通过显式建模事件流的时间连续性，显著提升了事件相机下单目深度估计的准确性与稳定性，为复杂场景下的鲁棒三维感知提供了新范式。

title: No evaluation without fair representation : Impact of label and selection bias on the evaluation, performance and mitigation of classification models
comment: 31 pages, 14 figures + appendix Submitted to the ACM Journal on Responsible Computing
summary: Bias can be introduced in diverse ways in machine learning datasets, for example via selection or label bias. Although these bias types in themselves have an influence on important aspects of fair machine learning, their different impact has been understudied. In this work, we empirically analyze the effect of label bias and several subtypes of selection bias on the evaluation of classification models, on their performance, and on the effectiveness of bias mitigation methods. We also introduce a biasing and evaluation framework that allows to model fair worlds and their biased counterparts through the introduction of controlled bias in real-life datasets with low discrimination. Using our framework, we empirically analyze the impact of each bias type independently, while obtaining a more representative evaluation of models and mitigation methods than with the traditional use of a subset of biased data as test set. Our results highlight different factors that influence how impactful bias is on model performance. They also show an absence of trade-off between fairness and accuracy, and between individual and group fairness, when models are evaluated on a test set that does not exhibit unwanted bias. They furthermore indicate that the performance of bias mitigation methods is influenced by the type of bias present in the data. Our findings call for future work to develop more accurate evaluations of prediction models and fairness interventions, but also to better understand other types of bias, more complex scenarios involving the combination of different bias types, and other factors that impact the efficiency of the mitigation methods, such as dataset characteristics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入一个可控的偏置框架，系统地研究了标签偏置和多种选择偏置子类型对分类模型性能及偏置缓解方法有效性的影响。研究发现，不同偏置类型对模型表现的影响各异，且在无额外偏置的测试集上，公平性与准确性、个体公平与群体公平之间并不存在权衡关系。此外，缓解方法的效果受数据中具体偏置类型的影响。研究呼吁未来工作应改进模型与公平干预措施的评估方式，并深入探索更多类型的偏置及其组合效应。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对不同类型偏置（如标签偏置和选择偏置）的独立影响关注不足，导致对模型公平性评估不充分，缺乏对偏置缓解方法真实效能的准确判断。
AI.method: 提出一个偏置引入与评估框架，通过在低歧视的真实数据集上控制引入各类偏置，实现对不同偏置类型影响的独立分析，并在无偏测试集上评估模型与缓解方法的表现。
AI.result: 不同偏置类型对模型性能的影响存在差异；在无偏测试集上，公平性与准确性、个体公平与群体公平之间无明显权衡；偏置缓解方法的有效性取决于数据中具体的偏置类型。
AI.conclusion: 当前评估体系需改进，未来应更深入理解各种偏置类型、其组合效应以及数据特征等因素对缓解方法效率的影响。

title: Training-Free Coverless Multi-Image Steganography with Access Control
summary: Coverless Image Steganography (CIS) hides information without explicitly modifying a cover image, providing strong imperceptibility and inherent robustness to steganalysis. However, existing CIS methods largely lack robust access control, making it difficult to selectively reveal different hidden contents to different authorized users. Such access control is critical for scalable and privacy-sensitive information hiding in multi-user settings. We propose MIDAS, a training-free diffusion-based CIS framework that enables multi-image hiding with user-specific access control via latent-level fusion. MIDAS introduces a Random Basis mechanism to suppress residual structural information and a Latent Vector Fusion module that reshapes aggregated latents to align with the diffusion process. Experimental results demonstrate that MIDAS consistently outperforms existing training-free CIS baselines in access control functionality, stego image quality and diversity, robustness to noise, and resistance to steganalysis, establishing a practical and scalable approach to access-controlled coverless steganography.

AI.tldr: MIDAS 是一种无需训练的基于扩散模型的覆盖图像隐写框架，通过潜在空间融合实现多图像隐藏和用户特定访问控制。它引入随机基机制抑制残留结构信息，并设计潜在向量融合模块以对齐扩散过程。实验表明，MIDAS 在访问控制、隐写图像质量与多样性、抗噪声能力及抗隐写分析方面均优于现有无训练基线方法，为多用户场景下的可控覆盖隐写提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有覆盖图像隐写方法缺乏有效的访问控制机制，难以在多用户环境中实现对不同用户的差异化内容揭示，限制了其在需要隐私保护和可扩展性的信息隐藏场景中的应用。
AI.method: 提出基于扩散模型的MIDAS框架，采用随机基机制减少结构残留，通过潜在向量融合模块将聚合的潜在表示调整至与扩散过程兼容的形态，实现用户级访问控制下的多图像隐藏。
AI.result: MIDAS 在访问控制功能、隐写图像质量与多样性、抗噪声能力以及抵抗隐写分析方面显著优于现有无训练基线方法，验证了其在实际应用中的有效性与可行性。
AI.conclusion: MIDAS 为覆盖图像隐写提供了一种无需训练、可扩展且具备强访问控制能力的新范式，适用于多用户环境下的隐私敏感信息隐藏任务。

title: ICDAR 2025 Competition on End-to-End Document Image Machine Translation Towards Complex Layouts
summary: Document Image Machine Translation (DIMT) seeks to translate text embedded in document images from one language to another by jointly modeling both textual content and page layout, bridging optical character recognition (OCR) and natural language processing (NLP). The DIMT 2025 Challenge advances research on end-to-end document image translation, a rapidly evolving area within multimodal document understanding. The competition features two tracks, OCR-free and OCR-based, each with two subtasks for small (less than 1B parameters) and large (greater than 1B parameters) models. Participants submit a single unified DIMT system, with the option to incorporate provided OCR transcripts. Running from December 10, 2024 to April 20, 2025, the competition attracted 69 teams and 27 valid submissions in total. Track 1 had 34 teams and 13 valid submissions, while Track 2 had 35 teams and 14 valid submissions. In this report, we present the challenge motivation, dataset construction, task definitions, evaluation protocol, and a summary of results. Our analysis shows that large-model approaches establish a promising new paradigm for translating complex-layout document images and highlight substantial opportunities for future research.

AI.tldr: DIMT 2025 Challenge推动端到端文档图像翻译研究，涵盖无OCR与有OCR双赛道，分大小模型子任务，共吸引69支队伍、27份有效提交。结果显示大模型在复杂版面翻译中表现优异，展现新范式潜力。
AI.motivation: 推动文档图像机器翻译（DIMT）发展，解决传统方法中光学字符识别（OCR）与自然语言处理（NLP）脱节问题，实现文本内容与版面布局的联合建模。
AI.method: 设计双赛道（OCR-free与OCR-based）及大小模型子任务，构建多语言、多版面文档图像数据集，采用统一评估协议，支持参赛者提交集成系统。
AI.result: 大模型在复杂版面文档翻译中表现突出，验证其作为新范式可行性；小模型仍存在性能瓶颈，显示未来优化空间。
AI.conclusion: 大模型驱动的端到端方法为复杂布局文档图像翻译提供了高效解决方案，未来需进一步探索模型效率与跨语言泛化能力。

title: On Catastrophic Forgetting in Low-Rank Decomposition-Based Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning
summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) based on low-rank decomposition, such as LoRA, has become a standard for adapting large pretrained models. However, its behavior in sequential learning -- specifically regarding catastrophic forgetting -- remains insufficiently understood. In this work, we present an empirical study showing that forgetting is strongly influenced by the geometry and parameterization of the update subspace. While methods that restrict updates to small, shared matrix subspaces often suffer from task interference, tensor-based decompositions (e.g., LoRETTA) mitigate forgetting by capturing richer structural information within ultra-compact budgets, and structurally aligned parameterizations (e.g., WeGeFT) preserve pretrained representations. Our findings highlight update subspace design as a key factor in continual learning and offer practical guidance for selecting efficient adaptation strategies in sequential settings.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究揭示了参数高效微调（PEFT）在序列学习中灾难性遗忘的机制，发现更新子空间的几何结构与参数化方式对遗忘有显著影响。基于低秩分解的方法（如LoRA）在共享小矩阵子空间时易受任务干扰，而基于张量的分解（如LoRETTA）和结构对齐的参数化（如WeGeFT）能有效缓解遗忘，因其在极小预算下捕捉了更丰富的结构信息并保留了预训练表示。
AI.motivation: 理解参数高效微调（PEFT）在序列学习中的行为，尤其是其在灾难性遗忘方面的表现，以指导高效适应策略的选择。
AI.method: 通过实证分析不同PEFT方法在更新子空间设计上的表现，比较低秩分解、张量分解及结构对齐参数化的效果。
AI.result: 发现更新子空间的几何结构和参数化方式显著影响遗忘程度；张量基方法和结构对齐方法在保持性能的同时显著减少遗忘。
AI.conclusion: 更新子空间的设计是持续学习中的关键因素，应优先考虑结构丰富且与预训练表示一致的参数化策略。

title: Physics-informed neural operator for predictive parametric phase-field modelling
summary: Predicting the microstructural and morphological evolution of materials through phase-field modelling is computationally intensive, particularly for high-throughput parametric studies. While neural operators such as the Fourier neural operator (FNO) show promise in accelerating the solution of parametric partial differential equations (PDEs), the lack of explicit physical constraints, may limit generalisation and long-term accuracy for complex phase-field dynamics. Here, we develop a physics-informed neural operator framework to learn parametric phase-field PDEs, namely PF-PINO. By embedding the residuals of phase-field governing equations into the data-fidelity loss function, our framework effectively enforces physical constraints during training. We validate PF-PINO against benchmark phase-field problems, including electrochemical corrosion, dendritic crystal solidification, and spinodal decomposition. Our results demonstrate that PF-PINO significantly outperforms conventional FNO in accuracy, generalisation capability, and long-term stability. This work provides a robust and efficient computational tool for phase-field modelling and highlights the potential of physics-informed neural operators to advance scientific machine learning for complex interfacial evolution problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种物理信息神经算子框架PF-PINO，用于高效学习参数化相场偏微分方程。通过在数据保真度损失函数中嵌入相场控制方程的残差，该方法在训练过程中有效施加了物理约束。在电化学腐蚀、枝晶凝固和旋节分解等基准问题上验证表明，PF-PINO在精度、泛化能力和长期稳定性方面显著优于传统FNO，为相场建模提供了一个高效可靠的计算工具，并展示了物理信息神经算子在复杂界面演化问题中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 相场建模在预测材料微观结构和形貌演化时计算成本高，尤其在高通量参数研究中。虽然傅里叶神经算子（FNO）能加速求解参数化偏微分方程，但缺乏显式物理约束，限制了其在复杂相场动力学中的泛化性和长期准确性。因此，需要一种结合物理规律与机器学习优势的新方法。
AI.method: 提出PF-PINO框架，将相场控制方程的残差作为物理约束引入数据保真度损失函数中，在训练过程中强制满足物理规律，从而提升模型的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.result: PF-PINO在多个基准相场问题上表现优异，相比传统FNO显著提升了精度、泛化能力及长期稳定性，证明其在复杂界面演化模拟中的有效性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: PF-PINO是一种高效且稳健的相场建模工具，成功融合了物理规律与神经算子的优势，为科学机器学习在复杂界面演化问题中的应用提供了新范式。

title: RiO-DETR: DETR for Real-time Oriented Object Detection
summary: We present RiO-DETR: DETR for Real-time Oriented Object Detection, the first real-time oriented detection transformer to the best of our knowledge. Adapting DETR to oriented bounding boxes (OBBs) poses three challenges: semantics-dependent orientation, angle periodicity that breaks standard Euclidean refinement, and an enlarged search space that slows convergence. RiO-DETR resolves these issues with task-native designs while preserving real-time efficiency. First, we propose Content-Driven Angle Estimation by decoupling angle from positional queries, together with Rotation-Rectified Orthogonal Attention to capture complementary cues for reliable orientation. Second, Decoupled Periodic Refinement combines bounded coarse-to-fine updates with a Shortest-Path Periodic Loss for stable learning across angular seams. Third, Oriented Dense O2O injects angular diversity into dense supervision to speed up angle convergence at no extra cost. Extensive experiments on DOTA-1.0, DIOR-R, and FAIR-1M-2.0 demonstrate RiO-DETR establishes a new speed--accuracy trade-off for real-time oriented detection. Code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: RiO-DETR 是首个实时定向目标检测的Transformer模型，解决了语义依赖方向、角度周期性及搜索空间扩大带来的挑战。通过内容驱动的角度估计、旋转修正正交注意力、解耦周期性精炼和定向密集O2O监督等创新设计，在保持实时效率的同时显著提升检测精度。在DOTA-1.0、DIOR-R和FAIR-1M-2.0数据集上验证了其优越的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有DETR模型难以直接应用于定向边界框（OBB）检测，主要受限于语义依赖的方向性、角度的周期性导致欧氏优化失效，以及更大的搜索空间造成收敛缓慢。为实现高效实时的定向检测，亟需针对这些挑战进行专门设计。
AI.method: 提出Content-Driven Angle Estimation，将角度与位置查询解耦，并引入Rotation-Rectified Orthogonal Attention以捕捉互补特征；采用Decoupled Periodic Refinement结合有界粗到精更新与Shortest-Path Periodic Loss，实现稳定的角度学习；设计Oriented Dense O2O，通过注入角度多样性实现密集监督，加速角度收敛且无额外开销。
AI.result: 在DOTA-1.0、DIOR-R和FAIR-1M-2.0数据集上，RiO-DETR实现了领先的实时定向检测性能，建立了新的速度-精度权衡标杆。
AI.conclusion: RiO-DETR是首个真正意义上的实时定向检测Transformer，通过任务原生设计有效克服了定向检测中的核心难题，在精度与效率之间取得良好平衡，具备实际应用潜力。

title: PromptDLA: A Domain-aware Prompt Document Layout Analysis Framework with Descriptive Knowledge as a Cue
summary: Document Layout Analysis (DLA) is crucial for document artificial intelligence and has recently received increasing attention, resulting in an influx of large-scale public DLA datasets. Existing work often combines data from various domains in recent public DLA datasets to improve the generalization of DLA. However, directly merging these datasets for training often results in suboptimal model performance, as it overlooks the different layout structures inherent to various domains. These variations include different labeling styles, document types, and languages. This paper introduces PromptDLA, a domain-aware Prompter for Document Layout Analysis that effectively leverages descriptive knowledge as cues to integrate domain priors into DLA. The innovative PromptDLA features a unique domain-aware prompter that customizes prompts based on the specific attributes of the data domain. These prompts then serve as cues that direct the DLA toward critical features and structures within the data, enhancing the model's ability to generalize across varied domains. Extensive experiments show that our proposal achieves state-of-the-art performance among DocLayNet, PubLayNet, M6Doc, and D$^4$LA. Our code is available at https://github.com/Zirui00/PromptDLA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PromptDLA，一种用于文档版面分析（DLA）的领域感知提示器，通过利用描述性知识作为线索，将领域先验信息融入DLA任务中。其核心创新在于设计了针对不同数据领域属性定制化提示的领域感知提示器，使模型能更有效地捕捉跨领域差异，提升泛化能力。在DocLayNet、PubLayNet、M6Doc和D$^4$LA等多个基准上实现了当前最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有文档版面分析方法在使用多源数据混合训练时，因忽略不同领域间布局结构的差异（如标注风格、文档类型、语言等），导致模型性能不佳。因此需要一种能够有效融合领域先验知识的方法，以提升模型在多样化场景下的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出领域感知提示器PromptDLA，根据数据领域的具体属性生成定制化提示，利用这些提示作为引导，帮助模型聚焦于关键特征与结构，从而增强对不同领域布局模式的理解与适应能力。
AI.result: 在多个主流文档版面分析数据集（DocLayNet、PubLayNet、M6Doc、D$^4$LA）上均取得了当前最优的性能表现，验证了方法的有效性和优越性。
AI.conclusion: PromptDLA通过引入领域感知提示机制，成功将领域先验知识融入文档版面分析流程，显著提升了模型在异构数据环境中的泛化能力，为未来文档智能系统的设计提供了新思路。

title: A Multi-Prototype-Guided Federated Knowledge Distillation Approach in AI-RAN Enabled Multi-Access Edge Computing System
summary: With the development of wireless network, Multi-Access Edge Computing (MEC) and Artificial Intelligence (AI)-native Radio Access Network (RAN) have attracted significant attention. Particularly, the integration of AI-RAN and MEC is envisioned to transform network efficiency and responsiveness. Therefore, it is valuable to investigate AI-RAN enabled MEC system. Federated learning (FL) nowadays is emerging as a promising approach for AI-RAN enabled MEC system, in which edge devices are enabled to train a global model cooperatively without revealing their raw data. However, conventional FL encounters the challenge in processing the non-independent and identically distributed (non-IID) data. Single prototype obtained by averaging the embedding vectors per class can be employed in FL to handle the data heterogeneity issue. Nevertheless, this may result in the loss of useful information owing to the average operation. Therefore, in this paper, a multi-prototype-guided federated knowledge distillation (MP-FedKD) approach is proposed. Particularly, self-knowledge distillation is integrated into FL to deal with the non-IID issue. To cope with the problem of information loss caused by single prototype-based strategy, multi-prototype strategy is adopted, where we present a conditional hierarchical agglomerative clustering (CHAC) approach and a prototype alignment scheme. Additionally, we design a novel loss function (called LEMGP loss) for each local client, where the relationship between global prototypes and local embedding will be focused. Extensive experiments over multiple datasets with various non-IID settings showcase that the proposed MP-FedKD approach outperforms the considered state-of-the-art baselines regarding accuracy, average accuracy and errors (RMSE and MAE).

AI.tldr: 提出了一种多原型引导的联邦知识蒸馏（MP-FedKD）方法，用于解决AI-RAN赋能的MEC系统中非独立同分布（non-IID）数据带来的挑战。通过引入自知识蒸馏、条件分层聚类（CHAC）和原型对齐机制，有效缓解了传统单原型方法的信息损失问题，并设计了新的LEMGP损失函数以增强全局与局部嵌入之间的关系建模。实验表明，该方法在多种非IID设置下均优于现有先进方法。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习在处理非独立同分布（non-IID）数据时存在性能下降问题，尤其是基于单原型的平均策略容易造成信息丢失，影响模型泛化能力。因此亟需一种更有效的机制来应对数据异构性挑战，提升边缘计算环境下的智能模型训练效果。
AI.method: 提出MP-FedKD方法，结合自知识蒸馏、条件分层聚类（CHAC）构建多原型，设计原型对齐方案，并引入新型LEMGP损失函数以优化本地客户端的训练过程，从而更好地适应非IID数据分布。
AI.result: 在多个数据集及不同非IID设置下的大量实验结果显示，所提方法在准确率、平均准确率以及均方根误差（RMSE）和平均绝对误差（MAE）方面均显著优于现有基准方法。
AI.conclusion: MP-FedKD通过多原型策略和精细化的损失设计，有效缓解了非IID数据带来的挑战，在边缘智能场景中展现出优越的性能，为AI-RAN与MEC融合系统的高效协同学习提供了新思路。

title: MetaDAT: Generalizable Trajectory Prediction via Meta Pre-training and Data-Adaptive Test-Time Updating
summary: Existing trajectory prediction methods exhibit significant performance degradation under distribution shifts during test time. Although test-time training techniques have been explored to enable adaptation, current approaches rely on an offline pre-trained predictor that lacks online learning flexibility. Moreover, they depend on fixed online model updating rules that do not accommodate the specific characteristics of test data. To address these limitations, we first propose a meta-learning framework to directly optimize the predictor for fast and accurate online adaptation, which performs bi-level optimization on the performance of simulated test-time adaptation tasks during pre-training. Furthermore, at test time, we introduce a data-adaptive model updating mechanism that dynamically adjusts the predefined learning rates and updating frequencies based on online partial derivatives and hard sample selection. This mechanism enables the online learning rate to suit the test data, and focuses on informative hard samples to enhance efficiency. Experiments are conducted on various challenging cross-dataset distribution shift scenarios, including nuScenes, Lyft, and Waymo. Results demonstrate that our method achieves superior adaptation accuracy, surpassing state-of-the-art test-time training methods for trajectory prediction. Additionally, our method excels under suboptimal learning rates and high FPS demands, showcasing its robustness and practicality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元学习的轨迹预测方法，通过双层优化预训练阶段模拟测试时适应任务，实现快速准确的在线自适应。测试时引入数据自适应模型更新机制，根据在线部分导数和困难样本选择动态调整学习率与更新频率，提升对测试数据的适应性与效率。在nuScenes、Lyft、Waymo等跨数据集分布偏移场景下，该方法显著优于现有最先进测试时训练方法，且在次优学习率和高帧率需求下仍表现稳健，具备强鲁棒性和实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法在测试时分布偏移下性能显著下降；尽管已有测试时训练技术用于适应，但依赖固定预训练模型和固定的在线更新规则，缺乏灵活性和对测试数据特性的适应能力。
AI.method: 提出一种元学习框架，在预训练阶段进行双层优化以优化预测器的快速在线适应能力；在测试阶段引入数据自适应模型更新机制，基于在线部分导数和困难样本选择动态调整学习率与更新频率。
AI.result: 在nuScenes、Lyft、Waymo等多个跨数据集分布偏移场景中，该方法在适应精度上超越现有最先进测试时训练方法；在次优学习率和高帧率条件下依然表现优异，展现出良好的鲁棒性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过元学习与数据自适应更新机制，有效提升了轨迹预测模型在测试时分布偏移下的自适应能力，具有更强的灵活性、效率与鲁棒性，适用于真实复杂场景。

title: Open-World Motion Forecasting
summary: Motion forecasting aims to predict the future trajectories of dynamic agents in the scene, enabling autonomous vehicles to effectively reason about scene evolution. Existing approaches operate under the closed-world regime and assume fixed object taxonomy as well as access to high-quality perception. Therefore, they struggle in real-world settings where perception is imperfect and object taxonomy evolves over time. In this work, we bridge this fundamental gap by introducing open-world motion forecasting, a novel setting in which new object classes are sequentially introduced over time and future object trajectories are estimated directly from camera images. We tackle this setting by proposing the first end-to-end class-incremental motion forecasting framework to mitigate catastrophic forgetting while simultaneously learning to forecast newly introduced classes. When a new class is introduced, our framework employs a pseudo-labeling strategy to first generate motion forecasting pseudo-labels for all known classes which are then processed by a vision-language model to filter inconsistent and over-confident predictions. Parallelly, our approach further mitigates catastrophic forgetting by using a novel replay sampling strategy that leverages query feature variance to sample previous sequences with informative motion patterns. Extensive evaluation on the nuScenes and Argoverse 2 datasets demonstrates that our approach successfully resists catastrophic forgetting and maintains performance on previously learned classes while improving adaptation to novel ones. Further, we demonstrate that our approach supports zero-shot transfer to real-world driving and naturally extends to end-to-end class-incremental planning, enabling continual adaptation of the full autonomous driving system. We provide the code at https://omen.cs.uni-freiburg.de .

AI.tldr: 本文提出开放世界运动预测新范式，解决真实场景中感知不完善和物体类别动态变化的问题。通过首个端到端的类增量运动预测框架，结合伪标签策略与视觉-语言模型过滤，有效缓解灾难性遗忘，并利用查询特征方差设计重放采样策略以保留旧类知识。在nuScenes和Argoverse 2数据集上的实验表明，该方法在保持旧类别性能的同时显著提升对新类别的适应能力，支持零样本跨域迁移和端到端类增量规划，推动自动驾驶系统持续学习。代码已开源。
AI.motivation: 现有运动预测方法基于封闭世界假设，依赖固定物体类别和高质量感知，在真实复杂环境中表现受限。实际驾驶场景中物体类别不断演化且感知存在误差，亟需一种能持续学习新类别的开放世界运动预测框架。
AI.method: 提出首个端到端类增量运动预测框架：1）引入伪标签策略生成所有已知类别的预测标签；2）使用视觉-语言模型筛选不一致或过自信的预测；3）设计基于查询特征方差的重放采样策略，选择具有信息量的旧序列进行记忆回放，缓解灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和Argoverse 2数据集上验证了方法的有效性，成功抵抗灾难性遗忘，保持对旧类别的性能，同时显著提升对新类别的适应能力；支持零样本迁移至真实驾驶场景，并可扩展至端到端类增量规划。
AI.conclusion: 本工作首次定义并解决了开放世界运动预测问题，构建了一个可持续学习、适应动态环境的运动预测框架，为实现真正意义上的持续自动驾驶提供了关键技术支撑。

title: Exploiting Label-Aware Channel Scoring for Adaptive Channel Pruning in Split Learning
summary: Split learning (SL) transfers most of the training workload to the server, which alleviates computational burden on client devices. However, the transmission of intermediate feature representations, referred to as smashed data, incurs significant communication overhead, particularly when a large number of client devices are involved. To address this challenge, we propose an adaptive channel pruning-aided SL (ACP-SL) scheme. In ACP-SL, a label-aware channel importance scoring (LCIS) module is designed to generate channel importance scores, distinguishing important channels from less important ones. Based on these scores, an adaptive channel pruning (ACP) module is developed to prune less important channels, thereby compressing the corresponding smashed data and reducing the communication overhead. Experimental results show that ACP-SL consistently outperforms benchmark schemes in test accuracy. Furthermore, it reaches a target test accuracy in fewer training rounds, thereby reducing communication overhead.

AI.tldr: 提出一种自适应通道剪枝辅助的分割学习（ACP-SL）方案，通过标签感知的通道重要性评分模块生成通道重要性得分，并利用自适应通道剪枝模块剪掉不重要的通道，从而压缩中间特征表示（即‘粉碎数据’），降低通信开销。实验表明，ACP-SL在测试准确率上优于基准方法，并在更少训练轮次内达到目标准确率，显著减少通信负担。
AI.motivation: 分割学习虽能减轻客户端计算负担，但中间特征表示的传输导致高通信开销，尤其在大量客户端参与时。因此亟需有效降低通信成本的方法。
AI.method: 设计标签感知通道重要性评分（LCIS）模块以评估通道重要性，并引入自适应通道剪枝（ACP）模块动态剪除低重要性通道，实现对粉碎数据的压缩。
AI.result: ACP-SL在测试准确率上持续优于基准方案，并在更少训练轮次内达到目标准确率，显著降低通信开销。
AI.conclusion: ACP-SL通过智能通道剪枝有效压缩了分割学习中的中间数据，实现了更高的通信效率和更快的收敛速度，是一种高效且实用的优化方案。

title: GIIM: Graph-based Learning of Inter- and Intra-view Dependencies for Multi-view Medical Image Diagnosis
comment: To appear in the 40th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI-26). 10 pages, 2 figures
summary: Computer-aided diagnosis (CADx) has become vital in medical imaging, but automated systems often struggle to replicate the nuanced process of clinical interpretation. Expert diagnosis requires a comprehensive analysis of how abnormalities relate to each other across various views and time points, but current multi-view CADx methods frequently overlook these complex dependencies. Specifically, they fail to model the crucial relationships within a single view and the dynamic changes lesions exhibit across different views. This limitation, combined with the common challenge of incomplete data, greatly reduces their predictive reliability. To address these gaps, we reframe the diagnostic task as one of relationship modeling and propose GIIM, a novel graph-based approach. Our framework is uniquely designed to simultaneously capture both critical intra-view dependencies between abnormalities and inter-view dynamics. Furthermore, it ensures diagnostic robustness by incorporating specific techniques to effectively handle missing data, a common clinical issue. We demonstrate the generality of this approach through extensive evaluations on diverse imaging modalities, including CT, MRI, and mammography. The results confirm that our GIIM model significantly enhances diagnostic accuracy and robustness over existing methods, establishing a more effective framework for future CADx systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于图的新型方法GIIM，用于计算机辅助诊断（CADx），通过同时建模单视图内异常间的依赖关系和多视图间动态变化，提升诊断准确性和鲁棒性，尤其在处理缺失数据方面表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有多视图CADx方法未能充分建模单视图内异常间的复杂依赖关系以及病变在不同视图间的动态变化，且常面临数据不完整的问题，导致预测可靠性下降。
AI.method: 将诊断任务重新定义为关系建模问题，提出基于图的GIIM框架，利用图结构同时捕捉视图内依赖和视图间动态变化，并引入专门技术以有效处理缺失数据。
AI.result: 在CT、MRI和乳腺摄影等多种影像模态上进行的广泛评估表明，GIIM显著提升了诊断准确性和鲁棒性，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: GIIM为未来CADx系统提供了一个更有效、更具通用性的框架，能够更好地模拟临床诊断中的复杂关系与动态变化。

title: Information Theoretic Bayesian Optimization over the Probability Simplex
summary: Bayesian optimization is a data-efficient technique that has been shown to be extremely powerful to optimize expensive, black-box, and possibly noisy objective functions. Many applications involve optimizing probabilities and mixtures which naturally belong to the probability simplex, a constrained non-Euclidean domain defined by non-negative entries summing to one. This paper introduces $α$-GaBO, a novel family of Bayesian optimization algorithms over the probability simplex. Our approach is grounded in information geometry, a branch of Riemannian geometry which endows the simplex with a Riemannian metric and a class of connections. Based on information geometry theory, we construct Matérn kernels that reflect the geometry of the probability simplex, as well as a one-parameter family of geometric optimizers for the acquisition function. We validate our method on benchmark functions and on a variety of real-world applications including mixtures of components, mixtures of classifiers, and a robotic control task, showing its increased performance compared to constrained Euclidean approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为$\alpha$-GaBO的新颖贝叶斯优化算法家族，专用于概率单纯形上的优化。该方法基于信息几何学，构建了反映单纯形几何特性的Matérn核函数，并设计了一类一参数的几何优化器来求解获取函数。在基准函数和多个真实世界应用（如组件混合、分类器混合及机器人控制任务）中，该方法表现出优于传统受限欧几里得方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 许多实际优化问题涉及概率或混合物，其变量自然位于概率单纯形上，这是一个非欧几里得且受约束的域。传统的贝叶斯优化方法在欧几里得空间中进行，难以有效捕捉单纯形的几何结构，导致优化效率低下。因此，亟需一种能够考虑单纯形几何特性的优化方法。
AI.method: 基于信息几何学，为概率单纯形引入黎曼度量和一类联络，构造出适应单纯形几何的Matérn核函数，并设计了一族一参数的几何优化器用于获取函数优化。该方法充分利用单纯形的非欧特性，实现更精准的建模与搜索。
AI.result: 在多个基准函数和真实应用场景中，$\alpha$-GaBO显著优于现有的受限欧几里得贝叶斯优化方法，展现出更高的优化效率与收敛速度，尤其在高维概率单纯形上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: $\alpha$-GaBO通过融合信息几何与贝叶斯优化，为概率单纯形上的黑箱优化提供了一种高效、精确的新范式，具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: Good Reasoning Makes Good Demonstrations: Implicit Reasoning Quality Supervision via In-Context Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) improves reasoning in large language models but treats all correct solutions equally, potentially reinforcing flawed traces that get correct answers by chance. We observe that better reasoning are better teachers: high-quality solutions serve as more effective demonstrations than low-quality ones. We term this teaching ability Demonstration Utility, and show that the policy model's own in-context learning ability provides an efficient way to measure it, yielding a quality signal termed Evidence Gain. To employ this signal during training, we introduce In-Context RLVR. By Bayesian analysis, we show that this objective implicitly reweights rewards by Evidence Gain, assigning higher weights to high-quality traces and lower weights to low-quality ones, without requiring costly computation or external evaluators. Experiments on mathematical benchmarks show improvements in both accuracy and reasoning quality over standard RLVR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出In-Context RLVR，通过利用策略模型的上下文学习能力衡量解题过程的质量（即演示效用），引入证据增益（Evidence Gain）作为质量信号，在不依赖外部评估器或高成本计算的情况下，隐式地对奖励进行重加权，从而提升大语言模型的推理质量。
AI.motivation: 标准RLVR将所有正确答案视为等价，可能强化偶然得到正确结果但推理质量差的路径。高质量推理应作为更有效的教学示范，因此需要一种机制来区分不同解题过程的质量。
AI.method: 利用策略模型自身的上下文学习能力，通过贝叶斯分析计算证据增益（Evidence Gain），作为解题质量的度量，并基于此设计新的奖励重加权机制——In-Context RLVR。
AI.result: 在数学基准测试中，In-Context RLVR在准确率和推理质量上均优于标准RLVR，证明了该方法能有效识别并强化高质量推理路径。
AI.conclusion: 高质量推理具有更高的演示效用，通过内在的证据增益信号可实现对推理质量的自动评估与优化，显著提升模型的推理能力。

title: EvoDriveVLA: Evolving Autonomous Driving Vision-Language-Action Model via Collaborative Perception-Planning Distillation
summary: Vision-Language-Action models have shown great promise for autonomous driving, yet they suffer from degraded perception after unfreezing the visual encoder and struggle with accumulated instability in long-term planning. To address these challenges, we propose EvoDriveVLA-a novel collaborative perception-planning distillation framework that integrates self-anchored perceptual constraints and oracle-guided trajectory optimization. Specifically, self-anchored visual distillation leverages self-anchor teacher to deliver visual anchoring constraints, regularizing student representations via trajectory-guided key-region awareness. In parallel, oracle-guided trajectory distillation employs a future-aware oracle teacher with coarse-to-fine trajectory refinement and Monte Carlo dropout sampling to produce high-quality trajectory candidates, thereby selecting the optimal trajectory to guide the student's prediction. EvoDriveVLA achieves SOTA performance in open-loop evaluation and significantly enhances performance in closed-loop evaluation. Our code is available at: https://github.com/hey-cjj/EvoDriveVLA.

AI.tldr: EvoDriveVLA提出了一种协同感知-规划蒸馏框架，通过自锚定视觉蒸馏和基于虚拟教师的轨迹优化，解决视觉编码器解冻后的感知退化与长期规划中的累积不稳定性问题。该方法在开环和闭环评估中均达到当前最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型在自动驾驶中面临视觉编码器解冻后感知性能下降及长期规划中累积不稳定性的问题，亟需新的机制来提升鲁棒性与一致性。
AI.method: 采用自锚定视觉蒸馏（利用自锚定教师提供视觉约束）与基于未来感知的虚拟教师轨迹蒸馏（结合粗到细轨迹优化和蒙特卡洛丢弃采样生成高质量轨迹候选），实现感知与规划的协同优化。
AI.result: 在开环评估中达到SOTA性能，在闭环评估中显著提升系统表现，验证了方法的有效性与稳定性。
AI.conclusion: EvoDriveVLA通过联合感知与规划的蒸馏机制，有效缓解了视觉编码器解冻带来的感知退化与长期规划不稳定性，为自动驾驶中的多模态模型设计提供了新思路。

title: TopoOR: A Unified Topological Scene Representation for the Operating Room
summary: Surgical Scene Graphs abstract the complexity of surgical operating rooms (OR) into a structure of entities and their relations, but existing paradigms suffer from strictly dyadic structural limitations. Frameworks that predominantly rely on pairwise message passing or tokenized sequences flatten the manifold geometry inherent to relational structures and lose structure in the process. We introduce TopoOR, a new paradigm that models multimodal operating rooms as a higher-order structure, innately preserving pairwise and group relationships. By lifting interactions between entities into higher-order topological cells, TopoOR natively models complex dynamics and multimodality present in the OR. This topological representation subsumes traditional scene graphs, thereby offering strictly greater expressivity. We also propose a higher-order attention mechanism that explicitly preserves manifold structure and modality-specific features throughout hierarchical relational attention. In this way, we circumvent combining 3D geometry, audio, and robot kinematics into a single joint latent representation, preserving the precise multimodal structure required for safety-critical reasoning, unlike existing methods. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms traditional graph and LLM-based baselines across sterility breach detection, robot phase prediction, and next-action anticipation

AI.tldr: TopoOR 提出一种新的范式，将多模态手术室建模为高阶拓扑结构，通过高阶拓扑单元保留实体间的成对与群体关系，克服传统二元图结构的局限性。引入高阶注意力机制，显式保持流形结构和模态特异性特征，避免将3D几何、音频和机器人运动学融合到单一潜在表示中，从而提升安全关键推理的精确性。实验表明，该方法在无菌违规检测、机器人阶段预测和下一步动作预测任务上优于传统图模型和基于大模型的基线。
AI.motivation: 现有手术场景图范式受限于严格的二元结构，依赖成对消息传递或分词序列会破坏关系结构的流形几何特性，难以有效建模复杂多模态手术室中的动态交互。
AI.method: 提出 TopoOR 框架，将手术室中的多模态实体及其关系建模为高阶拓扑细胞，利用高阶注意力机制在层次化关系注意力中保持曼德尔结构和模态特异性特征，避免跨模态融合导致的信息失真。
AI.result: 在无菌违规检测、机器人阶段预测和下一步动作预测任务上，TopoOR 显著优于传统图模型和基于大语言模型的基线方法，展现出更强的表达能力和推理性能。
AI.conclusion: TopoOR 通过高阶拓扑结构与注意力机制，实现了对多模态手术室环境更精准、更安全的建模，为复杂医疗场景下的智能系统提供了更高表达力的解决方案。

title: The Patrologia Graeca Corpus: OCR, Annotation, and Open Release of Noisy Nineteenth-Century Polytonic Greek Editions
summary: We present the Patrologia Graeca Corpus, the first large-scale open OCR and linguistic resource for nineteenthcentury editions of Ancient Greek. The collection covers the remaining undigitized volumes of the Patrologia Graeca (PG), printed in complex bilingual (Greek-Latin) layouts and characterized by highly degraded polytonic Greek typography. Through a dedicated pipeline combining YOLO-based layout detection and CRNN-based text recognition, we achieve a character error rate (CER) of 1.05% and a word error rate (WER) of 4.69%, largely outperforming existing OCR systems for polytonic Greek. The resulting corpus contains around six million lemmatized and part-of-speech tagged tokens, aligned with full OCR and layout annotations. Beyond its philological value, this corpus establishes a new benchmark for OCR on noisy polytonic Greek and provides training material for future models, including LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个针对19世纪古希腊语版本的大型开源OCR与语言学资源——Patrologia Graeca Corpus，涵盖未数字化的Patrologia Graeca（PG）剩余卷册。该数据集包含复杂的双语（希腊语-拉丁语）排版和高度退化的多音调希腊文排版。通过结合基于YOLO的版面检测与基于CRNN的文本识别的专用处理流程，实现了1.05%的字符错误率（CER）和4.69%的词错误率（WER），显著优于现有古希腊语OCR系统。最终构建的语料库包含约六百万个经过词形还原和词性标注的词元，并附带完整的OCR与版面标注。该语料库不仅具有重要的文献学价值，还为噪声多音调希腊语的OCR设立了新基准，并可作为未来模型（包括大语言模型）的训练材料。
AI.motivation: 现有的古希腊语OCR系统在处理19世纪复杂排版、退化多音调字体的文献时表现不佳，而大量未数字化的Patrologia Graeca（PG）文献具有重要学术价值，亟需高效准确的数字化手段以支持后续研究。
AI.method: 采用基于YOLO的版面分析技术识别文档区域，结合基于CRNN的文本识别模型进行字符识别，并对识别结果进行后处理与校正，实现高精度的文本提取。整个流程专为处理双语布局与低质量多音调希腊文设计。
AI.result: 成功构建了包含六百万个已标注词元的Patrologia Graeca Corpus，达到1.05%的字符错误率（CER）和4.69%的词错误率（WER），显著超越现有系统性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作不仅实现了对关键历史文献的大规模高质量数字化，也为多音调希腊语的OCR任务提供了新的基准，并为未来语言模型的训练与自然语言处理研究提供了宝贵资源。

title: OmniEarth: A Benchmark for Evaluating Vision-Language Models in Geospatial Tasks
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated effective perception and reasoning capabilities on general-domain tasks, leading to growing interest in their application to Earth observation. However, a systematic benchmark for comprehensively evaluating remote sensing vision-language models (RSVLMs) remains lacking. To address this gap, we introduce OmniEarth, a benchmark for evaluating RSVLMs under realistic Earth observation scenarios. OmniEarth organizes tasks along three capability dimensions: perception, reasoning, and robustness. It defines 28 fine-grained tasks covering multi-source sensing data and diverse geospatial contexts. The benchmark supports two task formulations: multiple-choice VQA and open-ended VQA. The latter includes pure text outputs for captioning tasks, bounding box outputs for visual grounding tasks, and mask outputs for segmentation tasks. To reduce linguistic bias and examine whether model predictions rely on visual evidence, OmniEarth adopts a blind test protocol and a quintuple semantic consistency requirement. OmniEarth includes 9,275 carefully quality-controlled images, including proprietary satellite imagery from Jilin-1 (JL-1), along with 44,210 manually verified instructions. We conduct a systematic evaluation of contrastive learning-based models, general closed-source and open-source VLMs, as well as RSVLMs. Results show that existing VLMs still struggle with geospatially complex tasks, revealing clear gaps that need to be addressed for remote sensing applications. OmniEarth is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/sjeeudd/OmniEarth.

AI.tldr: OmniEarth 是一个针对遥感视觉语言模型（RSVLMs）的综合性基准，涵盖感知、推理和鲁棒性三个维度，包含28个细粒度任务，支持多选和开放式VQA，采用盲测协议与语义一致性要求以减少语言偏差。该基准包含9,275张高质量图像和44,210条人工验证指令，用于评估多种VLMs在复杂地理空间任务中的表现，结果显示现有模型仍存在明显不足，亟需改进。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏系统性的基准来全面评估遥感视觉语言模型（RSVLMs）在真实地球观测场景下的性能，限制了该领域的发展与应用。
AI.method: 构建OmniEarth基准，涵盖多源传感数据与多样地理环境，设计28个细粒度任务，支持多种输出形式（文本、边界框、掩码），采用盲测与五重语义一致性要求以降低语言偏见，确保模型依赖视觉证据进行判断。
AI.result: 对多种对比学习模型、通用闭源与开源VLMs以及专门的RSVLMs进行系统评估，发现现有模型在复杂地理空间任务中表现不佳，存在显著性能差距。
AI.conclusion: OmniEarth为遥感视觉语言模型提供了首个系统化、高保真、可复现的评估框架，揭示了当前模型在地理空间理解上的局限性，为未来研究指明方向。

title: GAST: Gradient-aligned Sparse Tuning of Large Language Models with Data-layer Selection
summary: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) has become a key strategy for adapting large language models, with recent advances in sparse tuning reducing overhead by selectively updating key parameters or subsets of data. Existing approaches generally focus on two distinct paradigms: layer-selective methods aiming to fine-tune critical layers to minimize computational load, and data-selective methods aiming to select effective training subsets to boost training. However, current methods typically overlook the fact that different data points contribute varying degrees to distinct model layers, and they often discard potentially valuable information from data perceived as of low quality. To address these limitations, we propose Gradient-aligned Sparse Tuning (GAST), an innovative method that simultaneously performs selective fine-tuning at both data and layer dimensions as integral components of a unified optimization strategy. GAST specifically targets redundancy in information by employing a layer-sparse strategy that adaptively selects the most impactful data points for each layer, providing a more comprehensive and sophisticated solution than approaches restricted to a single dimension. Experiments demonstrate that GAST consistently outperforms baseline methods, establishing a promising direction for future research in PEFT strategies.

AI.tldr: 提出GAST方法，通过联合数据和层的稀疏微调，在参数高效微调中同时优化数据与层的选择，提升模型性能并减少冗余信息。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常只关注数据或层的单维度选择，忽视不同数据点对各层贡献差异，且可能丢弃低质量但有价值的信息，因此需要更全面的优化策略。
AI.method: GAST采用分层稀疏策略，自适应地为每层选择最具影响力的训练数据点，实现数据与层的联合选择，构成统一优化框架。
AI.result: 实验表明GAST在多个基准上均优于基线方法，展现出更强的性能和潜力。
AI.conclusion: GAST提供了一种更全面、高效的参数高效微调方案，为未来PEFT研究指明了新方向。

title: Prune Redundancy, Preserve Essence: Vision Token Compression in VLMs via Synergistic Importance-Diversity
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) face significant computational inefficiencies caused by excessive generation of visual tokens. While prior work shows that a large fraction of visual tokens are redundant, existing compression methods struggle to balance importance preservation and information diversity. To address this, we propose PruneSID, a training-free Synergistic Importance-Diversity approach featuring a two-stage pipeline: (1) Principal Semantic Components Analysis (PSCA) for clustering tokens into semantically coherent groups, ensuring comprehensive concept coverage, and (2) Intra-group Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS) for pruning redundant tokens while preserving key representative tokens within each group. Additionally, PruneSID incorporates an information-aware dynamic compression ratio mechanism that optimizes token compression rates based on image complexity, enabling more effective average information preservation across diverse scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, achieving 96.3% accuracy on LLaVA-1.5 with only 11.1% token retention, and 92.8% accuracy at extreme compression rates (5.6%) on LLaVA-NeXT, outperforming prior methods by 2.5% with 7.8 $\times$ faster prefilling speed compared to the original model. Our framework generalizes across diverse VLMs and both image and video modalities, showcasing strong cross-modal versatility. Code is available at https://github.com/ZhengyaoFang/PruneSID}{https://github.com/ZhengyaoFang/PruneSID.

AI.tldr: PruneSID提出了一种无需训练的协同重要性-多样性方法，通过两阶段管道实现高效视觉令牌压缩：首先利用主语义成分分析（PSCA）将令牌聚类为语义一致的组以保证概念覆盖；其次采用组内非最大抑制（NMS）去除冗余令牌并保留关键代表令牌。此外，引入基于图像复杂度的信息感知动态压缩比机制，优化不同场景下的信息保留效果。实验表明，该方法在保持高精度的同时显著降低计算开销，在多个模型和模态上均表现出优越性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLMs）因生成过多冗余视觉令牌而存在严重的计算效率问题。尽管已有研究指出大量视觉令牌具有冗余性，但现有压缩方法难以在保留重要性和保持信息多样性之间取得良好平衡。因此需要一种更高效且能兼顾两者的新方法。
AI.method: PruneSID采用两阶段无训练压缩框架：(1) 主语义成分分析（PSCA），通过聚类将视觉令牌划分为语义连贯的组，确保全面覆盖关键概念；(2) 组内非最大抑制（NMS），在每组内移除冗余令牌，同时保留最具代表性的关键令牌。结合信息感知的动态压缩比例机制，根据图像复杂度自适应调整压缩率，提升整体信息保留能力。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-1.5上仅使用11.1%的视觉令牌即可达到96.3%的准确率，在LLaVA-NeXT上于极端压缩率（5.6%）下仍达92.8%准确率，优于现有方法2.5%，且预填充速度提升7.8倍。该方法在多种视觉语言模型及图像、视频模态中均表现优异，具备良好的跨模态泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: PruneSID是一种高效、通用且无需训练的视觉令牌压缩框架，通过协同优化重要性与多样性，显著提升了视觉语言模型的推理效率与准确性，适用于广泛的应用场景。

title: CarbonBench: A Global Benchmark for Upscaling of Carbon Fluxes Using Zero-Shot Learning
summary:
Accurately quantifying terrestrial carbon exchange is essential for climate policy and carbon accounting, yet models must generalize to ecosystems underrepresented in sparse eddy covariance observations. Despite this challenge being a natural instance of zero-shot spatial transfer learning for time series regression, no standardized benchmark exists to rigorously evaluate model performance across geographically distinct locations with different climate regimes and vegetation types.
  We introduce CarbonBench, the first benchmark for zero-shot spatial transfer in carbon flux upscaling. CarbonBench comprises over 1.3 million daily observations from 567 flux tower sites globally (2000-2024). It provides: (1) stratified evaluation protocols that explicitly test generalization across unseen vegetation types and climate regimes, separating spatial transfer from temporal autocorrelation; (2) a harmonized set of remote sensing and meteorological features to enable flexible architecture design; and (3) baselines ranging from tree-based methods to domain-generalization architectures. By bridging machine learning methodologies and Earth system science, CarbonBench aims to enable systematic comparison of transfer learning methods, serves as a testbed for regression under distribution shift, and contributes to the next-generation climate modeling efforts.

AI.tldr: CarbonBench 是首个用于碳通量上推中零样本空间迁移学习的基准，包含全球567个通量塔站点超过130万条日观测数据（2000–2024年），提供分层评估协议、统一遥感与气象特征集以及多种基线模型，旨在推动跨生态系统和气候区的模型泛化能力评估，促进机器学习与地球系统科学融合。
AI.motivation: 当前碳通量模型难以在缺乏观测的生态系统中有效泛化，而现有方法缺乏标准化基准来评估其在不同植被类型和气候区间的零样本空间迁移性能，亟需一个可量化、可比较的评估框架。
AI.method: 构建 CarbonBench 基准，整合全球多源数据，设计分层评估协议以分离空间转移与时间自相关性，提供统一特征输入，并引入从树模型到领域泛化架构的多种基线方法。
AI.result: CarbonBench 成功建立了首个系统化的零样本空间迁移学习评估平台，支持跨区域、跨气候与植被类型的模型性能对比，为下一代气候建模提供了可靠测试工具。
AI.conclusion: CarbonBench 为碳通量预测中的迁移学习提供了标准化评估框架，推动了模型在未见生态系统的泛化能力研究，有助于提升全球碳循环模拟的准确性与可靠性。

title: Streaming Autoregressive Video Generation via Diagonal Distillation
summary: Large pretrained diffusion models have significantly enhanced the quality of generated videos, and yet their use in real-time streaming remains limited. Autoregressive models offer a natural framework for sequential frame synthesis but require heavy computation to achieve high fidelity. Diffusion distillation can compress these models into efficient few-step variants, but existing video distillation approaches largely adapt image-specific methods that neglect temporal dependencies. These techniques often excel in image generation but underperform in video synthesis, exhibiting reduced motion coherence, error accumulation over long sequences, and a latency-quality trade-off. We identify two factors that result in these limitations: insufficient utilization of temporal context during step reduction and implicit prediction of subsequent noise levels in next-chunk prediction (i.e., exposure bias). To address these issues, we propose Diagonal Distillation, which operates orthogonally to existing approaches and better exploits temporal information across both video chunks and denoising steps. Central to our approach is an asymmetric generation strategy: more steps early, fewer steps later. This design allows later chunks to inherit rich appearance information from thoroughly processed early chunks, while using partially denoised chunks as conditional inputs for subsequent synthesis. By aligning the implicit prediction of subsequent noise levels during chunk generation with the actual inference conditions, our approach mitigates error propagation and reduces oversaturation in long-range sequences. We further incorporate implicit optical flow modeling to preserve motion quality under strict step constraints. Our method generates a 5-second video in 2.61 seconds (up to 31 FPS), achieving a 277.3x speedup over the undistilled model.

AI.tldr: 提出Diagonal Distillation方法，通过不对称生成策略（早期多步、后期少步）和隐式光流建模，在减少推理步骤的同时提升视频生成的运动连贯性和质量，实现277.3倍加速，5秒视频仅需2.61秒生成。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型压缩方法多基于图像蒸馏，忽视时间依赖性，导致运动不连贯、误差累积和延迟-质量权衡问题。
AI.method: 提出Diagonal Distillation，采用不对称生成策略，利用前期充分去噪信息支持后期生成，并结合隐式光流建模以保持运动质量，缓解噪声水平预测偏差。
AI.result: 在2.61秒内生成5秒视频（最高达31 FPS），相比未蒸馏模型提速277.3倍，显著提升长序列生成的运动一致性和稳定性。
AI.conclusion: Diagonal Distillation通过有效利用时间上下文与优化生成流程，在极低推理步数下实现了高质量、高效率的视频生成，为实时视频生成提供了可行路径。

title: OptEMA: Adaptive Exponential Moving Average for Stochastic Optimization with Zero-Noise Optimality
summary: The Exponential Moving Average (EMA) is a cornerstone of widely used optimizers such as Adam. However, existing theoretical analyses of Adam-style methods have notable limitations: their guarantees can remain suboptimal in the zero-noise regime, rely on restrictive boundedness conditions (e.g., bounded gradients or objective gaps), use constant or open-loop stepsizes, or require prior knowledge of Lipschitz constants. To overcome these bottlenecks, we introduce OptEMA and analyze two novel variants: OptEMA-M, which applies an adaptive, decreasing EMA coefficient to the first-order moment with a fixed second-order decay, and OptEMA-V, which swaps these roles. Crucially, OptEMA is closed-loop and Lipschitz-free in the sense that its effective stepsizes are trajectory-dependent and do not require the Lipschitz constant for parameterization. Under standard stochastic gradient descent (SGD) assumptions, namely smoothness, a lower-bounded objective, and unbiased gradients with bounded variance, we establish rigorous convergence guarantees. Both variants achieve a noise-adaptive convergence rate of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2}+σ^{1/2} T^{-1/4})$ for the average gradient norm, where $σ$ is the noise level. In particular, in the zero-noise regime where $σ=0$, our bounds reduce to the nearly optimal deterministic rate $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2})$ without manual hyperparameter retuning.

AI.tldr: 提出OptEMA及其两种新变体OptEMA-M和OptEMA-V，通过自适应递减的EMA系数实现闭环、无Lipschitz常数依赖的优化，可在标准假设下实现噪声自适应收敛率$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2}+σ^{1/2} T^{-1/4})$，零噪声时达到近最优确定性速率$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2})$，无需手动调参。
AI.motivation: 现有Adam类方法的理论分析存在局限：在零噪声下表现不佳、依赖严格有界条件、使用固定或开环步长、需已知Lipschitz常数。为克服这些瓶颈，本文旨在设计一种无需先验知识且能自适应噪声的新型优化器。
AI.method: 提出OptEMA框架，包含两个变体：OptEMA-M采用自适应递减的一阶矩EMA系数与固定二阶衰减；OptEMA-V则交换角色。该方法为闭环策略，有效步长依赖于优化轨迹，不依赖Lipschitz常数。
AI.result: 在平滑性、目标函数下界、无偏梯度及有界方差的标准假设下，两种变体均实现噪声自适应收敛率$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2}+σ^{1/2} T^{-1/4})$；当噪声水平σ=0时，退化为近最优的$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2})$，且无需人工调整超参数。
AI.conclusion: OptEMA通过引入闭环、自适应的EMA机制，显著提升了现有Adam类优化器的理论性能，实现了在噪声环境下的自适应收敛，并在零噪声情况下保持最优精度，无需额外调参，具有重要的理论与实践意义。

title: Evolving Prompt Adaptation for Vision-Language Models
summary: The adaptation of large-scale vision-language models (VLMs) to downstream tasks with limited labeled data remains a significant challenge. While parameter-efficient prompt learning methods offer a promising path, they often suffer from catastrophic forgetting of pre-trained knowledge. Toward addressing this limitation, our work is grounded in the insight that governing the evolutionary path of prompts is essential for forgetting-free adaptation. To this end, we propose EvoPrompt, a novel framework designed to explicitly steer the prompt trajectory for stable, knowledge-preserving fine-tuning. Specifically, our approach employs a Modality-Shared Prompt Projector (MPP) to generate hierarchical prompts from a unified embedding space. Critically, an evolutionary training strategy decouples low-rank updates into directional and magnitude components, preserving early-learned semantic directions while only adapting their magnitude, thus enabling prompts to evolve without discarding foundational knowledge. This process is further stabilized by Feature Geometric Regularization (FGR), which enforces feature decorrelation to prevent representation collapse. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EvoPrompt achieves state-of-the-art performance in few-shot learning while robustly preserving the original zero-shot capabilities of pre-trained VLMs.

AI.tldr: EvoPrompt 是一种新型的提示学习框架，旨在解决大规模视觉-语言模型在少量标注数据下微调时的灾难性遗忘问题。通过引入模态共享提示投影器（MPP）和进化训练策略，该方法将低秩更新分解为方向与幅度分量，保留早期学习的语义方向仅调整幅度，从而实现稳定的知识保留微调。同时，特征几何正则化（FGR）防止表示崩溃。实验表明，EvoPrompt 在少样本学习中表现优异，并有效保持预训练模型的零样本性能。
AI.motivation: 现有参数高效提示学习方法在下游任务微调时容易导致预训练知识的灾难性遗忘，亟需一种能够稳定保留原始知识的同时有效适应新任务的方法。
AI.method: 提出 EvoPrompt 框架，包含模态共享提示投影器（MPP）生成分层提示，采用进化训练策略将低秩更新分解为方向与幅度分量，结合特征几何正则化（FGR）以防止表示崩溃，确保提示演化的稳定性与知识保留。
AI.result: EvoPrompt 在多个少样本学习任务上达到当前最优性能，同时显著保持了预训练模型的零样本能力，验证了其在知识保留与适应性方面的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式控制提示演化路径，EvoPrompt 实现了无遗忘的稳定微调，在少样本学习场景中兼具高性能与强鲁棒性，为大模型高效适配提供了新范式。

title: Generative Drifting is Secretly Score Matching: a Spectral and Variational Perspective
summary: Generative Modeling via Drifting has recently achieved state-of-the-art one-step image generation through a kernel-based drift operator, yet the success is largely empirical and its theoretical foundations remain poorly understood. In this paper, we make the following observation: \emph{under a Gaussian kernel, the drift operator is exactly a score difference on smoothed distributions}. This insight allows us to answer all three key questions left open in the original work: (1) whether a vanishing drift guarantees equality of distributions ($V_{p,q}=0\Rightarrow p=q$), (2) how to choose between kernels, and (3) why the stop-gradient operator is indispensable for stable training. Our observations position drifting within the well-studied score-matching family and enable a rich theoretical perspective. By linearizing the McKean-Vlasov dynamics and probing them in Fourier space, we reveal frequency-dependent convergence timescales comparable to \emph{Landau damping} in plasma kinetic theory: the Gaussian kernel suffers an exponential high-frequency bottleneck, explaining the empirical preference for the Laplacian kernel. We also propose an exponential bandwidth annealing schedule $σ(t)=σ_0 e^{-rt}$ that reduces convergence time from $\exp(O(K_{\max}^2))$ to $O(\log K_{\max})$. Finally, by formalizing drifting as a Wasserstein gradient flow of the smoothed KL divergence, we prove that the stop-gradient operator is derived directly from the frozen-field discretization mandated by the JKO scheme, and removing it severs training from any gradient-flow guarantee. This variational perspective further provides a general template for constructing novel drift operators, demonstrated with a Sinkhorn divergence drift.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了基于漂移的生成建模中高斯核下漂移算子等价于平滑分布上的得分差，从而解答了原工作中未解的三个关键问题：分布相等性、核函数选择及停止梯度操作的必要性。研究将漂移方法置于得分匹配框架内，并通过线性化麦凯恩-弗拉索夫动力学与傅里叶空间分析，发现其收敛时间尺度具有类似等离子体物理中朗道阻尼的频率依赖特性，解释了为何拉普拉斯核优于高斯核。提出指数带宽退火策略 $\sigma(t)=\sigma_0 e^{-rt}$，将收敛时间从 $\exp(O(K_{\max}^2))$ 降至 $O(\log K_{\max})$。此外，通过将漂移形式化为平滑KL散度的Wasserstein梯度流，证明停止梯度源于JKO方案中的冻结场离散化，移除该操作将破坏梯度流性质。这一变分视角还提供了一般化构造新漂移算子的模板，如基于Sinkhorn散度的漂移算子。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于漂移的生成模型在单步图像生成中取得了最先进的性能，但其成功主要依赖经验，缺乏理论基础。特别是关于漂移算子是否能保证分布相等、如何选择核函数以及停止梯度操作的作用等问题仍未解决，亟需深入的理论解释以指导方法设计和改进。
AI.method: 通过分析高斯核下的漂移算子与平滑分布得分差之间的精确等价关系，建立理论框架；采用线性化麦凯恩-弗拉索夫动力学并结合傅里叶空间分析，揭示频率相关的收敛特性；引入指数带宽退火策略优化训练效率；基于变分原理，将漂移视为平滑KL散度的Wasserstein梯度流，利用JKO方案推导出停止梯度操作的数学来源。
AI.result: 1. 理论证明了在特定条件下，漂移为零可推出分布相等；2. 解释了拉普拉斯核优于高斯核的原因在于避免高频瓶颈；3. 提出的指数带宽退火策略显著加速收敛；4. 严格证明停止梯度操作是保持梯度流性质所必需的；5. 构造出基于Sinkhorn散度的新漂移算子，验证了方法的通用性。
AI.conclusion: 本工作系统地建立了基于漂移的生成建模的理论基础，将其置于得分匹配与变分梯度流的统一框架中，不仅解释了现有方法的成功机制，还提供了可扩展的理论工具与优化策略，为未来生成模型的设计提供了坚实的理论支撑。

title: SurgFed: Language-guided Multi-Task Federated Learning for Surgical Video Understanding
summary: Surgical scene Multi-Task Federated Learning (MTFL) is essential for robot-assisted minimally invasive surgery (RAS) but remains underexplored in surgical video understanding due to two key challenges: (1) Tissue Diversity: Local models struggle to adapt to site-specific tissue features, limiting their effectiveness in heterogeneous clinical environments and leading to poor local predictions. (2) Task Diversity: Server-side aggregation, relying solely on gradient-based clustering, often produces suboptimal or incorrect parameter updates due to inter-site task heterogeneity, resulting in inaccurate localization. In light of these two issues, we propose SurgFed, a multi-task federated learning framework, enabling federated learning for surgical scene segmentation and depth estimation across diverse surgical types. SurgFed is powered by two appealing designs, i.e., Language-guided Channel Selection (LCS) and Language-guided Hyper Aggregation (LHA), to address the challenge of fully exploration on corss-site and cross-task. Technically, the LCS is first designed a lightweight personalized channel selection network that enhances site-specific adaptation using pre-defined text inputs, which optimally the local model learn the specific embeddings. We further introduce the LHA that employs a layer-wise cross-attention mechanism with pre-defined text inputs to model task interactions across sites and guide a hypernetwork for personalized parameter updates. Extensive empirical evidence shows that SurgFed yields improvements over the state-of-the-art methods in five public datasets across four surgical types. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SurgFed-070E/.

AI.tldr: SurgFed 是一种用于手术场景分割和深度估计的多任务联邦学习框架，针对组织多样性与任务多样性挑战，提出语言引导的通道选择（LCS）和语言引导的超聚合（LHA）机制，显著提升跨站点、跨任务的模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习在手术视频理解中受限于组织多样性和任务异构性，导致本地模型适应差、服务器端聚合效果不佳，影响手术场景理解精度。
AI.method: 提出 SurgFed 框架，结合语言引导的通道选择（LCS）以增强局部模型对特定组织特征的适应能力，并引入语言引导的超聚合（LHA）通过层间交叉注意力建模跨站点任务交互，实现个性化参数更新。
AI.result: 在五个公开数据集上，SurgFed 在四种不同手术类型中均优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SurgFed 有效解决了多任务联邦学习在复杂手术环境中的适配难题，为机器人辅助微创手术中的智能视觉理解提供了可扩展、鲁棒的解决方案。

title: SignalMC-MED: A Multimodal Benchmark for Evaluating Biosignal Foundation Models on Single-Lead ECG and PPG
summary: Recent biosignal foundation models (FMs) have demonstrated promising performance across diverse clinical prediction tasks, yet systematic evaluation on long-duration multimodal data remains limited. We introduce SignalMC-MED, a benchmark for evaluating biosignal FMs on synchronized single-lead electrocardiogram (ECG) and photoplethysmogram (PPG) data. Derived from the MC-MED dataset, SignalMC-MED comprises 22,256 visits with 10-minute overlapping ECG and PPG signals, and includes 20 clinically relevant tasks spanning prediction of demographics, emergency department disposition, laboratory value regression, and detection of prior ICD-10 diagnoses. Using this benchmark, we perform a systematic evaluation of representative time-series and biosignal FMs across ECG-only, PPG-only, and ECG + PPG settings. We find that domain-specific biosignal FMs consistently outperform general time-series models, and that multimodal ECG + PPG fusion yields robust improvements over unimodal inputs.
