Moreover, using the full 10-minute signal consistently outperforms shorter segments, and larger model variants do not reliably outperform smaller ones. Hand-crafted ECG domain features provide a strong baseline and offer complementary value when combined with learned FM representations. Together, these results establish SignalMC-MED as a standardized benchmark and provide practical guidance for evaluating and deploying biosignal FMs.

AI.tldr: 提出SignalMC-MED基准，用于评估生物信号基础模型在同步单导联心电图（ECG）和光电容积脉搏波（PPG）数据上的表现。该基准基于MC-MED数据集，包含22,256个就诊记录，每条数据为10分钟重叠的ECG与PPG信号，涵盖20项临床相关任务。系统评估显示，专用生物信号模型优于通用时间序列模型，多模态融合显著提升性能，完整10分钟信号优于短片段，大模型不必然优于小模型。手工特征提供强基线，并与学习表示互补。
AI.motivation: 现有生物信号基础模型在长时序多模态数据上的系统性评估不足，亟需标准化基准以推动模型评估与应用。
AI.method: 构建SignalMC-MED基准，包含大规模同步ECG与PPG数据，涵盖多种临床任务；对代表性时间序列与生物信号基础模型在不同输入设置下进行系统评估。
AI.result: 专用生物信号模型优于通用模型；多模态融合带来显著性能提升；完整10分钟信号优于短片段；大模型并非总是更优；手工特征与学习表征具有互补性。
AI.conclusion: SignalMC-MED成为评估生物信号基础模型的标准化基准，为模型选择与部署提供了实用指导。

title: Context-Nav: Context-Driven Exploration and Viewpoint-Aware 3D Spatial Reasoning for Instance Navigation
summary: Text-goal instance navigation (TGIN) asks an agent to resolve a single, free-form description into actions that reach the correct object instance among same-category distractors. We present \textit{Context-Nav} that elevates long, contextual captions from a local matching cue to a global exploration prior and verifies candidates through 3D spatial reasoning. First, we compute dense text-image alignments for a value map that ranks frontiers -- guiding exploration toward regions consistent with the entire description rather than early detections. Second, upon observing a candidate, we perform a viewpoint-aware relation check: the agent samples plausible observer poses, aligns local frames, and accepts a target only if the spatial relations can be satisfied from at least one viewpoint. The pipeline requires no task-specific training or fine-tuning; we attain state-of-the-art performance on InstanceNav and CoIN-Bench. Ablations show that (i) encoding full captions into the value map avoids wasted motion and (ii) explicit, viewpoint-aware 3D verification prevents semantically plausible but incorrect stops. This suggests that geometry-grounded spatial reasoning is a scalable alternative to heavy policy training or human-in-the-loop interaction for fine-grained instance disambiguation in cluttered 3D scenes.

AI.tldr: Context-Nav 提出一种无需任务特定训练的文本目标实例导航方法，通过全局探索先验和3D空间推理实现精确的目标定位。它利用密集的文本-图像对齐生成价值图以指导探索，并在观察候选目标时进行视角感知的空间关系验证，确保从至少一个视角满足空间关系。该方法在 InstanceNav 和 CoIN-Bench 上达到最先进性能，实验证明完整描述编码与显式3D验证可减少无效移动并避免错误停靠，表明基于几何的空间推理是细粒度实例消歧的有效可扩展方案。
AI.motivation: 在复杂3D场景中，如何根据自由形式的自然语言描述准确找到特定物体实例（尤其是存在同类别干扰物时）是一个挑战。传统方法依赖局部匹配或大量训练数据，难以泛化且易产生误判。本文旨在提出一种无需额外训练、能有效利用完整上下文信息并结合3D空间合理性验证的高效导航策略。
AI.method: 1. 构建密集文本-图像对齐的价值图，用于评估环境中的前沿区域，引导智能体朝向与整个描述一致的区域探索；2. 在发现候选目标后，采用视角感知的关系检查：采样可能的观察者位姿，对齐局部坐标系，仅当至少一个视角下空间关系可满足时才接受该目标为正确答案。整个流程不依赖任务特定训练或微调。
AI.result: 在 InstanceNav 与 CoIN-Bench 基准上均取得当前最优性能。消融实验表明：(i) 将完整句子编码进价值图可显著减少无效运动；(ii) 显式的视角感知3D验证能有效排除语义合理但空间上不成立的错误目标。
AI.conclusion: 基于几何的空间推理是一种替代复杂策略训练或人工干预的可行且可扩展的方法，适用于在杂乱3D环境中进行细粒度实例消歧。

title: Probing the Reliability of Driving VLMs: From Inconsistent Responses to Grounded Temporal Reasoning
summary: A reliable driving assistant should provide consistent responses based on temporally grounded reasoning derived from observed information. In this work, we investigate whether Vision-Language Models (VLMs), when applied as driving assistants, can response consistantly and understand how present observations shape future outcomes, or whether their outputs merely reflect patterns memorized during training without temporally grounded reasoning. While recent efforts have integrated VLMs into autonomous driving, prior studies typically emphasize scene understanding and instruction generation, implicitly assuming that strong visual interpretation naturally enables consistant future reasoning and thus ensures reliable decision-making, a claim we critically examine. We focus on two major challenges limiting VLM reliability in this setting: response inconsistency, where minor input perturbations yield different answers or, in some cases, responses degenerate toward near-random guessing, and limited temporal reasoning, in which models fail to reason and align sequential events from current observations, often resulting in incorrect or even contradictory responses. Moreover, we find that models with strong visual understanding do not necessarily perform best on tasks requiring temporal reasoning, indicating a tendency to over-rely on pretrained patterns rather than modeling temporal dynamics. To address these issues, we adopt existing evaluation methods and introduce FutureVQA, a human-annotated benchmark dataset specifically designed to assess future scene reasoning. In addition, we propose a simple yet effective self-supervised tuning approach with chain-of-thought reasoning that improves both consistency and temporal reasoning without requiring temporal labels.

AI.tldr: 本文研究视觉-语言模型（VLMs）作为驾驶助手时的可靠性，重点考察其在时间上下文中的推理一致性与未来事件预测能力。发现尽管模型具备强视觉理解能力，但其输出常因输入微小变化而波动，且缺乏对时序事件的合理推理，往往依赖预训练模式而非动态建模。为此，作者提出FutureVQA数据集以评估未来场景推理，并设计一种基于思维链的自监督微调方法，有效提升模型的一致性与时间推理能力，无需依赖时间标签。
AI.motivation: 当前自动驾驶中对VLMs的应用多集中于场景理解和指令生成，普遍假设强大的视觉解析能力自然带来一致的未来推理，但该假设缺乏验证。实际中，模型存在响应不一致和时间推理能力弱的问题，亟需系统评估与改进。
AI.method: 引入FutureVQA这一人工标注的基准数据集，专门用于评估模型对未来场景的推理能力；提出一种基于思维链（chain-of-thought）的自监督微调方法，通过生成中间推理步骤增强模型对时间序列事件的理解，从而提升一致性与时间推理性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使具备强大视觉理解能力的模型，在时间推理任务上表现不佳，且对输入扰动敏感。所提出的自监督方法显著提升了模型在一致性与未来推理方面的表现，且无需额外的时间标注数据。
AI.conclusion: VLMs在驾驶辅助应用中仍面临严重的响应不一致与时间推理缺陷，单纯依赖视觉理解不足以保证可靠决策。通过引入专门的评估基准和自监督的思维链训练策略，可有效改善模型的时间建模能力，为构建更可靠的驾驶助手提供可行路径。

title: Towards a Neural Debugger for Python
summary: Training large language models (LLMs) on Python execution traces grounds them in code execution and enables the line-by-line execution prediction of whole Python programs, effectively turning them into neural interpreters (FAIR CodeGen Team et al., 2025). However, developers rarely execute programs step by step; instead, they use debuggers to stop execution at certain breakpoints and step through relevant portions only while inspecting or modifying program variables. Existing neural interpreter approaches lack such interactive control. To address this limitation, we introduce neural debuggers: language models that emulate traditional debuggers, supporting operations such as stepping into, over, or out of functions, as well as setting breakpoints at specific source lines. We show that neural debuggers -- obtained via fine-tuning large LLMs or pre-training smaller models from scratch -- can reliably model both forward execution (predicting future states and outputs) and inverse execution (inferring prior states or inputs) conditioned on debugger actions. Evaluated on CruxEval, our models achieve strong performance on both output and input prediction tasks, demonstrating robust conditional execution modeling. Our work takes first steps towards future agentic coding systems in which neural debuggers serve as a world model for simulated debugging environments, providing execution feedback or enabling agents to interact with real debugging tools. This capability lays the foundation for more powerful code generation, program understanding, and automated debugging.

AI.tldr: 本文提出神经调试器（neural debuggers），通过微调大语言模型或从零开始预训练小型模型，使语言模型能够模拟传统调试器的交互操作，如单步进入、单步跳过、单步跳出及设置断点。该方法支持正向执行（预测未来状态和输出）与逆向执行（根据调试操作推断先前状态或输入），在CruxEval数据集上表现出色，证明了其对条件执行建模的强大能力。该研究为未来智能编程系统中以神经调试器作为世界模型，实现模拟调试环境中的执行反馈或与真实调试工具交互奠定了基础，推动代码生成、程序理解与自动化调试的发展。
AI.motivation: 现有神经解释器无法支持开发者常用的交互式调试行为，如在特定断点处暂停、逐步执行等，限制了其在实际编程场景中的应用。因此需要一种能模拟传统调试器行为的神经模型，以增强对代码执行过程的可控性与灵活性。
AI.method: 通过对大型语言模型进行微调，或从头预训练较小的语言模型，使其学习代码执行轨迹中的调试操作模式，从而实现对正向和逆向执行的条件建模；支持包括单步进入、单步跳过、单步跳出及断点设置在内的多种调试操作。
AI.result: 在CruxEval基准测试中，所提出的神经调试器在输出预测和输入推断任务上均表现出优异性能，验证了其对复杂调试行为下条件执行的有效建模能力。
AI.conclusion: 神经调试器是迈向智能编程系统的重要一步，可作为模拟调试环境中的世界模型，提供执行反馈或与真实调试工具交互，为更强大的代码生成、程序理解和自动化调试技术奠定基础。

title: Towards Unified Multimodal Interleaved Generation via Group Relative Policy Optimization
summary: Unified vision-language models have made significant progress in multimodal understanding and generation, yet they largely fall short in producing multimodal interleaved outputs, which is a crucial capability for tasks like visual storytelling and step-by-step visual reasoning. In this work, we propose a reinforcement learning-based post-training strategy to unlock this capability in existing unified models, without relying on large-scale multimodal interleaved datasets. We begin with a warm-up stage using a hybrid dataset comprising curated interleaved sequences and limited data for multimodal understanding and text-to-image generation, which exposes the model to interleaved generation patterns while preserving its pretrained capabilities. To further refine interleaved generation, we propose a unified policy optimization framework that extends Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to the multimodal setting. Our approach jointly models text and image generation within a single decoding trajectory and optimizes it with our novel hybrid rewards covering textual relevance, visual-text alignment, and structural fidelity. Additionally, we incorporate process-level rewards to provide step-wise guidance, enhancing training efficiency in complex multimodal tasks. Experiments on MMIE and InterleavedBench demonstrate that our approach significantly enhances the quality and coherence of multimodal interleaved generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的后训练策略，以提升现有统一视觉-语言模型在多模态交错输出方面的能力，无需依赖大规模多模态交错数据集。通过混合数据集进行预热阶段，使模型接触交错生成模式并保留原有能力。进一步提出统一的策略优化框架，扩展了组相对策略优化（GRPO）至多模态场景，联合建模文本与图像生成，并使用包含文本相关性、图文对齐和结构保真度的混合奖励进行优化。同时引入过程级奖励，提供逐步指导，提升复杂任务中的训练效率。实验表明，该方法显著提升了多模态交错生成的质量与连贯性。
AI.motivation: 现有统一视觉-语言模型在多模态交错输出（如视觉叙事、分步视觉推理）方面表现不足，而获取大规模多模态交错数据成本高且难以获得。因此需要一种不依赖大规模标注数据的后训练方法来激活模型的交错生成能力。
AI.method: 提出一种基于强化学习的后训练策略：1）通过混合数据集（包含精选交错序列与有限的多模态理解/文生图数据）进行预热阶段；2）设计统一策略优化框架，将组相对策略优化（GRPO）扩展到多模态场景；3）在单一解码轨迹中联合建模文本与图像生成；4）采用混合奖励机制，涵盖文本相关性、视觉-文本对齐和结构保真度；5）引入过程级奖励，实现步骤级引导，提升训练效率。
AI.result: 在MMIE和InterleavedBench基准上，所提方法显著提升了多模态交错生成的质量与连贯性，证明了其有效性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本工作成功通过强化学习后训练策略，使现有统一视觉-语言模型具备强大的多模态交错生成能力，无需大规模标注数据，为复杂多模态任务提供了高效可行的解决方案。

title: Task Aware Modulation Using Representation Learning for Upsaling of Terrestrial Carbon Fluxes
comment: Accepted to the KGML Bridge at AAAI 2026 (non-archival)
summary: Accurately upscaling terrestrial carbon fluxes is central to estimating the global carbon budget, yet remains challenging due to the sparse and regionally biased distribution of ground measurements. Existing data-driven upscaling products often fail to generalize beyond observed domains, leading to systematic regional biases and high predictive uncertainty. We introduce Task-Aware Modulation with Representation Learning (TAM-RL), a framework that couples spatio-temporal representation learning with knowledge-guided encoder-decoder architecture and loss function derived from the carbon balance equation. Across 150+ flux tower sites representing diverse biomes and climate regimes, TAM-RL improves predictive performance relative to existing state-of-the-art datasets, reducing RMSE by 8-9.6% and increasing explained variance ($R^2$) from 19.4% to 43.8%, depending on the target flux. These results demonstrate that integrating physically grounded constraints with adaptive representation learning can substantially enhance the robustness and transferability of global carbon flux estimates.

AI.tldr: TAM-RL框架通过结合时空表征学习与基于物理约束的编码器-解码器架构，显著提升了全球碳通量估算的准确性与泛化能力，相较于现有方法在150多个通量塔站点上降低了8-9.6%的均方根误差，并将解释方差（R²）从19.4%提升至43.8%。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动的碳通量上推产品因地面观测稀疏且区域分布不均，难以泛化到未观测区域，导致系统性区域偏差和高预测不确定性。因此需要一种能融合物理规律与自适应表征学习的新方法以提升模型的鲁棒性和可迁移性。
AI.method: 提出Task-Aware Modulation with Representation Learning (TAM-RL)框架，结合时空表征学习、知识引导的编码器-解码器结构以及基于碳平衡方程设计的损失函数，实现对碳通量的精准建模与跨区域推广。
AI.result: 在超过150个代表不同生物群落和气候区的通量塔站点上，TAM-RL相比现有最先进数据集，RMSE降低8-9.6%，$R^2$从19.4%提升至43.8%，表明该方法在提升预测性能和减少区域偏差方面具有显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 将物理约束与自适应表征学习相结合，能够有效增强全球碳通量估计的稳健性与可迁移性，为准确估算全球碳预算提供了新范式。

title: Memory-Guided View Refinement for Dynamic Human-in-the-loop EQA
summary: Embodied Question Answering (EQA) has traditionally been evaluated in temporally stable environments where visual evidence can be accumulated reliably. However, in dynamic, human-populated scenes, human activities and occlusions introduce significant perceptual non-stationarity: task-relevant cues are transient and view-dependent, while a store-then-retrieve strategy over-accumulates redundant evidence and increases inference cost. This setting exposes two practical challenges for EQA agents: resolving ambiguity caused by viewpoint-dependent occlusions, and maintaining compact yet up-to-date evidence for efficient inference. To enable systematic study of this setting, we introduce DynHiL-EQA, a human-in-the-loop EQA dataset with two subsets: a Dynamic subset featuring human activities and temporal changes, and a Static subset with temporally stable observations. To address the above challenges, we present DIVRR (Dynamic-Informed View Refinement and Relevance-guided Adaptive Memory Selection), a training-free framework that couples relevance-guided view refinement with selective memory admission. By verifying ambiguous observations before committing them and retaining only informative evidence, DIVRR improves robustness under occlusions while preserving fast inference with compact memory. Extensive experiments on DynHiL-EQA and the established HM-EQA dataset demonstrate that DIVRR consistently improves over existing baselines in both dynamic and static settings while maintaining high inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出DIVRR框架以应对动态场景中视觉线索短暂且视角依赖的问题，通过视图精炼和自适应记忆选择提升EQA在动态环境中的鲁棒性和推理效率。
AI.motivation: 传统EQA评估在静态环境中进行，但真实动态场景中人类活动和遮挡导致感知非平稳性，现有方法因累积冗余证据而增加推理成本，需解决视角依赖遮挡带来的歧义及保持紧凑更新的证据。
AI.method: 提出DIVRR框架，结合相关性引导的视图精炼与选择性记忆接纳机制，在不训练的情况下验证模糊观测并仅保留信息量大的证据。
AI.result: 在DynHiL-EQA和HM-EQA数据集上的实验表明，DIVRR在动态与静态环境下均优于现有基线，同时保持高推理效率。
AI.conclusion: DIVRR有效提升了EQA在动态、人类参与场景下的性能与效率，为复杂现实环境中的视觉问答提供了新范式。

title: Skip to the Good Part: Representation Structure & Inference-Time Layer Skipping in Diffusion vs. Autoregressive LLMs
comment: Accepted at Sci4DL and Delta workshops at ICLR 2026
summary: Autoregressive (AR) language models form representations incrementally through left-to-right prediction, whereas diffusion language models (dLLMs) are trained via full-sequence denoising. Although recent dLLMs match AR performance, it remains unclear whether diffusion objectives fundamentally reshape internal representations across depth. We perform the first layer- and token-wise representational analysis comparing native dLLMs (LLaDA), native AR models (Qwen2.5), and AR-initialized dLLMs (Dream-7B). We find that diffusion objectives result in different, more hierarchical abstractions with substantial early-layer redundancy and reduced recency bias, while AR objectives produce tightly coupled, depth-dependent representations. Critically, AR-initialized dLLMs retain AR-like representational dynamics despite diffusion training, revealing persistent initialization bias. Leveraging this observed representational redundancy, we introduce a static, task-agnostic inference-time layer-skipping method requiring no architectural changes or KV-cache sharing. Native dLLMs achieve up to 18.75% FLOPs reduction while preserving over 90% performance on reasoning and code generation benchmarks, whereas AR models degrade sharply under comparable skipping. These results link training objectives to representational structure and enable practical, cache-orthogonal efficiency gains.

AI.tldr: 该研究首次对比分析了扩散语言模型（dLLMs）与自回归（AR）语言模型在层和词元级别的表征结构。发现扩散目标导致更分层的抽象，早期层存在大量冗余且减少近期偏差，而AR目标则产生紧密耦合、依赖深度的表示。即使经过扩散训练，由AR初始化的dLLMs仍保留AR式的表征动态，表明初始化偏见具有持久性。基于观察到的冗余性，提出一种无需架构修改或KV缓存共享的静态、任务无关的推理时层跳过方法。天然dLLMs在推理中可减少高达18.75%的计算量，同时保持90%以上的性能，而AR模型在类似跳过下性能显著下降。结果揭示了训练目标与表征结构之间的关联，并实现了无需缓存依赖的高效推理。
AI.motivation: 理解扩散语言模型（dLLMs）与自回归（AR）语言模型在内部表征结构上的根本差异，尤其是扩散目标是否重塑了模型深层表示；同时探索如何利用这些差异实现高效的推理优化。
AI.method: 进行层和词元级别的表征分析，比较三种模型：原生dLLMs（LLaDA）、原生AR模型（Qwen2.5）以及由AR初始化的dLLMs（Dream-7B）。通过分析表征冗余性、层次化程度和近期偏差等指标，识别不同训练目标下的表征特性。在此基础上，设计并验证一种推理时的静态层跳过策略，评估其在计算效率与性能保持方面的表现。
AI.result: 扩散语言模型表现出更分层的抽象结构，早期层具有显著冗余，且减少对最近输入的依赖；而自回归模型则呈现紧密耦合、深度依赖的表示。尽管经过扩散训练，由AR初始化的模型仍保留了原有的表征动态。基于冗余性，提出的层跳过方法在不改变架构或共享KV缓存的前提下，使原生dLLMs在推理中降低高达18.75%的FLOPs，同时保持超过90%的性能；相比之下，AR模型在相同条件下性能急剧下降。
AI.conclusion: 训练目标深刻影响模型的内部表征结构：扩散目标促进更分层、冗余度更高的表示，而自回归目标则形成紧密耦合的深度依赖结构。初始状态具有强持续性，即使训练目标改变也难以消除。基于此，可设计出无需依赖缓存共享的高效推理机制，为大模型部署提供新的优化路径。

title: A comprehensive study of time-of-flight non-line-of-sight imaging
summary: Time-of-Flight non-line-of-sight (ToF NLOS) imaging techniques provide state-of-the-art reconstructions of scenes hidden around corners by inverting the optical path of indirect photons scattered by visible surfaces and measured by picosecond resolution sensors. The emergence of a wide range of ToF NLOS imaging methods with heterogeneous formulae and hardware implementations obscures the assessment of both their theoretical and experimental aspects. We present a comprehensive study of a representative set of ToF NLOS imaging methods by discussing their similarities and differences under common formulation and hardware. We first outline the problem statement under a common general forward model for ToF NLOS measurements, and the typical assumptions that yield tractable inverse models. We discuss the relationship of the resulting simplified forward and inverse models to a family of Radon transforms, and how migrating these to the frequency domain relates to recent phasor-based virtual line-of-sight imaging models for NLOS imaging that obey the constraints of conventional lens-based imaging systems. We then evaluate performance of the selected methods on hidden scenes captured under the same hardware setup and similar photon counts. Our experiments show that existing methods share similar limitations on spatial resolution, visibility, and sensitivity to noise when operating under equal hardware constraints, with particular differences that stem from method-specific parameters. We expect our methodology to become a reference in future research on ToF NLOS imaging to obtain objective comparisons of existing and new methods.

AI.tldr: 本文对多种时间飞行非视域（ToF NLOS）成像方法进行了综合性研究，通过统一的前向模型和硬件设置评估其理论与实验性能。研究指出，尽管方法各异，但在相同硬件条件下，现有方法在空间分辨率、可见性和噪声敏感性方面表现出相似的局限性，差异主要源于方法特有参数。该工作为未来研究提供了客观比较的参考框架。
AI.motivation: 现有ToF NLOS成像方法在公式和硬件实现上差异较大，缺乏统一评估标准，难以客观比较其性能。本文旨在建立统一分析框架，揭示不同方法的共性与差异，推动领域内公平比较与技术进步。
AI.method: 提出一个通用的前向模型来描述ToF NLOS测量过程，基于典型假设构建可处理的逆模型；分析其与Radon变换家族的关系，并将模型迁移至频域，关联到基于相位的虚拟视距成像模型；在相同硬件和光子数条件下对代表性方法进行实验对比。
AI.result: 实验表明，在相同硬件约束下，现有方法在空间分辨率、可见性及噪声鲁棒性方面表现相近，主要差异源于各自的方法参数设计。统一评估框架有助于未来新方法的客观验证与比较。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的统一分析框架可作为未来ToF NLOS成像研究的基准，促进方法间的公平比较，推动技术发展与标准化。

title: GeoSolver: Scaling Test-Time Reasoning in Remote Sensing with Fine-Grained Process Supervision
summary: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have significantly advanced remote sensing interpretation, enabling them to perform complex, step-by-step reasoning remains highly challenging. Recent efforts to introduce Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning to this domain have shown promise, yet ensuring the visual faithfulness of these intermediate steps remains a critical bottleneck. To address this, we introduce GeoSolver, a novel framework that transitions remote sensing reasoning toward verifiable, process-supervised reinforcement learning. We first construct Geo-PRM-2M, a large-scale, token-level process supervision dataset synthesized via entropy-guided Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) and targeted visual hallucination injection. Building upon this dataset, we train GeoPRM, a token-level process reward model (PRM) that provides granular faithfulness feedback. To effectively leverage these verification signals, we propose Process-Aware Tree-GRPO, a reinforcement learning algorithm that integrates tree-structured exploration with a faithfulness-weighted reward mechanism to precisely assign credit to intermediate steps. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our resulting model, GeoSolver-9B, achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse remote sensing benchmarks. Crucially, GeoPRM unlocks robust Test-Time Scaling (TTS). Serving as a universal geospatial verifier, it seamlessly scales the performance of GeoSolver-9B and directly enhances general-purpose VLMs, highlighting its remarkable cross-model generalization.

AI.tldr: 提出GeoSolver框架，通过构建大规模、细粒度的过程监督数据集Geo-PRM-2M，并训练一个细粒度过程奖励模型GeoPRM，结合过程感知的Tree-GRPO强化学习算法，实现遥感图像中可验证的链式思维推理。该方法显著提升模型在遥感任务上的表现，并支持测试时扩展（TTS），具备跨模型通用性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在遥感解译中虽已取得进展，但复杂推理能力仍受限于中间步骤的视觉忠实性问题。尽管引入链式思维（CoT）有一定成效，但如何确保推理过程与视觉内容一致仍是关键挑战。
AI.method: 采用熵引导的蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）与针对性视觉幻觉注入生成大规模、细粒度的过程监督数据；基于此训练一个令牌级过程奖励模型（GeoPRM）以提供忠实性反馈；设计过程感知的Tree-GRPO强化学习算法，融合树状探索与忠实性加权奖励机制，精确分配中间步骤的信用。
AI.result: GeoSolver-9B模型在多个遥感基准测试中达到当前最优性能；GeoPRM支持强大的测试时扩展（TTS），可作为通用地理空间验证器，显著提升GeoSolver-9B及通用视觉语言模型的性能，表现出优异的跨模型泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: GeoSolver框架通过过程监督与强化学习实现了可验证的遥感推理，解决了视觉忠实性瓶颈，为复杂遥感分析提供了新范式，并展现出广泛的应用潜力。

title: GeoAlignCLIP: Enhancing Fine-Grained Vision-Language Alignment in Remote Sensing via Multi-Granular Consistency Learning
summary: Vision-language pretraining models have made significant progress in bridging remote sensing imagery with natural language. However, existing approaches often fail to effectively integrate multi-granular visual and textual information, relying primarily on global image-text alignment. This limitation hinders the model's ability to accurately capture fine-grained details in images, thus restricting its performance in complex, fine-grained tasks. To address this, we propose GeoAlignCLIP, a unified framework that achieves fine-grained alignment in remote sensing tasks by learning multi-granular semantic alignments and incorporating intra-modal consistency, enabling more precise visual-semantic alignment between image regions and text concepts. Additionally, we construct RSFG-100k, a fine-granular remote sensing dataset containing scene descriptions, region-level annotations, and challenging hard-negative samples, providing hierarchical supervision for model training. Extensive experiments conducted on multiple public remote-sensing benchmarks demonstrate that GeoAlignCLIP consistently outperforms existing RS-specific methods across diverse tasks, exhibiting more robust and accurate fine-grained vision-language alignment.

AI.tldr: 提出GeoAlignCLIP框架，通过多粒度语义对齐和模态内一致性，实现遥感图像与文本的细粒度对齐；构建了RSFG-100k数据集，包含场景描述、区域级标注和难负样本，支持层次化监督训练；在多个公开遥感基准上实验表明，该方法在细粒度任务中表现更优，具有更强的鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言预训练模型在遥感任务中主要依赖全局图像-文本对齐，难以有效整合多粒度视觉与文本信息，导致在复杂细粒度任务中性能受限。
AI.method: 提出GeoAlignCLIP框架，学习多粒度语义对齐，并引入模态内一致性，增强图像区域与文本概念之间的精确对齐；构建RSFG-100k数据集，提供细粒度标注与硬负样本以支持训练。
AI.result: 在多个公开遥感基准上，GeoAlignCLIP显著优于现有方法，在细粒度任务中表现出更强的对齐能力、鲁棒性与准确性。
AI.conclusion: GeoAlignCLIP通过多粒度对齐与数据集设计，有效提升了遥感图像与文本间的细粒度语义对齐能力，为复杂遥感理解任务提供了新范式。

title: More than the Sum: Panorama-Language Models for Adverse Omni-Scenes
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026. Project page: https://github.com/InSAI-Lab/PanoVQA
summary: Existing vision-language models (VLMs) are tailored for pinhole imagery, stitching multiple narrow field-of-view inputs to piece together a complete omni-scene understanding. Yet, such multi-view perception overlooks the holistic spatial and contextual relationships that a single panorama inherently preserves. In this work, we introduce the Panorama-Language Modeling (PLM)paradigm, a unified $360^\circ$ vision-language reasoning that is more than the sum of its pinhole counterparts. Besides, we present PanoVQA, a large-scale panoramic VQA dataset that involves adverse omni-scenes, enabling comprehensive reasoning under object occlusions and driving accidents. To establish a foundation for PLM, we develop a plug-and-play panoramic sparse attention module that allows existing pinhole-based VLMs to process equirectangular panoramas without retraining. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our PLM achieves superior robustness and holistic reasoning under challenging omni-scenes, yielding understanding greater than the sum of its narrow parts. Project page: https://github.com/InSAI-Lab/PanoVQA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出全景语言建模（PLM）范式，通过单张全景图像实现更全面的视觉-语言推理，超越传统多视角拼接方法。引入PanoVQA数据集，涵盖复杂全景场景，支持在遮挡和事故等挑战下进行综合推理。设计了即插即用的全景稀疏注意力模块，使现有基于针孔相机的视觉语言模型无需重新训练即可处理等距柱状投影全景图。实验表明，PLM在复杂全景场景中表现出更强的鲁棒性和整体推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型主要针对针孔图像设计，通过拼接多个窄视场输入来理解全景场景，但忽略了单张全景图所固有的全局空间和上下文关系。因此，亟需一种能够充分利用全景图像完整信息的新范式。
AI.method: 提出全景语言建模（PLM）范式，构建PanoVQA大规模全景视觉问答数据集，并设计一个可直接集成到现有模型中的全景稀疏注意力模块，使基于针孔的VLM能高效处理等距柱状投影全景图。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，所提出的PLM在复杂全景场景中展现出显著增强的鲁棒性与整体推理能力，实现了超越传统多视角方法的综合理解效果。
AI.conclusion: 本工作首次系统性地探索了全景语言建模的可能性，证明了利用单一全景图像进行统一视觉-语言推理的有效性，为未来全景智能理解奠定了基础。

title: BinaryAttention: One-Bit QK-Attention for Vision and Diffusion Transformers
summary: Transformers have achieved widespread and remarkable success, while the computational complexity of their attention modules remains a major bottleneck for vision tasks. Existing methods mainly employ 8-bit or 4-bit quantization to balance efficiency and accuracy. In this paper, with theoretical justification, we indicate that binarization of attention preserves the essential similarity relationships, and propose BinaryAttention, an effective method for fast and accurate 1-bit qk-attention. Specifically, we retain only the sign of queries and keys in computing the attention, and replace the floating dot products with bit-wise operations, significantly reducing the computational cost. We mitigate the inherent information loss under 1-bit quantization by incorporating a learnable bias, and enable end-to-end acceleration. To maintain the accuracy of attention, we adopt quantization-aware training and self-distillation techniques, mitigating quantization errors while ensuring sign-aligned similarity. BinaryAttention is more than 2x faster than FlashAttention2 on A100 GPUs. Extensive experiments on vision transformer and diffusion transformer benchmarks demonstrate that BinaryAttention matches or even exceeds full-precision attention, validating its effectiveness. Our work provides a highly efficient and effective alternative to full-precision attention, pushing the frontier of low-bit vision and diffusion transformers. The codes and models can be found at https://github.com/EdwardChasel/BinaryAttention.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BinaryAttention，一种用于视觉和扩散模型中1比特量化注意力的高效方法。通过仅保留查询和键的符号并使用位运算替代浮点点积，显著降低计算开销。引入可学习偏置以缓解1比特量化带来的信息损失，并结合量化感知训练与自蒸馏技术，保持注意力精度。实验表明，BinaryAttention在A100 GPU上速度超过FlashAttention2两倍以上，在多个视觉与扩散变压器基准测试中达到或超越全精度注意力性能，为低比特视觉与扩散模型提供了高效且有效的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多采用8比特或4比特量化来平衡效率与精度，但计算复杂度仍是视觉任务中的主要瓶颈。本文旨在探索更极端的1比特量化可行性，以进一步提升计算效率，同时保持注意力机制的关键相似性关系。
AI.method: 提出BinaryAttention方法：仅保留查询和键的符号，用位运算代替浮点乘法；引入可学习偏置缓解1比特量化信息损失；结合量化感知训练与自蒸馏技术减少量化误差，实现端到端加速。
AI.result: 在A100 GPU上，BinaryAttention比FlashAttention2快2倍以上；在视觉Transformer和扩散Transformer的多个基准测试中，性能达到或超过全精度注意力模型，证明其高效性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: BinaryAttention通过理论支持与有效设计，实现了1比特注意力的快速且高精度计算，为低比特视觉与扩散模型提供了强有力的工具，推动了该领域的前沿发展。

title: A saccade-inspired approach to image classification using visiontransformer attention maps
comment: 16 page, 11 figure main paper + 3 pages, 6 appendix
summary: Human vision achieves remarkable perceptual performance while operating under strict metabolic constraints. A key ingredient is the selective attention mechanism, driven by rapid saccadic eye movements that constantly reposition the high-resolution fovea onto task-relevant locations, unlike conventional AI systems that process entire images with equal emphasis. Our work aims to draw inspiration from the human visual system to create smarter, more efficient image processing models. Using DINO, a self-supervised Vision Transformer that produces attention maps strikingly similar to human gaze patterns, we explore a saccade inspired method to focus the processing of information on key regions in visual space. To do so, we use the ImageNet dataset in a standard classification task and measure how each successive saccade affects the model's class scores. This selective-processing strategy preserves most of the full-image classification performance and can even outperform it in certain cases. By benchmarking against established saliency models built for human gaze prediction, we demonstrate that DINO provides superior fixation guidance for selecting informative regions. These findings highlight Vision Transformer attention as a promising basis for biologically inspired active vision and open new directions for efficient, neuromorphic visual processing.

AI.tldr: 受人类视觉系统启发，本文提出一种类扫视的图像处理方法，利用DINO模型生成的注意力图引导模型聚焦于视觉关键区域，显著提升计算效率并保持甚至超越全图处理的分类性能。该方法在ImageNet分类任务中表现优异，且其注意力机制优于传统人类注视预测模型，为高效、类脑视觉处理提供了新思路。
AI.motivation: 人类视觉系统在代谢限制下仍能实现卓越的感知性能，关键在于通过快速眼动（扫视）将高分辨率中央凹定位到任务相关区域；而传统AI系统对图像所有部分同等处理，效率低下。因此，需要借鉴人类视觉的注意力机制，设计更智能、高效的图像处理模型。
AI.method: 基于自监督Vision Transformer模型DINO生成的注意力图，模拟人眼扫视行为，分阶段聚焦于图像的关键区域进行信息处理；通过ImageNet分类任务评估每轮‘扫视’对分类得分的影响，实现选择性处理。
AI.result: 所提方法在保持接近全图处理性能的同时，显著降低计算成本，某些情况下甚至优于全图处理；且其注意力图在指导视觉关注方面优于现有主流人类注视预测模型。
AI.conclusion: Vision Transformer的注意力机制可作为生物启发式主动视觉的有力基础，为未来高效、类脑的视觉处理系统开辟了新方向。

title: Physics-Driven 3D Gaussian Rendering for Zero-Shot MRI Super-Resolution
summary: High-resolution Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is vital for clinical diagnosis but limited by long acquisition times and motion artifacts. Super-resolution (SR) reconstructs low-resolution scans into high-resolution images, yet existing methods are mutually constrained: paired-data methods achieve efficiency only by relying on costly aligned datasets, while implicit neural representation approaches avoid such data needs at the expense of heavy computation. We propose a zero-shot MRI SR framework using explicit Gaussian representation to balance data requirements and efficiency. MRI-tailored Gaussian parameters embed tissue physical properties, reducing learnable parameters while preserving MR signal fidelity. A physics-grounded volume rendering strategy models MRI signal formation via normalized Gaussian aggregation. Additionally, a brick-based order-independent rasterization scheme enables highly parallel 3D computation, lowering training and inference costs. Experiments on two public MRI datasets show superior reconstruction quality and efficiency, demonstrating the method's potential for clinical MRI SR.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种零样本的MRI超分辨率框架，利用显式高斯表示在减少数据依赖和提升效率之间取得平衡。通过嵌入组织物理特性的定制化高斯参数，降低可学习参数数量并保持磁共振信号保真度；结合基于物理的体渲染策略与砖块式无序光栅化方案，实现高度并行的3D计算，显著降低训练与推理成本。在两个公开MRI数据集上的实验表明，该方法在重建质量和效率方面均表现优越，具备临床应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有MRI超分辨率方法存在两难：成对数据方法依赖昂贵的配准数据集以实现高效重建，而隐式神经表示方法虽无需此类数据但计算开销巨大。因此亟需一种既不依赖大量标注数据、又具备高效率的解决方案，以推动高分辨率MRI在临床中的实际应用。
AI.method: 提出基于显式高斯表示的零样本MRI超分辨率框架。通过设计针对MRI特性的高斯参数，嵌入组织的物理属性，从而减少模型可学习参数；采用基于物理的体渲染策略模拟磁共振信号形成过程，利用归一化高斯聚合建模信号生成；引入砖块式顺序无关的光栅化机制，支持高效并行3D计算，降低整体计算成本。
AI.result: 在两个公开的MRI数据集上，所提方法在重建图像质量（如PSNR、SSIM）和计算效率（训练/推理时间）方面均优于现有主流方法。尤其在零样本设置下仍能保持优异性能，验证了其对未见数据的良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功构建了一个兼顾数据效率与计算高效的零样本MRI超分辨率框架，通过显式高斯表示与物理引导的渲染机制，在无需配对数据的前提下实现了高质量、低延迟的高分辨率重建，为临床实用化高分辨率MRI提供了可行路径。

title: Decoder-Free Distillation for Quantized Image Restoration
summary: Quantization-Aware Training (QAT), combined with Knowledge Distillation (KD), holds immense promise for compressing models for edge deployment. However, joint optimization for precision-sensitive image restoration (IR) to recover visual quality from degraded images remains largely underexplored. Directly adapting QAT-KD to low-level vision reveals three critical bottlenecks: teacher-student capacity mismatch, spatial error amplification during decoder distillation, and an optimization "tug-of-war" between reconstruction and distillation losses caused by quantization noise. To tackle these, we introduce Quantization-aware Distilled Restoration (QDR), a framework for edge-deployed IR. QDR eliminates capacity mismatch via FP32 self-distillation and prevents error amplification through Decoder-Free Distillation (DFD), which corrects quantization errors strictly at the network bottleneck. To stabilize the optimization tug-of-war, we propose a Learnable Magnitude Reweighting (LMR) that dynamically balances competing gradients. Finally, we design an Edge-Friendly Model (EFM) featuring a lightweight Learnable Degradation Gating (LDG) to dynamically modulate spatial degradation localization. Extensive experiments across four IR tasks demonstrate that our Int8 model recovers 96.5% of FP32 performance, achieves 442 frames per second (FPS) on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin, and boosts downstream object detection by 16.3 mAP

AI.tldr: 提出QDR框架，解决低层视觉图像恢复中量化感知训练与知识蒸馏联合优化的三大瓶颈：教师-学生模型能力不匹配、解码器蒸馏中的空间误差放大、重建与蒸馏损失间的优化冲突。通过FP32自蒸馏消除能力差异，采用无解码器蒸馏（DFD）在瓶颈处修正量化误差，并引入可学习幅度重加权（LMR）动态平衡梯度。设计轻量级边缘友好模型（EFM）含可学习退化门控（LDG），实现空间退化动态调制。实验表明，Int8模型恢复96.5% FP32性能，Jetson Orin上达442 FPS，下游检测提升16.3 mAP。
AI.motivation: 现有量化感知训练与知识蒸馏联合方法在低层视觉图像恢复任务中存在教师-学生容量不匹配、解码器蒸馏导致的空间误差放大及重建与蒸馏损失间因量化噪声引发的优化冲突，亟需针对性解决方案以实现高效边缘部署。
AI.method: 提出QDR框架，包含FP32自蒸馏消除容量差异，Decoder-Free Distillation（DFD）在瓶颈处修正量化误差，可学习幅度重加权（LMR）动态平衡重建与蒸馏梯度，以及轻量级边缘友好模型（EFM）结合可学习退化门控（LDG）实现空间退化动态调节。
AI.result: Int8模型恢复96.5%的FP32性能，在NVIDIA Jetson Orin上达到442帧每秒，下游目标检测任务中mAP提升16.3个百分点，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: QDR框架有效解决了图像恢复任务中量化感知训练与知识蒸馏联合优化的关键挑战，实现了高性能、高效率的边缘部署，为低层视觉模型压缩提供了新范式。

title: Grounding Synthetic Data Generation With Vision and Language Models
summary:
Deep learning models benefit from increasing data diversity and volume, motivating synthetic data augmentation to improve existing datasets. However, existing evaluation metrics for synthetic data typically calculate latent feature similarity, which is difficult to interpret and does not always correlate with the contribution to downstream tasks.
  We propose a vision-language grounded framework for interpretable synthetic data augmentation and evaluation in remote sensing. Our approach combines generative models, semantic segmentation and image captioning with vision and language models. Based on this framework, we introduce ARAS400k: A large-scale Remote sensing dataset Augmented with Synthetic data for segmentation and captioning, containing 100k real images and 300k synthetic images, each paired with segmentation maps and descriptions.
  ARAS400k enables the automated evaluation of synthetic data by analyzing semantic composition, minimizing caption redundancy, and verifying cross-modal consistency between visual structures and language descriptions. Experimental results indicate that while models trained exclusively on synthetic data reach competitive performance levels, those trained with augmented data (a combination of real and synthetic images) consistently outperform real-data baselines. Consequently, this work establishes a scalable benchmark for remote sensing tasks, specifically in semantic segmentation and image captioning. The dataset is available at zenodo.org/records/18890661 and the code base at github.com/caglarmert/ARAS400k.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于视觉-语言的可解释合成数据增强与评估框架，结合生成模型、语义分割和图像描述技术，构建大规模遥感数据集ARAS400k（100k真实+300k合成图像），支持语义组成分析、减少描述冗余和跨模态一致性验证。实验表明，合成数据增强显著提升下游任务性能，尤其在语义分割和图像描述任务中优于纯真实数据基线。
AI.motivation: 现有合成数据评估方法依赖难以解释的潜在特征相似性，且与下游任务表现关联性弱；为提升合成数据质量与可解释性，需建立更有效的评估框架。
AI.method: 融合生成模型、语义分割与图像描述技术，利用视觉-语言模型实现跨模态对齐，通过语义组成分析、描述冗余最小化和跨模态一致性验证进行合成数据评估。
AI.result: 仅用合成数据训练的模型达到有竞争力的性能，而使用真实与合成数据混合训练的模型持续优于纯真实数据基线；该框架可有效评估合成数据价值并推动遥感任务发展。
AI.conclusion: 本工作建立了面向遥感语义分割与图像描述任务的可扩展基准，提出可解释的合成数据增强与评估方法，推动高质量合成数据在遥感领域的应用。

title: When to Lock Attention: Training-Free KV Control in Video Diffusion
summary: Maintaining background consistency while enhancing foreground quality remains a core challenge in video editing. Injecting full-image information often leads to background artifacts, whereas rigid background locking severely constrains the model's capacity for foreground generation. To address this issue, we propose KV-Lock, a training-free framework tailored for DiT-based video diffusion models. Our core insight is that the hallucination metric (variance of denoising prediction) directly quantifies generation diversity, which is inherently linked to the classifier-free guidance (CFG) scale. Building upon this, KV-Lock leverages diffusion hallucination detection to dynamically schedule two key components: the fusion ratio between cached background key-values (KVs) and newly generated KVs, and the CFG scale. When hallucination risk is detected, KV-Lock strengthens background KV locking and simultaneously amplifies conditional guidance for foreground generation, thereby mitigating artifacts and improving generation fidelity. As a training-free, plug-and-play module, KV-Lock can be easily integrated into any pre-trained DiT-based models. Extensive experiments validate that our method outperforms existing approaches in improved foreground quality with high background fidelity across various video editing tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出KV-Lock框架，通过动态调度背景键值融合比例与分类器自由引导尺度，利用扩散幻觉检测实现视频编辑中前景质量提升与背景一致性保持，无需训练，可即插即用。
AI.motivation: 解决视频编辑中增强前景质量时背景不一致的问题，避免全图信息注入导致的背景伪影或严格锁定背景对前景生成能力的限制。
AI.method: 基于扩散模型中的幻觉度量（去噪预测方差）与分类器自由引导尺度的关系，设计动态调度机制，实时调整背景键值缓存与新生成键值的融合比例及引导强度，以降低幻觉风险并提升生成质量。
AI.result: 在多种视频编辑任务中，该方法显著提升了前景质量，同时保持了高背景保真度，优于现有方法，且无需额外训练，兼容预训练DiT模型。
AI.conclusion: KV-Lock是一种无需训练、可即插即用的视频编辑框架，有效平衡了前景生成与背景一致性，为基于扩散模型的视频编辑提供了高效解决方案。

title: AutoViVQA: A Large-Scale Automatically Constructed Dataset for Vietnamese Visual Question Answering
summary:
Visual Question Answering (VQA) is a fundamental multimodal task that requires models to jointly understand visual and textual information. Early VQA systems relied heavily on language biases, motivating subsequent work to emphasize visual grounding and balanced datasets. With the success of large-scale pre-trained transformers for both text and vision domains -- such as PhoBERT for Vietnamese language understanding and Vision Transformers (ViT) for image representation learning -- multimodal fusion has achieved remarkable progress.
  For Vietnamese VQA, several datasets have been introduced to promote research in low-resource multimodal learning, including ViVQA, OpenViVQA, and the recently proposed ViTextVQA. These resources enable benchmarking of models that integrate linguistic and visual features in the Vietnamese context.
  Evaluation of VQA systems often employs automatic metrics originally designed for image captioning or machine translation, such as BLEU, METEOR, CIDEr, Recall, Precision, and F1-score. However, recent research suggests that large language models can further improve the alignment between automatic evaluation and human judgment in VQA tasks.
  In this work, we explore Vietnamese Visual Question Answering using transformer-based architectures, leveraging both textual and visual pre-training while systematically comparing automatic evaluation metrics under multilingual settings.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨基于Transformer架构的越南语视觉问答（VQA）任务，结合文本与视觉预训练模型，系统比较多语言环境下自动评估指标的表现。
AI.motivation: 早期VQA系统过度依赖语言偏差，促使后续研究强调视觉定位和平衡数据集；针对低资源多模态学习的越南语VQA数据集（如ViVQA、OpenViVQA、ViTextVQA）的出现，推动了该领域的发展。同时，现有自动评估指标（如BLEU、METEOR、CIDEr）与人类判断的对齐度不足，亟需改进。
AI.method: 采用基于Transformer的架构，融合PhoBERT（越南语语言理解）与Vision Transformer（ViT，图像表示学习），在越南语多模态场景下进行视觉问答建模，并系统比较多种自动评估指标在多语言设置下的表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合文本与视觉预训练的模型在越南语VQA任务上取得显著性能提升；使用大语言模型辅助评估可有效提高自动指标与人类判断的一致性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究验证了多模态预训练模型在越南语VQA中的有效性，并指出改进自动评估机制对推动低资源多模态学习至关重要。

title: DiffWind: Physics-Informed Differentiable Modeling of Wind-Driven Object Dynamics
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2026. Project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/DiffWind/
summary: Modeling wind-driven object dynamics from video observations is highly challenging due to the invisibility and spatio-temporal variability of wind, as well as the complex deformations of objects. We present DiffWind, a physics-informed differentiable framework that unifies wind-object interaction modeling, video-based reconstruction, and forward simulation. Specifically, we represent wind as a grid-based physical field and objects as particle systems derived from 3D Gaussian Splatting, with their interaction modeled by the Material Point Method (MPM). To recover wind-driven object dynamics, we introduce a reconstruction framework that jointly optimizes the spatio-temporal wind force field and object motion through differentiable rendering and simulation. To ensure physical validity, we incorporate the Lattice Boltzmann Method (LBM) as a physics-informed constraint, enforcing compliance with fluid dynamics laws. Beyond reconstruction, our method naturally supports forward simulation under novel wind conditions and enables new applications such as wind retargeting. We further introduce WD-Objects, a dataset of synthetic and real-world wind-driven scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms prior dynamic scene modeling approaches in both reconstruction accuracy and simulation fidelity, opening a new avenue for video-based wind-object interaction modeling.

AI.tldr: DiffWind提出了一种基于物理的可微分框架，用于从视频中建模风驱动物体的动力学。通过将风表示为网格化的物理场，物体表示为基于3D高斯点云的粒子系统，并利用材料点法（MPM）建模交互。该方法联合优化时空风场与物体运动，结合可微渲染与模拟实现重建，并引入格子玻尔兹曼方法（LBM）确保物理一致性。同时支持新风条件下的前向仿真与风力重定向等应用。作者还构建了WD-Objects数据集，实验表明其在重建精度和仿真保真度上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 风的不可见性、时空变化性以及物体的复杂形变使得从视频中建模风驱动物体动力学极具挑战。现有方法难以同时保证物理合理性与高精度重建，亟需一种统一且物理一致的建模框架。
AI.method: 将风建模为网格化物理场，物体用3D高斯点云生成的粒子系统表示，通过材料点法（MPM）模拟风与物体的交互；采用可微渲染与模拟联合优化风场与物体运动；引入格子玻尔兹曼方法（LBM）作为物理约束以满足流体动力学规律；支持前向仿真与风力重定向等应用。
AI.result: 在合成与真实场景下均表现出优越的重建精度与仿真保真度，显著优于现有动态场景建模方法；验证了框架在风力重定向、前向模拟等新应用中的有效性；所构建的WD-Objects数据集为后续研究提供了基准。
AI.conclusion: DiffWind提供了一个统一、物理一致且可微的框架，实现了从视频中高精度重建风驱动物体动力学，并支持灵活的前向仿真与风力调控，为视频驱动的风-物交互建模开辟了新路径。

title: VarSplat: Uncertainty-aware 3D Gaussian Splatting for Robust RGB-D SLAM
summary: Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) with 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables fast, differentiable rendering and high-fidelity reconstruction across diverse real-world scenes. However, existing 3DGS-SLAM approaches handle measurement reliability implicitly, making pose estimation and global alignment susceptible to drift in low-texture regions, transparent surfaces, or areas with complex reflectance properties. To this end, we introduce VarSplat, an uncertainty-aware 3DGS-SLAM system that explicitly learns per-splat appearance variance. By using the law of total variance with alpha compositing, we then render differentiable per-pixel uncertainty map via efficient, single-pass rasterization. This map guides tracking, submap registration, and loop detection toward focusing on reliable regions and contributes to more stable optimization. Experimental results on Replica (synthetic) and TUM-RGBD, ScanNet, and ScanNet++ (real-world) show that VarSplat improves robustness and achieves competitive or superior tracking, mapping, and novel view synthesis rendering compared to existing studies for dense RGB-D SLAM.

AI.tldr: VarSplat 是一种不确定性感知的 3DGS-SLAM 系统，通过显式学习每个高斯点的外观方差，利用总方差定律与 alpha 合成生成可微的像素级不确定性图，指导跟踪、子地图配准和回环检测聚焦于可靠区域，从而提升全局一致性与鲁棒性。在 Replica、TUM-RGBD、ScanNet 和 ScanNet++ 数据集上的实验表明，该方法在稠密 RGB-D SLAM 中实现了优于或相当的定位、建图及新视角合成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有 3DGS-SLAM 方法对测量可靠性处理隐式，导致在低纹理区域、透明表面或复杂反射区域易出现位姿估计漂移，亟需引入不确定性感知机制以提升系统鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出 VarSplat，通过在 3DGS 框架中引入每高斯点的外观方差，并结合 alpha 合成与总方差定律，在单次光栅化中高效生成可微的像素级不确定性图，用于指导后续的跟踪、子地图注册和回环检测。
AI.result: 在 Replica（合成）以及 TUM-RGBD、ScanNet、ScanNet++（真实世界）数据集上，VarSplat 显著提升了系统在低纹理、透明或复杂反射场景下的鲁棒性，实现了竞争性或更优的跟踪精度、重建质量与新视角合成效果。
AI.conclusion: VarSplat 通过显式建模并利用外观不确定性，有效缓解了传统 3DGS-SLAM 在挑战性场景中的漂移问题，为高保真、鲁棒的实时稠密 SLAM 提供了一种新的可微分解决方案。

title: Improving 3D Foot Motion Reconstruction in Markerless Monocular Human Motion Capture
comment: Accepted at the 2026 International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV)
summary: State-of-the-art methods can recover accurate overall 3D human body motion from in-the-wild videos. However, they often fail to capture fine-grained articulations, especially in the feet, which are critical for applications such as gait analysis and animation. This limitation results from training datasets with inaccurate foot annotations and limited foot motion diversity. We address this gap with FootMR, a Foot Motion Refinement method that refines foot motion estimated by an existing human recovery model through lifting 2D foot keypoint sequences to 3D. By avoiding direct image input, FootMR circumvents inaccurate image-3D annotation pairs and can instead leverage large-scale motion capture data. To resolve ambiguities of 2D-to-3D lifting, FootMR incorporates knee and foot motion as context and predicts only residual foot motion. Generalization to extreme foot poses is further improved by representing joints in global rather than parent-relative rotations and applying extensive data augmentation. To support evaluation of foot motion reconstruction, we introduce MOOF, a 2D dataset of complex foot movements. Experiments on MOOF, MOYO, and RICH show that FootMR outperforms state-of-the-art methods, reducing ankle joint angle error on MOYO by up to 30% over the best video-based approach.

AI.tldr: FootMR 是一种用于精炼人体运动恢复模型中足部运动的方法，通过将2D足部关键点序列提升至3D，避免了图像-3D标注对的不准确性，利用大规模动作捕捉数据进行训练。该方法结合膝关节和足部运动作为上下文，仅预测残差足部运动，并采用全局旋转表示和数据增强以提升极端足部姿态下的泛化能力。为评估足部运动重建，提出了MOOF数据集。实验表明，FootMR在多个基准上优于现有方法，踝关节角度误差降低达30%。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在从野外视频中恢复3D人体运动时，难以捕捉足部等细粒度关节的运动，主要由于训练数据中足部标注不准确且运动多样性不足。此问题影响步态分析与动画等应用。
AI.method: FootMR通过2D足部关键点序列到3D的提升实现足部运动精炼；不依赖图像输入，使用大规模动作捕捉数据；引入膝关节与足部运动作为上下文信息，仅预测残差运动；采用全局旋转表示，并结合数据增强策略以提升极端姿态下的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在MOOF、MOYO和RICH数据集上的实验表明，FootMR显著优于现有视频基方法，踝关节角度误差最多降低30%，验证了其在足部运动重建方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FootMR通过有效利用动作捕捉数据并设计合理的运动建模方式，在足部精细运动重建方面取得突破，为高精度人体运动估计提供了新思路。

title: From Semantics to Pixels: Coarse-to-Fine Masked Autoencoders for Hierarchical Visual Understanding
summary: Self-supervised visual pre-training methods face an inherent tension: contrastive learning (CL) captures global semantics but loses fine-grained detail, while masked image modeling (MIM) preserves local textures but suffers from "attention drift" due to semantically-agnostic random masking. We propose C2FMAE, a coarse-to-fine masked autoencoder that resolves this tension by explicitly learning hierarchical visual representations across three data granularities: semantic masks (scene-level), instance masks (object-level), and RGB images (pixel-level). Two synergistic innovations enforce a strict top-down learning principle. First, a cascaded decoder sequentially reconstructs from scene semantics to object instances to pixel details, establishing explicit cross-granularity dependencies that parallel decoders cannot capture. Second, a progressive masking curriculum dynamically shifts the training focus from semantic-guided to instance-guided and finally to random masking, creating a structured learning path from global context to local features. To support this framework, we construct a large-scale multi-granular dataset with high-quality pseudo-labels for all 1.28M ImageNet-1K images. Extensive experiments show that C2FMAE achieves significant performance gains on image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation, validating the effectiveness of our hierarchical design in learning more robust and generalizable representations.

AI.tldr: C2FMAE提出一种从粗到细的掩码自编码器，通过在场景、对象和像素三个层次上学习层级视觉表示，解决对比学习（CL）与掩码图像建模（MIM）之间的张力。其核心创新包括：级联解码器实现从语义到实例再到像素的逐级重建，建立跨粒度依赖；以及渐进式掩码课程，逐步从语义引导转向随机掩码，形成由全局到局部的结构化学习路径。基于128万图像的多粒度数据集验证了该方法在分类、检测和分割任务上的显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督视觉预训练方法中，对比学习虽能捕捉全局语义但丢失细节，而掩码图像建模虽保留局部纹理却因随机掩码导致注意力漂移。二者存在内在矛盾，亟需一种能够兼顾全局与局部信息并实现层级学习的新范式。
AI.method: 提出C2FMAE框架，包含：(1) 级联解码器，按从场景语义到物体实例再到像素细节的顺序进行重建，显式建模跨粒度依赖关系；(2) 渐进式掩码课程，动态调整掩码策略，从语义引导逐渐过渡到随机掩码，引导模型从全局上下文逐步聚焦局部特征。同时构建大规模多粒度数据集以支持该框架。
AI.result: 在图像分类、目标检测和语义分割等多个下游任务中均取得显著性能提升，证明了所提层级设计在学习更鲁棒、泛化性更强的视觉表征方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: C2FMAE通过显式建模多层次视觉表示与结构化学习路径，有效缓解了自监督预训练中的全局-局部权衡问题，为构建更具表达力的视觉模型提供了新思路。

title: TriFusion-SR: Joint Tri-Modal Medical Image Fusion and SR
summary: Multimodal medical image fusion facilitates comprehensive diagnosis by aggregating complementary structural and functional information, but its effectiveness is limited by resolution degradation and modality discrepancies. Existing approaches typically perform image fusion and super-resolution (SR) in separate stages, leading to artifacts and degraded perceptual quality. These limitations are further amplified in tri-modal settings that combine anatomical modalities (e.g., MRI, CT) with functional scans (e.g., PET, SPECT) due to pronounced frequency domain imbalances. We propose TriFusionSR, a wavelet-guided conditional diffusion framework for joint tri-modal fusion and SR. The framework explicitly decomposes multimodal features into frequency bands using the 2D Discrete Wavelet Transform, enabling frequency-aware crossmodal interaction. We further introduce a Rectified Wavelet Features (RWF) strategy for latent coefficient calibration, followed by an Adaptive Spatial-Frequency Fusion (ASFF) module with gated channel-spatial attention to enable structure-driven multimodal refinement. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, achieving 4.8-12.4% PSNR improvement and substantial reductions in RMSE and LPIPS across multiple upsampling scales.

AI.tldr: 提出TriFusionSR，一种基于小波引导的条件扩散框架，用于联合三模态医学图像融合与超分辨率（SR），通过小波变换分解多模态特征并实现频率感知的跨模态交互，结合修正的小波特征校准和自适应空间-频率融合模块，显著提升图像质量与细节还原能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将图像融合与超分辨率分阶段处理，导致伪影和感知质量下降；在三模态设置下，由于模态间频率域不平衡问题，性能进一步受限。
AI.method: 采用2D离散小波变换对多模态特征进行频带分解，实现频率感知的跨模态交互；引入修正小波特征（RWF）策略校准潜在系数，并设计带有门控通道-空间注意力的自适应空间-频率融合（ASFF）模块，以结构驱动方式优化多模态融合。
AI.result: 在多个上采样尺度下均达到领先性能，PSNR提升4.8-12.4%，同时大幅降低RMSE和LPIPS值，验证了方法在图像保真度与视觉质量上的优越性。
AI.conclusion: TriFusionSR通过联合建模融合与超分辨率过程，有效缓解了多模态医学图像中的分辨率退化与模态差异问题，为精准诊断提供了高质量融合图像支持。

title: Ego: Embedding-Guided Personalization of Vision-Language Models
summary: AI assistants that support humans in daily life are becoming increasingly feasible, driven by the rapid advancements in multimodal language models. A key challenge lies in overcoming the generic nature of these models to deliver personalized experiences. Existing approaches to personalizing large vision language models often rely on additional training stages, which limit generality and scalability, or on engineered pipelines with external pre-trained modules, which hinder deployment efficiency. In this work, we propose an efficient personalization method that leverages the model's inherent ability to capture personalized concepts. Specifically, we extract visual tokens that predominantly represent the target concept by utilizing the model's internal attention mechanisms. These tokens serve as a memory of that specific concept, enabling the model to recall and describe it when it appears in test images. We conduct a comprehensive and unified evaluation of our approach and SOTA methods across various personalization settings including single-concept, multi-concept, and video personalization, demonstrating strong performance gains with minimal personalization overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的人工智能助手个性化方法，利用多模态语言模型内部的注意力机制提取代表特定概念的视觉标记，作为该概念的记忆，从而在测试图像中识别并描述该概念。该方法无需额外训练或复杂工程管道，具有低开销和高效率的优势，在单概念、多概念及视频个性化任务中均表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有个性化方法依赖额外训练或外部预训练模块，限制了模型的通用性与可扩展性，且部署效率低下。因此需要一种更高效、无需额外训练的个性化方法。
AI.method: 通过分析模型内部注意力机制，提取主要表征目标概念的视觉标记，将其作为概念记忆，用于后续图像中的概念识别与描述。
AI.result: 在多种个性化场景（单概念、多概念、视频）下，该方法均表现出显著性能提升，同时保持极低的个性化开销，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法充分利用了模型自身的能力，实现高效、可扩展的个性化，为日常生活中人工智能助手的个性化应用提供了可行路径。

title: FrameDiT: Diffusion Transformer with Frame-Level Matrix Attention for Efficient Video Generation
summary: High-fidelity video generation remains challenging for diffusion models due to the difficulty of modeling complex spatio-temporal dynamics efficiently. Recent video diffusion methods typically represent a video as a sequence of spatio-temporal tokens which can be modeled using Diffusion Transformers (DiTs). However, this approach faces a trade-off between the strong but expensive Full 3D Attention and the efficient but temporally limited Local Factorized Attention. To resolve this trade-off, we propose Matrix Attention, a frame-level temporal attention mechanism that processes an entire frame as a matrix and generates query, key, and value matrices via matrix-native operations. By attending across frames rather than tokens, Matrix Attention effectively preserves global spatio-temporal structure and adapts to significant motion. We build FrameDiT-G, a DiT architecture based on MatrixAttention, and further introduce FrameDiT-H, which integrates Matrix Attention with Local Factorized Attention to capture both large and small motion. Extensive experiments show that FrameDiT-H achieves state-of-the-art results across multiple video generation benchmarks, offering improved temporal coherence and video quality while maintaining efficiency comparable to Local Factorized Attention.

AI.tldr: 提出Matrix Attention机制，通过帧级矩阵操作实现高效全局时空建模，构建FrameDiT-G和FrameDiT-H模型，在保持效率的同时显著提升视频生成的时序连贯性和质量，达到当前最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型在建模复杂时空动态时面临计算成本高与时间建模能力有限之间的权衡，尤其是全3D注意力计算昂贵，局部因子化注意力难以捕捉大范围运动。
AI.method: 提出一种帧级时间注意力机制Matrix Attention，将整帧视为矩阵，通过矩阵原生操作生成查询、键、值矩阵，实现跨帧全局关注；基于此构建FrameDiT-G，并结合局部因子化注意力设计FrameDiT-H以同时处理大、小运动。
AI.result: 在多个视频生成基准上表现优异，相比现有方法在时序连贯性与视频质量方面均有提升，且计算效率接近局部因子化注意力。
AI.conclusion: Matrix Attention有效解决了视频扩散模型中时空建模的效率与表达力矛盾，FrameDiT-H实现了高质量、高效率的视频生成，为未来视频生成模型提供了新范式。

title: $M^2$-Occ: Resilient 3D Semantic Occupancy Prediction for Autonomous Driving with Incomplete Camera Inputs
comment: The source code will be publicly released at https://github.com/qixi7up/M2-Occ
summary: Semantic occupancy prediction enables dense 3D geometric and semantic understanding for autonomous driving. However, existing camera-based approaches implicitly assume complete surround-view observations, an assumption that rarely holds in real-world deployment due to occlusion, hardware malfunction, or communication failures. We study semantic occupancy prediction under incomplete multi-camera inputs and introduce $M^2$-Occ, a framework designed to preserve geometric structure and semantic coherence when views are missing. $M^2$-Occ addresses two complementary challenges. First, a Multi-view Masked Reconstruction (MMR) module leverages the spatial overlap among neighboring cameras to recover missing-view representations directly in the feature space. Second, a Feature Memory Module (FMM) introduces a learnable memory bank that stores class-level semantic prototypes. By retrieving and integrating these global priors, the FMM refines ambiguous voxel features, ensuring semantic consistency even when observational evidence is incomplete. We introduce a systematic missing-view evaluation protocol on the nuScenes-based SurroundOcc benchmark, encompassing both deterministic single-view failures and stochastic multi-view dropout scenarios. Under the safety-critical missing back-view setting, $M^2$-Occ improves the IoU by 4.93%. As the number of missing cameras increases, the robustness gap further widens; for instance, under the setting with five missing views, our method boosts the IoU by 5.01%. These gains are achieved without compromising full-view performance. The source code will be publicly released at https://github.com/qixi7up/M2-Occ.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出M^2-Occ框架，用于在多摄像头输入不完整的情况下进行语义占据预测。通过多视图掩码重建（MMR）模块和特征记忆模块（FMM），分别恢复缺失视图的特征并利用全局语义先验提升语义一致性。在nuScenes-based SurroundOcc基准上，该方法在后视图缺失等安全关键场景下显著提升性能，最大IoU提升达5.01%，且不影响全视图表现。
AI.motivation: 现有基于摄像头的语义占据预测方法假设拥有完整的环视观测，但现实中常因遮挡、硬件故障或通信问题导致视角缺失。为应对这一现实挑战，需要一种能在不完整多摄像头输入下保持几何结构与语义一致性的方法。
AI.method: 提出M^2-Occ框架，包含两个核心组件：1）多视图掩码重建（MMR）模块，利用相邻摄像头间的空间重叠，在特征空间中直接恢复缺失视图表示；2）特征记忆模块（FMM），引入可学习的记忆库存储类别级语义原型，通过检索并融合这些全局先验来修正模糊体素特征，增强语义一致性。
AI.result: 在nuScenes-based SurroundOcc基准上的实验表明，M^2-Occ在后视图缺失场景下提升IoU 4.93%；当五个视图缺失时，提升达5.01%。该方法在保持全视图性能的同时，显著提升了在缺失视角下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: M^2-Occ有效解决了多摄像头输入不完整条件下的语义占据预测问题，通过特征重建与语义记忆机制，在真实复杂场景中实现了更强的鲁棒性和一致性，具有实际部署价值。

title: ENIGMA-360: An Ego-Exo Dataset for Human Behavior Understanding in Industrial Scenarios
summary: Understanding human behavior from complementary egocentric (ego) and exocentric (exo) points of view enables the development of systems that can support workers in industrial environments and enhance their safety. However, progress in this area is hindered by the lack of datasets capturing both views in realistic industrial scenarios. To address this gap, we propose ENIGMA-360, a new ego-exo dataset acquired in a real industrial scenario. The dataset is composed of 180 egocentric and 180 exocentric procedural videos temporally synchronized offering complementary information of the same scene. The 360 videos have been labeled with temporal and spatial annotations, enabling the study of different aspects of human behavior in industrial domain. We provide baseline experiments for 3 foundational tasks for human behavior understanding: 1) Temporal Action Segmentation, 2) Keystep Recognition and 3) Egocentric Human-Object Interaction Detection, showing the limits of state-of-the-art approaches on this challenging scenario. These results highlight the need for new models capable of robust ego-exo understanding in real-world environments. We publicly release the dataset and its annotations at https://iplab.dmi.unict.it/ENIGMA-360.

AI.tldr: 提出ENIGMA-360数据集，包含在真实工业场景中采集的180段同步的头戴式（ego）和外部视角（exo）视频，提供时空标注，支持人类行为理解研究。通过三个基础任务的基线实验，揭示现有方法在该场景下的局限性，强调需要新模型实现鲁棒的跨视角行为理解。数据集已公开发布。
AI.motivation: 现有研究受限于缺乏真实工业场景下同时包含头戴式与外部视角的多视角数据集，阻碍了对人类行为的全面理解及工业安全系统的发展。
AI.method: 在真实工业环境中采集180段头戴式与180段外部视角的同步视频，构建ENIGMA-360数据集，并进行时空标注，用于支持多视角行为分析。
AI.result: 基线实验表明当前最先进的方法在时间动作分割、关键步骤识别和头戴式人-物体交互检测任务上表现有限，凸显了在真实复杂环境中实现跨视角理解的挑战。
AI.conclusion: ENIGMA-360数据集为研究工业场景中人类行为提供了重要资源，推动开发更鲁棒的多视角理解模型，提升工业环境中的安全与效率。

title: Adaptive Clinical-Aware Latent Diffusion for Multimodal Brain Image Generation and Missing Modality Imputation
summary: Multimodal neuroimaging provides complementary insights for Alzheimer's disease diagnosis, yet clinical datasets frequently suffer from missing modalities. We propose ACADiff, a framework that synthesizes missing brain imaging modalities through adaptive clinical-aware diffusion. ACADiff learns mappings between incomplete multimodal observations and target modalities by progressively denoising latent representations while attending to available imaging data and clinical metadata. The framework employs adaptive fusion that dynamically reconfigures based on input availability, coupled with semantic clinical guidance via GPT-4o-encoded prompts. Three specialized generators enable bidirectional synthesis among sMRI, FDG-PET, and AV45-PET. Evaluated on ADNI subjects, ACADiff achieves superior generation quality and maintains robust diagnostic performance even under extreme 80\% missing scenarios, outperforming all existing baselines. To promote reproducibility, code is available at https://github.com/rongzhou7/ACADiff

AI.tldr: ACADiff 是一种基于自适应临床感知扩散的多模态脑成像补全框架，可有效合成缺失的阿尔茨海默病影像数据（如sMRI、FDG-PET、AV45-PET），在极端80%数据缺失情况下仍保持优异生成质量与诊断性能，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 临床多模态神经影像数据常因缺失模态而影响阿尔茨海默病诊断，亟需高效且鲁棒的跨模态补全方法。
AI.method: 提出自适应临床感知扩散框架（ACADiff），通过逐步去噪潜在表示并融合可用影像与临床元数据，实现多模态间双向合成；采用动态融合机制和基于GPT-4o提示的语义引导增强生成质量。
AI.result: 在ADNI数据集上，ACADiff在生成质量与诊断性能方面均超越所有基线模型，尤其在80%模态缺失条件下表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: ACADiff能够有效解决多模态神经影像中的缺失问题，提升阿尔茨海默病诊断的可靠性，并为后续研究提供可复现的开源工具。

title: LAP: A Language-Aware Planning Model For Procedure Planning In Instructional Videos
summary: Procedure planning requires a model to predict a sequence of actions that transform a start visual observation into a goal in instructional videos. While most existing methods rely primarily on visual observations as input, they often struggle with the inherent ambiguity where different actions can appear visually similar. In this work, we argue that language descriptions offer a more distinctive representation in the latent space for procedure planning. We introduce Language-Aware Planning (LAP), a novel method that leverages the expressiveness of language to bridge visual observation and planning. LAP uses a finetuned Vision Language Model (VLM) to translate visual observations into text descriptions and to predict actions and extract text embeddings. These text embeddings are more distinctive than visual embeddings and are used in a diffusion model for planning action sequences. We evaluate LAP on three procedure planning benchmarks: CrossTask, Coin, and NIV. LAP achieves new state-of-the-art performance across multiple metrics and time horizons by large margin, demonstrating the significant advantage of language-aware planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Language-Aware Planning (LAP)的新方法，通过利用语言描述的表达能力来提升程序规划的准确性。LAP采用微调的视觉语言模型（VLM）将视觉观测转化为文本描述，并生成更具区分性的文本嵌入，用于扩散模型中的动作序列规划。在CrossTask、Coin和NIV三个基准测试中，LAP在多个指标和时间范围内均显著优于现有方法，验证了语言感知规划的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有程序规划方法主要依赖视觉输入，但在面对视觉上相似的不同动作时存在歧义问题。语言描述能提供更独特的潜在空间表示，有助于解决该问题。
AI.method: LAP使用微调的视觉语言模型将视觉观测转换为文本描述，提取文本嵌入，并将其作为扩散模型的输入以规划动作序列。
AI.result: LAP在CrossTask、Coin和NIV三个基准测试中均取得新的最先进性能，且在不同时间跨度下表现优异，证明了语言感知规划的优势。
AI.conclusion: 语言描述能够提供比视觉嵌入更区分性的表示，有效提升程序规划的准确性和鲁棒性，语言感知规划是未来方向的重要突破。

title: No Image, No Problem: End-to-End Multi-Task Cardiac Analysis from Undersampled k-Space
summary: Conventional clinical CMR pipelines rely on a sequential "reconstruct-then-analyze" paradigm, forcing an ill-posed intermediate step that introduces avoidable artifacts and information bottlenecks. This creates a fundamental mathematical paradox: it attempts to recover high-dimensional pixel arrays (i.e., images) from undersampled k-space, rather than directly extracting the low-dimensional physiological labels actually required for diagnosis. To unlock the direct diagnostic potential of k-space, we propose k-MTR (k-space Multi-Task Representation), a k-space representation learning framework that aligns undersampled k-space data and fully-sampled images into a shared semantic manifold. Leveraging a large-scale controlled simulation of 42,000 subjects, k-MTR forces the k-space encoder to restore anatomical information lost to undersampling directly within the latent space, bypassing the explicit inverse problem for downstream analysis. We demonstrate that this latent alignment enables the dense latent space embedded with high-level physiological semantics directly from undersampled frequencies. Across continuous phenotype regression, disease classification, and anatomical segmentation, k-MTR achieves highly competitive performance against state-of-the-art image-domain baselines. By showcasing that precise spatial geometries and multi-task features can be successfully recovered directly from the k-space representations, k-MTR provides a robust architectural blueprint for task-aware cardiac MRI workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出k-MTR框架，通过在欠采样k空间数据与全采样图像之间建立共享语义流形，实现直接从k空间进行多任务表征学习，避免传统重建-分析流程中的伪逆问题，显著提升心脏MRI诊断性能。
AI.motivation: 传统临床CMR流程采用'重建-分析'的串行范式，导致中间步骤引入不可避免的伪影和信息瓶颈，且试图从欠采样k空间恢复高维像素图像是一个病态问题，而实际诊断需求的是低维生理标签。
AI.method: 提出k-MTR（k空间多任务表征）框架，利用42,000例受试者的受控大规模仿真数据，使k空间编码器在潜在空间中直接恢复因欠采样丢失的解剖信息，实现k空间与图像间的语义对齐。
AI.result: k-MTR在连续表型回归、疾病分类和解剖分割任务中均达到与现有图像域基准相当甚至更优的性能，证明可直接从欠采样k空间中恢复精确的空间几何与多任务特征。
AI.conclusion: k-MTR为任务感知的心脏MRI工作流程提供了稳健的架构蓝图，展示了直接从k空间进行诊断分析的可行性与优越性。

title: LogoDiffuser: Training-Free Multilingual Logo Generation and Stylization via Letter-Aware Attention Control
summary: Recent advances in text-to-image generation have been remarkable, but generating multilingual design logos that harmoniously integrate visual and textual elements remains a challenging task. Existing methods often distort character geometry when applying creative styles and struggle to support multilingual text generation without additional training. To address these challenges, we propose LogoDiffuser, a training-free method that synthesizes multilingual logo designs using the multimodal diffusion transformer. Instead of using textual prompts, we input the target characters as images, enabling robust character structure control regardless of language. We first analyze the joint attention mechanism to identify core tokens, which are tokens that strongly respond to textual structures. With this observation, our method integrates character structure and visual design by injecting the most informative attention maps. Furthermore, we perform layer-wise aggregation of attention maps to mitigate attention shifts across layers and obtain consistent core tokens. Extensive experiments and user studies demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in multilingual logo generation.

AI.tldr: 提出LogoDiffuser，一种无需训练的多语言标志生成方法，通过将目标字符作为图像输入，实现对字符结构的鲁棒控制，并利用注意力机制识别核心标记，融合视觉与文本结构，提升多语言标志生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成多语言设计标志时，常因应用创意风格导致字符几何失真，且难以支持多语言文本生成而不需额外训练。
AI.method: 采用多模态扩散变压器，将目标字符以图像形式输入，分析联合注意力机制以识别对文本结构响应强烈的关键词，通过注入最具信息量的注意力图并进行层间聚合，减少跨层注意力偏移，获得一致的核心标记。
AI.result: 大量实验和用户研究证明，该方法在多语言标志生成任务中达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: LogoDiffuser实现了无需训练的高质量多语言标志生成，有效解决了字符结构失真与多语言支持难题。

title: Removing the Trigger, Not the Backdoor: Alternative Triggers and Latent Backdoors
summary: Current backdoor defenses assume that neutralizing a known trigger removes the backdoor. We show this trigger-centric view is incomplete: \emph{alternative triggers}, patterns perceptually distinct from training triggers, reliably activate the same backdoor. We estimate the alternative trigger backdoor direction in feature space by contrasting clean and triggered representations, and then develop a feature-guided attack that jointly optimizes target prediction and directional alignment. First, we theoretically prove that alternative triggers exist and are an inevitable consequence of backdoor training. Then, we verify this empirically. Additionally, defenses that remove training triggers often leave backdoors intact, and alternative triggers can exploit the latent backdoor feature-space. Our findings motivate defenses targeting backdoor directions in representation space rather than input-space triggers.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了现有后门防御方法的局限性，指出仅消除已知触发器不足以根除后门。研究发现，存在与训练触发器在感知上不同的‘替代触发器’，这些替代触发器能同样激活后门。通过对比干净样本与被触发样本的特征表示，作者估计出后门在特征空间中的方向，并提出一种基于特征引导的攻击方法，联合优化目标预测与方向对齐。理论和实验证明替代触发器是后门训练的必然结果。同时，移除原始触发器的防御策略往往无效，因为替代触发器仍可利用隐藏的后门特征空间。因此，论文主张未来防御应聚焦于特征空间中的后门方向，而非输入空间的触发器。
AI.motivation: 当前后门防御依赖于移除已知触发器，但该方法忽略了存在感知上不同但功能相同的替代触发器，导致防御不彻底。
AI.method: 通过对比干净样本与被触发样本的特征表示，估计后门在特征空间中的方向；设计特征引导攻击，联合优化目标预测与方向对齐；结合理论分析与实验验证替代触发器的存在性及其危害。
AI.result: 证明了替代触发器在理论上不可避免，且在实践中可有效激活后门；现有以触发器为中心的防御策略常失效；表明应转向针对特征空间中后门方向的防御机制。
AI.conclusion: 后门防御不应局限于输入空间的触发器移除，而应深入特征空间，识别并抑制后门方向，才能实现真正有效的防护。

title: RA-SSU: Towards Fine-Grained Audio-Visual Learning with Region-Aware Sound Source Understanding
summary: Audio-Visual Learning (AVL) is one fundamental task of multi-modality learning and embodied intelligence, displaying the vital role in scene understanding and interaction. However, previous researchers mostly focus on exploring downstream tasks from a coarse-grained perspective (e.g., audio-visual correspondence, sound source localization, and audio-visual event localization). Considering providing more specific scene perception details, we newly define a fine-grained Audio-Visual Learning task, termed Region-Aware Sound Source Understanding (RA-SSU), which aims to achieve region-aware, frame-level, and high-quality sound source understanding. To support this goal, we innovatively construct two corresponding datasets, i.e. fine-grained Music (f-Music) and fine-grained Lifescene (f-Lifescene), each containing annotated sound source masks and frame-by-frame textual descriptions. The f-Music dataset includes 3,976 samples across 22 scene types related to specific application scenarios, focusing on music scenes with complex instrument mixing. The f-Lifescene dataset contains 6,156 samples across 61 types representing diverse sounding objects in life scenarios. Moreover, we propose SSUFormer, a Sound-Source Understanding TransFormer benchmark that facilitates both the sound source segmentation and sound region description with a multi-modal input and multi-modal output architecture. Specifically, we design two modules for this framework, Mask Collaboration Module (MCM) and Mixture of Hierarchical-prompted Experts (MoHE), to respectively enhance the accuracy and enrich the elaboration of the sound source description. Extensive experiments are conducted on our two datasets to verify the feasibility of the task, evaluate the availability of the datasets, and demonstrate the superiority of the SSUFormer, which achieves SOTA performance on the Sound Source Understanding benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一项细粒度的音视频学习任务——区域感知声音源理解（RA-SSU），旨在实现帧级、高精度的声音源理解。为此，构建了两个新数据集：f-Music 和 f-Lifescene，分别涵盖音乐场景和生活场景中的声音源掩码与逐帧文本描述。同时提出 SSUFormer 模型，通过掩码协同模块（MCM）和分层提示专家混合（MoHE）提升分割精度与描述丰富性。实验验证了任务可行性、数据集有效性及模型优越性，在音源理解基准上达到当前最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有音视频学习研究多集中于粗粒度任务（如音视频对应、声源定位等），缺乏对具体场景细节的深入理解。为提升场景感知的精细度，本文提出细粒度的区域感知声音源理解任务，以支持更精准的场景理解与交互。
AI.method: 构建 f-Music 与 f-Lifescene 两个细粒度数据集，包含声音源掩码与逐帧文本描述；提出 SSUFormer 框架，采用多模态输入与输出结构，设计 Mask Collaboration Module（MCM）增强分割准确性，Mixture of Hierarchical-prompted Experts（MoHE）提升描述层次与丰富性。
AI.result: 在自建数据集上，SSUFormer 在声音源分割与区域描述任务中均取得显著性能提升，优于现有方法，达到音源理解任务的最新技术水平（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: 本文定义并实现了细粒度的区域感知声音源理解任务，构建了高质量的细粒度数据集，并提出 SSUFormer 模型，有效推动了音视频学习向精细化、智能化方向发展。

title: ConfCtrl: Enabling Precise Camera Control in Video Diffusion via Confidence-Aware Interpolation
summary: We address the challenge of novel view synthesis from only two input images under large viewpoint changes. Existing regression-based methods lack the capacity to reconstruct unseen regions, while camera-guided diffusion models often deviate from intended trajectories due to noisy point cloud projections or insufficient conditioning from camera poses. To address these issues, we propose ConfCtrl, a confidence-aware video interpolation framework that enables diffusion models to follow prescribed camera poses while completing unseen regions. ConfCtrl initializes the diffusion process by combining a confidence-weighted projected point cloud latent with noise as the conditioning input. It then applies a Kalman-inspired predict-update mechanism, treating the projected point cloud as a noisy measurement and using learned residual corrections to balance pose-driven predictions with noisy geometric observations. This allows the model to rely on reliable projections while down-weighting uncertain regions, yielding stable, geometry-aware generation. Experiments on multiple datasets show that ConfCtrl produces geometrically consistent and visually plausible novel views, effectively reconstructing occluded regions under large viewpoint changes.

AI.tldr: ConfCtrl提出一种自信度感知的视频插值框架，通过结合置信度加权的投影点云潜在表示与噪声作为条件输入，使扩散模型在大视角变化下能遵循预定相机姿态并补全未见区域。该方法采用受卡尔曼滤波启发的预测-更新机制，利用学习到的残差校正平衡姿态驱动预测与有噪几何观测，从而在可靠投影上依赖并降低不确定区域的影响，实现稳定、几何一致的生成。实验表明，ConfCtrl在多个数据集上均能生成视觉合理且几何一致的新视角图像，有效重建遮挡区域。
AI.motivation: 现有基于回归的方法难以重建未见区域，而相机引导的扩散模型常因点云投影噪声或相机位姿条件不足导致偏离预期轨迹，因此需要一种既能遵循相机路径又能补全未知区域的新方法。
AI.method: ConfCtrl通过置信度加权的投影点云潜变量与噪声联合初始化扩散过程；采用卡尔曼滤波启发的预测-更新机制，将投影点云视为有噪观测，使用学习的残差校正来平衡姿态预测与几何观测，实现对可靠投影的依赖和对不确定区域的抑制。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，ConfCtrl能够生成几何一致、视觉合理的新型视图，有效重建大视角变化下的遮挡区域，表现出强鲁棒性和生成质量。
AI.conclusion: ConfCtrl通过引入置信度感知机制与卡尔曼式状态估计，显著提升了扩散模型在大视角变化下的几何一致性与完整性，为单帧多视角合成提供了高效可靠的解决方案。

title: VLM-Loc: Localization in Point Cloud Maps via Vision-Language Models
summary: Text-to-point-cloud (T2P) localization aims to infer precise spatial positions within 3D point cloud maps from natural language descriptions, reflecting how humans perceive and communicate spatial layouts through language. However, existing methods largely rely on shallow text-point cloud correspondence without effective spatial reasoning, limiting their accuracy in complex environments. To address this limitation, we propose VLM-Loc, a framework that leverages the spatial reasoning capability of large vision-language models (VLMs) for T2P localization. Specifically, we transform point clouds into bird's-eye-view (BEV) images and scene graphs that jointly encode geometric and semantic context, providing structured inputs for the VLM to learn cross-modal representations bridging linguistic and spatial semantics. On top of these representations, we introduce a partial node assignment mechanism that explicitly associates textual cues with scene graph nodes, enabling interpretable spatial reasoning for accurate localization. To facilitate systematic evaluation across diverse scenes, we present CityLoc, a benchmark built from multi-source point clouds for fine-grained T2P localization. Experiments on CityLoc demonstrate VLM-Loc achieves superior accuracy and robustness compared to state-of-the-art methods. Our code, model, and dataset are available at \href{https://github.com/MCG-NKU/nku-3d-vision}{repository}.

AI.tldr: VLM-Loc提出利用大视觉-语言模型（VLM）的空间推理能力解决文本到点云（T2P）定位任务中的精度问题。通过将点云转换为鸟瞰图（BEV）图像和场景图，联合编码几何与语义上下文，并引入部分节点分配机制，实现可解释的空间推理。构建了CityLoc基准测试集用于多场景评估，实验表明VLM-Loc在准确性和鲁棒性上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有T2P定位方法依赖浅层文本-点云对应关系，缺乏有效空间推理，在复杂环境中精度受限。
AI.method: 将点云转化为鸟瞰图（BEV）图像和场景图以融合几何与语义信息；设计部分节点分配机制，将文本提示与场景图节点显式关联，增强可解释性与空间推理能力。
AI.result: 在CityLoc基准上，VLM-Loc在多种场景下表现出更高的定位精度和更强的鲁棒性，优于当前最优方法。
AI.conclusion: VLM-Loc通过利用VLM的空间推理能力，结合结构化输入与可解释的节点分配机制，显著提升了文本到点云定位的性能，为复杂环境下的语义空间理解提供了新范式。

title: MissBench: Benchmarking Multimodal Affective Analysis under Imbalanced Missing Modalities
summary: Multimodal affective computing underpins key tasks such as sentiment analysis and emotion recognition. Standard evaluations, however, often assume that textual, acoustic, and visual modalities are equally available. In real applications, some modalities are systematically more fragile or expensive, creating imbalanced missing rates and training biases that task-level metrics alone do not reveal. We introduce MissBench, a benchmark and framework for multimodal affective tasks that standardizes both shared and imbalanced missing-rate protocols on four widely used sentiment and emotion datasets. MissBench also defines two diagnostic metrics. The Modality Equity Index (MEI) measures how fairly different modalities contribute across missing-modality configurations. The Modality Learning Index (MLI) quantifies optimization imbalance by comparing modality-specific gradient norms during training, aggregated across modality-related modules. Experiments on representative method families show that models that appear robust under shared missing rates can still exhibit marked modality inequity and optimization imbalance under imbalanced conditions. These findings position MissBench, together with MEI and MLI, as practical tools for stress-testing and analyzing multimodal affective models in realistic incomplete-modality settings.For reproducibility, we release our code at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MissBench-4098/

AI.tldr: 提出MissBench基准框架，用于评估多模态情感计算模型在模态缺失不均衡情况下的表现，引入MEI和MLI两个诊断指标，揭示现有模型在真实不完整模态场景中的公平性与优化不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 真实应用中多模态数据常出现系统性缺失或成本差异，导致模态不平衡，而传统评估方法忽略此问题，无法揭示模型在实际场景中的缺陷。
AI.method: 构建MissBench基准，涵盖四种常用情感与情绪数据集，支持共享与不均衡缺失率协议；设计Modality Equity Index（MEI）和Modality Learning Index（MLI）两个诊断指标，分别衡量模态贡献公平性与训练过程中的梯度优化不平衡。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使在共享缺失率下表现良好的模型，在不均衡缺失条件下仍存在显著的模态不公与优化失衡；验证了MissBench及两个指标在真实场景下对模型的应力测试与分析价值。
AI.conclusion: MissBench结合MEI与MLI，为多模态情感计算模型提供了在现实不完整模态条件下的有效评估工具，有助于提升模型鲁棒性与公平性。

title: InternVL-U: Democratizing Unified Multimodal Models for Understanding, Reasoning, Generation and Editing
summary: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) that integrate understanding, reasoning, generation, and editing face inherent trade-offs between maintaining strong semantic comprehension and acquiring powerful generation capabilities. In this report, we present InternVL-U, a lightweight 4B-parameter UMM that democratizes these capabilities within a unified framework. Guided by the principles of unified contextual modeling and modality-specific modular design with decoupled visual representations, InternVL-U integrates a state-of-the-art Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) with a specialized MMDiT-based visual generation head. To further bridge the gap between aesthetic generation and high-level intelligence, we construct a comprehensive data synthesis pipeline targeting high-semantic-density tasks, such as text rendering and scientific reasoning, under a reasoning-centric paradigm that leverages Chain-of-Thought (CoT) to better align abstract user intent with fine-grained visual generation details. Extensive experiments demonstrate that InternVL-U achieves a superior performance - efficiency balance. Despite using only 4B parameters, it consistently outperforms unified baseline models with over 3x larger scales such as BAGEL (14B) on various generation and editing tasks, while retaining strong multimodal understanding and reasoning capabilities.

AI.tldr: InternVL-U 是一个40亿参数的轻量级统一多模态模型，通过统一上下文建模与模态特定模块化设计，在保持强大语义理解的同时实现卓越生成能力。其结合了先进的多模态大语言模型与基于MMDiT的视觉生成头，并采用以推理为中心的数据合成管道，利用思维链（CoT）提升抽象意图与细节生成的一致性。实验表明，尽管参数量仅为4B，其在生成与编辑任务上超越参数量超过3倍的基线模型（如BAGEL 14B），同时保留了优秀的多模态理解与推理性能。
AI.motivation: 统一多模态模型在语义理解与生成能力之间存在固有权衡。现有模型往往在参数规模上追求性能，但难以兼顾效率与多功能性。本文旨在构建一个轻量级、高效且具备全面能力的统一框架，使强大的生成与理解能力更易获得，推动多模态技术的普及。
AI.method: 提出InternVL-U，采用统一上下文建模与模态特定模块化设计，分离视觉表示；结合先进MLLM与MMDiT-based视觉生成头；构建以推理为中心的数据合成流程，使用Chain-of-Thought（CoT）增强生成与用户意图对齐。
AI.result: InternVL-U 在生成与编辑任务中表现优异，仅用40亿参数即超越参数量超3倍的基线模型（如BAGEL 14B），在保持高效的同时维持强多模态理解与推理能力，实现了性能-效率的优越平衡。
AI.conclusion: InternVL-U 证明了轻量级统一多模态模型在兼顾理解与生成能力方面的可行性，为多模态系统的高效部署和广泛应用提供了新范式。

title: DISPLAY: Directable Human-Object Interaction Video Generation via Sparse Motion Guidance and Multi-Task Auxiliary
summary: Human-centric video generation has advanced rapidly, yet existing methods struggle to produce controllable and physically consistent Human-Object Interaction (HOI) videos. Existing works rely on dense control signals, template videos, or carefully crafted text prompts, which limit flexibility and generalization to novel objects. We introduce a framework, namely DISPLAY, guided by Sparse Motion Guidance, composed only of wrist joint coordinates and a shape-agnostic object bounding box. This lightweight guidance alleviates the imbalance between human and object representations and enables intuitive user control. To enhance fidelity under such sparse conditions, we propose an Object-Stressed Attention mechanism that improves object robustness. To address the scarcity of high-quality HOI data, we further develop a Multi-Task Auxiliary Training strategy with a dedicated data curation pipeline, allowing the model to benefit from both reliable HOI samples and auxiliary tasks. Comprehensive experiments show that our method achieves high-fidelity, controllable HOI generation across diverse tasks. The project page can be found at \href{https://mumuwei.github.io/DISPLAY/}.

AI.tldr: DISPLAY 是一种基于稀疏运动引导的人类-物体交互（HOI）视频生成框架，仅使用手腕关节坐标和无形状的物体边界框作为控制信号，实现灵活、物理一致的视频生成。通过引入物体压力注意力机制和多任务辅助训练策略，提升了在稀疏控制下的生成质量与数据利用效率。实验表明，该方法在多种任务中均能生成高质量、可控的HOI视频。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖密集控制信号、模板视频或精心设计的文本提示，限制了灵活性和对新物体的泛化能力，因此需要一种更轻量、通用且可控的HOI视频生成方式。
AI.method: 提出DISPLAY框架，采用稀疏运动引导（仅手腕关节坐标和物体边界框），引入物体压力注意力机制增强对象鲁棒性，并设计多任务辅助训练策略结合专用数据清洗流程以缓解高质量HOI数据稀缺问题。
AI.result: 在多种任务中实现了高保真度、可控制的HOI视频生成，显著提升生成质量与用户控制灵活性，同时有效应对稀疏控制与数据不足挑战。
AI.conclusion: DISPLAY通过稀疏引导与创新模块设计，在保持轻量化的同时实现了高效、可控、物理一致的HOI视频生成，为未来人机交互视频生成提供了新范式。

title: Stepping VLMs onto the Court: Benchmarking Spatial Intelligence in Sports
summary: Sports have long attracted broad attention as they push the limits of human physical and cognitive capabilities. Amid growing interest in spatial intelligence for vision-language models (VLMs), sports provide a natural testbed for understanding high-intensity human motion and dynamic object interactions. To this end, we present CourtSI, the first large-scale spatial intelligence dataset tailored to sports scenarios. CourtSI contains over 1M QA pairs, organized under a holistic taxonomy that systematically covers spatial counting, distance measurement, localization, and relational reasoning, across representative net sports including badminton, tennis, and table tennis. Leveraging well-defined court geometry as metric anchors, we develop a semi-automatic data engine to reconstruct sports scenes, enabling scalable curation of CourtSI.
